Allah gives worldly ˹provisions˺ to the one He loves and to the one whom He does not love, but He does not faith except to the one He loves." This ḥadīth has a sound chain and is solitary from Aḥmad b. Janāb al-Miṣṣīṣī. In this book, our criteria is that we collect aḥādīth from credible narrators if we do not find any hidden defects in them. We have found two supporting evidences of ʿĪsá b. Yūnus and one of them meets the criteria of this book and it is from Sufyān b. ʿUqbah, the brother of Qabīṣah. – Sound Chain
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «إِنَّ اللَّهَ قَسَمَ بَيْنَكُمْ أَخْلَاقَكُمْ كَمَا قَسَمَ بَيْنَكُمْ أَرْزَاقَكُمْ۔ وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُعْطِي الدُّنْيَا مَنْ يُحِبُّ وَمَنْ لَا يُحِبُّ وَلَا يُعْطِي الْإِيمَانَ إِلَّا مَنْ يُحِبُّ۔» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحُ الْإِسْنَادِ تَفَرَّدَ بِهِ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ جَنَابٍ الْمِصِّيصِيُّ۔ وَهُوَ شَرْطٌ مِنْ شَرْطِنَا فِي هَذَا الْكِتَابِ أَنَّا نُخَرِّجُ أفْرَادَ الثِّقَاتِ إِذَا لَمْ نَجِدْ لَهَا عِلَّةً۔ وَقَدْ وَجَدْنَا لِعِيسَى بْنِ يُونُسَ فِيهِ مُتَابِعَيْنِ: أَحَدُهُمَا مِنْ شَرْطِ هَذَا الْكِتَابِ وَهُوَ سُفْيَانُ بْنُ عُقْبَةَ أَخُو قَبِيصَةَ» صحيح الإسناد – إسناده صحيح
chain: Daʿlaj b. Aḥmad al-Sijzī \u003e Mūsá b. Hārūn and Ṣāliḥ b. Muqātil \u003e ʿAlī b. Ḥamshādh \u003e Abū al-Muthanná al-ʿAnazī and Aḥmad b. ʿAlī al-Abbār \u003e Aḥmad b. Sahl b. Ḥamdawayh \u003e Ṣāliḥ b. Muḥammad b. Ḥabīb al-Ḥāfiẓ \u003e Aḥmad b. Janāb al-Miṣṣīṣī \u003e ʿĪsá b. Yūnus \u003e Sufyān al-Thawrī \u003e Zubayd \u003e Murrah \u003e ʿAbdullāh
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا دَعْلَجُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ السِّجْزِيُّ بِبَغْدَادَ ثنا مُوسَى بْنُ هَارُونَ وَصَالِحُ بْنُ مُقَاتِلٍ وَحدثنا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حَمْشَاذَ ثنا أَبُو الْمُثَنَّى الْعَنَزِيُّ وَأَحْمَدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الْأَبَّارُ وَحدثنا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ سَهْلِ بْنِ حَمْدَوَيْهِ الْفَقِيهُ بِبُخَارَى ثنا صَالِحُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَبِيبٍ الْحَافِظُ قَالُوا ثنا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ جَنَابٍ الْمِصِّيصِيُّ ثنا عِيسَى بْنُ يُونُسَ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ الثَّوْرِيِّ عَنْ زُبَيْدٍ عَنْ مُرَّةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 95

chapter.englishTitle: As for the saying of Ma'mar

englishRaw: On the authority of the Prophet ﷺ , he said, "Indeed, Allah has divided your manners as He has divided your provisions. And indeed, Allah gives wealth to those He loves and those He does not love. And He does not give faith except to those He loves. And when Allah loves a servant, He gives him faith. As for the narrator who is not mentioned in this book, he is Abd al-Aziz ibn Aban, and his hadith is known with it. It is authenticated by two narrators of Isa ibn Yunus, then by a narrator of al-Thawri from Zubaid, and he is Hamzah al-Zayyat." This was narrated by Abd al-Aziz ibn Aban, and it is not a condition of our book concerning al-Thawri.
body: On the authority of the Prophet ﷺ , he said, "Indeed, Allah has divided your manners as He has divided your provisions. And indeed, Allah gives wealth to those He loves and those He does not love. And He does not give faith except to those He loves. And when Allah loves a servant, He gives him faith. As for the narrator who is not mentioned in this book, he is Abd al-Aziz ibn Aban, and his hadith is known with it. It is authenticated by two narrators of Isa ibn Yunus, then by a narrator of al-Thawri from Zubaid, and he is Hamzah al-Zayyat." This was narrated by Abd al-Aziz ibn Aban, and it is not a condition of our book concerning al-Thawri.
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ «إِنَّ اللَّهَ قَسَمَ بَيْنَكُمْ أَخْلَاقَكُمْ كَمَا قَسَمَ بَيْنَكُمْ أَرْزَاقَكُمْ وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يُعْطِي الْمَالَ مَنْ يُحِبُّ وَمَنْ لَا يُحِبُّ وَلَا يُعْطِي الْإِيمَانَ إِلَّا مَنْ يُحِبُّ وَإِذَا أَحَبَّ اللَّهُ عَبْدًا أَعْطَاهُ الْإِيمَانَ» «وَأَمَّا الْمُتَابِعُ الَّذِي لَيْسَ مِنْ شَرْطِ هَذَا الْكِتَابِ فَعَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ بْنُ أَبَانَ وَالْحَدِيثُ مَعْرُوفٌ بِهِ فَقَدْ صَحَّ بِمُتَابِعَيْنِ لِعِيسَى بْنِ يُونُسَ ثُمَّ بِمُتَابِعٍ للثَّوْرِيِّ عَنْ زُبَيْدٍ وَهُوَ حَمْزَةُ الزَّيَّاتُ» ورواه عبد العزيز بن أبان وليس من شرط كتابنا عن الثوري
chain: Abū ʿAlī al-Ḥusayn b. ʿAlī al-Ḥāfiẓ \u003e Mihrān b. Hārūn al-Rāzī \u003e al-Faḍl b. al-ʿAbbās al-Rāzī / Faḍlak al-Rāzī \u003e Ibrāhīm b. Muḥammad b. Ḥammawayh al-Rāzī \u003e Sufyān b. ʿUqbah Akhū Qabīṣah \u003e Ḥamzah al-Zayyāt And Sufyān al-Thawrī \u003e Zubayd \u003e Murrah \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Masʿūd
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَلِيٍّ الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الْحَافِظُ أَنْبَأَ مِهْرَانُ بْنُ هَارُونَ الرَّازِيُّ ثنا الْفَضْلُ بْنُ الْعَبَّاسِ الرَّازِيُّ وَهُوَ فَضْلَكُ الرَّازِيُّ ثنا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَمَّوَيْهِ الرَّازِيُّ ثنا سُفْيَانُ بْنُ عُقْبَةَ أَخُو قَبِيصَةَ عَنْ حَمْزَةَ الزَّيَّاتِ وَسُفْيَانَ الثَّوْرِيِّ عَنْ زُبَيْدٍ عَنْ مُرَّةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 96

chapter.englishTitle: As for the saying of Ma'mar

englishRaw: I heard Kurz bin 'Alqamah saying, "A man asked the Prophet ﷺ, 'O Messenger of Allah, does Islam have a limit?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ replied, 'Yes, whoever from the Arab or non-Arab people who Allah intends good for, He will enter Islam upon them. Then, the trials will occur like the darknesses.'" Muhammad bin Rashid and Yunus bin Yazid narrated this from Az-Zuhri, but they did not mention it to be solely narrated by 'Urwah while he was a companion.
body: I heard Kurz bin 'Alqamah saying, "A man asked the Prophet ﷺ, 'O Messenger of Allah, does Islam have a limit?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ replied, 'Yes, whoever from the Arab or non-Arab people who Allah intends good for, He will enter Islam upon them. Then, the trials will occur like the darknesses.'" Muhammad bin Rashid and Yunus bin Yazid narrated this from Az-Zuhri, but they did not mention it to be solely narrated by 'Urwah while he was a companion.
arabic: سَمِعْتُ كُرْزَ بْنَ عَلْقَمَةَ يَقُولُ سَأَلَ رَجُلٌ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ هَلْ لِلْإِسْلَامِ مِنْ مُنْتَهًى؟ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «نَعَمْ أَيُّمَا أَهْلِ بَيْتٍ مِنَ الْعَرَبِ وَالْعَجَمِ أَرَادَ اللَّهُ بِهِمْ خَيْرًا أَدْخَلَ عَلَيْهِمُ الْإِسْلَامَ ثُمَّ تَقَعُ الْفِتَنُ كَأَنَّهَا الظُّلَلُ» تَابَعَهُ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ رَاشِدٍ وَيُونُسُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّلم يخرجاه لتفرد عروة عن كرز وهو صحابي
chain: Abū Bakr b. Isḥāq al-Faqīh \u003e Bishr b. Mūsá \u003e al-Ḥumaydī And Ḥdthnā ʿAlī b. ʿĪsá \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAmr al-Ḥarashī \u003e Yaḥyá b. Yaḥyá \u003e Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan \u003e Hārūn b. Yūsuf \u003e Ibn Abū ʿUmar \u003e Ūā \u003e Sufyān Wa-al-Lafẓ Lilḥumaydī \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e ʿUrwah b. al-Zubayr \u003e Kurz b. ʿAlqamah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْفَقِيهُ أَنْبَأَ بِشْرُ بْنُ مُوسَى ثنا الْحُمَيْدِيُّ وَحدثنا عَلِيُّ بْنُ عِيسَى ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَمْرٍو الْحَرَشِيُّ ثنا يَحْيَى بْنُ يَحْيَى وَحَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ ثنا هَارُونُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ ثنا ابْنُ أَبِي عُمَرَ قَالُوا ثنا سُفْيَانُ وَاللَّفْظُ لِلْحُمَيْدِيِّ ثنا الزُّهْرِيُّ حَدَّثَنِي عُرْوَةُ بْنُ الزُّبَيْرِ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 97

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: An Arab man said, "O Messenger of Allah, does Islam have a limit?" He replied, "Yes, whoever among the Arab or non-Arab people that Allah intends good for, He will enter Islam upon them. Then, the trials will occur to them like the darkness of the night."
body: An Arab man said, "O Messenger of Allah, does Islam have a limit?" He replied, "Yes, whoever among the Arab or non-Arab people that Allah intends good for, He will enter Islam upon them. Then, the trials will occur to them like the darkness of the night."
arabic: أَعْرَابِيٌّ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ هَلْ لِلْإِسْلَامِ مِنْ مُنْتَهًى؟ فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ أَيُّمَا أَهْلِ بَيْتٍ مِنَ الْعَرَبِ وَالْعَجَمِ أَرَادَ اللَّهُ بِهِمْ خَيْرًا أَدْخَلَ عَلَيْهِمُ الْإِسْلَامَ ثُمَّ تَقَعُ الْفِتَنُ كَأَنَّهَا الظُّلَلُ» هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ وَلَيْسَ لَهُ عِلَّةٌ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ لِتَفَرُّدِ عُرْوَةَ بِالرِّوَايَةِ عَنْ كُرْزِ بْنِ عَلْقَمَةَ وَكُرْزُ بْنُ عَلْقَمَةَ صَحَابِيٌّ مُخَرَّجٌ حَدِيثُهُ فِي مَسَانِيدِ الْأَئِمَّةِ سَمِعْتُ عَلِيَّ بْنَ عُمَرَ الْحَافِظَ يَقُولُ مِمَّا يَلْزَمُ مُسْلِمٌ وَالْبُخَارِيُّ إِخْرَاجَهُ حَدِيثُ كُرْزِ بْنِ عَلْقَمَةَ «هَلْ لِلْإِسْلَامِ مُنْتَهًى» فَقَدْ رَوَاهُ عُرْوَةُ بْنُ الزُّبَيْرِ وَرَوَاهُ الزُّهْرِيُّ وَعَبْدُ الْوَاحِدِ بْنُ قَيْسٍ عَنْهُ قَالَ الْحَاكِمُ «وَالدَّلِيلُ الْوَاضِحُ عَلَى مَا ذَكَرَهُ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ أَنَّهُمَا جَمِيعًا قَدِ اتَّفَقَا عَلَى حَدِيثِ عِتْبَانَ بْنِ مَالِكٍ الْأَنْصَارِيِّ الَّذِي صَلَّى رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ فِي بَيْتِهِ وَلَيْسَ لَهُ رَاوٍ غَيْرُ مَحْمُودِ بْنِ الرَّبِيعِ»
chain: Abū al-Muwajjah \u003e ʿAbdān \u003e ʿAbdullāh \u003e Maʿmar \u003e al-Zuhrī \u003e ʿUrwah b. al-Zubayr \u003e Kurz b. ʿAlqamah \u003e Qāl Aʿrābī
chainArabic: فَأَخْبَرَنَاهُ الْقَاسِمُ بْنُ الْقَاسِمِ السَّيَّارِيُّ ثنا أَبُو الْمُوَجَّهِ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدَانُ أَنْبَأَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ عَنْ مَعْمَرٍ عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ بْنِ الزُّبَيْرِ عَنْ كُرْزِ بْنِ عَلْقَمَةَ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 98

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: Abu Ali Al-Janbi informed him that he heard Fadalah bin Ubaid telling that he heard the Prophet ﷺ saying: "Blessed is the one who is guided to Islam and his livelihood is sufficient and content." – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: Abu Ali Al-Janbi informed him that he heard Fadalah bin Ubaid telling that he heard the Prophet ﷺ saying: "Blessed is the one who is guided to Islam and his livelihood is sufficient and content." – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: أَنَّ أَبَا عَلِيٍّ الْجَنْبِيَّ أَخْبَرَهُ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ فَضَالَةَ بْنَ عُبَيْدٍ يُخْبِرُ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ يَقُولُ «طُوبَى لِمَنْ هُدِيَ إِلَى الْإِسْلَامِ وَكَانَ عَيْشُهُ كَفَافًا وَقَنَعَ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ وَبَلَغَنِي أَنَّهُ خَرَّجَهُ بِإِسْنَادٍ آخَرَ» على شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū al-Faḍl al-Ḥasan b. Yaʿqūb al-ʿAdl \u003e al-Sarī b. Khuzaymah \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Yazīd al-Muqriʾ \u003e Abū ʿAbdullāh Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh al-Ṣaffār And ʾAbū Bakr Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Bālawayh \u003e Bishr b. Mūsá \u003e Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥman al-Muqriʾ \u003e Ḥaywah b. Shurayḥ \u003e Abū Hāniʾ Ḥumayd b. Hāniʾ al-Khawlānī \u003e Abū ʿAlī al-Janbī \u003e Faḍālah b. ʿUbayd
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْفَضْلِ الْحَسَنُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ الْعَدْلُ ثنا السَّرِيُّ بْنُ خُزَيْمَةَ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ يَزِيدَ الْمُقْرِئُ أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الصَّفَّارُ وَأَبُو بَكْرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ بَالَوَيْهِ قَالَا ثنا بِشْرُ بْنُ مُوسَى ثنا أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الْمُقْرِئُ ثنا حَيْوَةُ بْنُ شُرَيْحٍ أَنْبَأَ أَبُو هَانِئٍ حُمَيْدُ بْنُ هَانِئٍ الْخَوْلَانِيُّ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 99

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say, "O Allah, I seek refuge in You from disbelief, poverty, and the punishment of the grave." – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say, "O Allah, I seek refuge in You from disbelief, poverty, and the punishment of the grave." – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ «اللَّهُمَّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكُفْرِ وَالْفَقْرِ وَعَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ وَقَدِ احْتَجَّ مُسْلِمٌ بِعُثْمَانَ الشَّحَّامِ» على شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. Ṣāliḥ b. Hāniʾ And ʾAbū ʿAbdullāh Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. Dīnār \u003e al-Ḥusayn b. Faḍl al-Bajalī \u003e Abū Muḥammad b. Jaʿfar b. Ibrāhīm al-Ḥadhhāʾ Bimakkah \u003e Muḥammad b. Sulaymān b. al-Ḥārith \u003e Hawdhah b. Khalīfah \u003e Ḥammād b. Salamah \u003e ʿUthmān al-Shaḥḥām \u003e Muslim b. Abū Bakrah \u003e Abū Bakrah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ صَالِحِ بْنِ هَانِئٍ وَأَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ دِينَارٍ قَالَا ثنا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ فَضْلٍ الْبَجَلِيُّ وَأَخْبَرَنِي أَبُو مُحَمَّدِ بْنُ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ الْحَذَّاءُ بِمَكَّةَ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ الْحَارِثِ ثنا هَوْذَةُ بْنُ خَلِيفَةَ ثنا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ عُثْمَانَ الشَّحَّامِ عَنْ مُسْلِمِ بْنِ أَبِي بَكْرَةَ عَنْ أَبِي بَكْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 100

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "O people, I am only a bestowed mercy." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "O people, I am only a bestowed mercy." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ إِنَّمَا أَنَا رَحْمَةٌ مُهْدَاةٌ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِهِمَا فَقَدِ احْتَجَّا جَمِيعًا بِمَالِكِ بْنِ سُعَيْرٍ وَالتَّفَرُّدُ مِنَ الثِّقَاتِ مَقْبُولٌ» على شرطهما وتفرد الثقة مقبول – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū Bakr Muḥammad b. Jaʿfar al-Muzakkī \u003e Ibrāhīm b. Abū Ṭālib And Muḥammad b. Isḥāq b. Khuzaymah \u003e Abū al-Khaṭṭāb Ziyād b. Yaḥyá al-Ḥassānī \u003e Abū al-Faḍl Muḥammad b. Ibrāhīm \u003e al-Ḥusayn b. Muḥammad b. Ziyād Waʾibrāhīm b. Abū Ṭālib \u003e Ziyād b. Yaḥyá al-Ḥassānī \u003e Mālik b. Suʿayr \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Abū Ṣāliḥ \u003e Abū Hurayrah \u003e Qāl Rasūl
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْمُزَكِّيُّ ثنا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ خُزَيْمَةَ قَالَا ثنا أَبُو الْخَطَّابِ زِيَادُ بْنُ يَحْيَى الْحَسَّانِيُّ وَثنا أَبُو الْفَضْلِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ ثنا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ وَإِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ قَالَا ثنا زِيَادُ بْنُ يَحْيَى الْحَسَّانِيُّ أَنْبَأَ مَالِكُ بْنُ سُعَيْرٍ ثنا الْأَعْمَشُ عَنْ أَبِي صَالِحٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 101

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: The translation of the provided Arabic text is: Narrated to us: Faith was revealed before the Quran, and the surahs are revealed to Muhammad (pbuh), so that he may learn their permissibility and prohibition, and what should be emphasized in. Just as you know that you are the Quran." Then, he said, "I have seen men who are given the Quran and they read from the beginning to the end, not knowing what to do or what to avoid, or what to emphasize out of it. They scatter it like scattered seeds." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: The translation of the provided Arabic text is: Narrated to us: Faith was revealed before the Quran, and the surahs are revealed to Muhammad (pbuh), so that he may learn their permissibility and prohibition, and what should be emphasized in. Just as you know that you are the Quran." Then, he said, "I have seen men who are given the Quran and they read from the beginning to the end, not knowing what to do or what to avoid, or what to emphasize out of it. They scatter it like scattered seeds." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: أَحْدَثَنَا يُؤْتَى الْإِيمَانَ قَبْلَ الْقُرْآنِ وَتَنْزِلُ السُّورَةُ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ فَيَتَعَلَّمُ حَلَالَهَا وَحَرَامَهَا وَمَا يَنْبَغِي أَنْ يُوقَفَ عِنْدَهُ فِيهَا كَمَا تَعْلَمُونَ أَنْتُمُ الْقُرْآنَ» ثُمَّ قَالَ «لَقَدْ رَأَيْتُ رِجَالًا يُؤْتَى أَحَدُهُمُ الْقُرْآنَ فَيَقْرَأُ مَا بَيْنَ فَاتِحَتِهِ إِلَى خَاتِمَتِهِ مَا يَدْرِي مَا أَمْرُهُ وَلَا زَاجِرُهُ وَلَا مَا يَنْبَغِي أَنْ يُوقَفَ عِنْدَهُ مِنْهُ يَنْثُرُهُ نَثْرَ الدَّقَلِ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَا أَعْرِفُ لَهُ عِلَّةً وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» على شرطهما ولا علة له – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Aḥmad b. Salmān al-Faqīh \u003e Hilāl b. al-ʿAlāʾ al-Raqqī from my father \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. ʿAmr \u003e Zayd b. Abū Unaysah \u003e al-Qāsim b. ʿAwf al-Shaybānī \u003e Ibn ʿUmar \u003e Laqad ʿIshnā Burhah from Dahrinā And ʾIn
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ سَلْمَانَ الْفَقِيهُ ثنا هِلَالُ بْنُ الْعَلَاءِ الرَّقِّيُّ ثنا أَبِي ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَمْرٍو عَنْ زَيْدِ بْنِ أَبِي أُنَيْسَةَ عَنِ الْقَاسِمِ بْنِ عَوْفٍ الشَّيْبَانِيِّ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ ابْنَ عُمَرَ يَقُولُ «لَقَدْ عِشْنَا بُرْهَةً مِنْ دَهْرِنَا وَإِنَّ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 102

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: " Six are cursed, being cursed by Allah and by every Prophet that came: The one who adds to Allah's Book, the one who denies Allah's Qadar, the one who rules with tyranny by which he honors whom Allah has debased, and he dishonors whom Allah has honored, and the one who legalizes what Allah forbade, and the one from my family who legalizes what Allah forbade, and the abandoner of my Sunnah."
body: " Six are cursed, being cursed by Allah and by every Prophet that came: The one who adds to Allah's Book, the one who denies Allah's Qadar, the one who rules with tyranny by which he honors whom Allah has debased, and he dishonors whom Allah has honored, and the one who legalizes what Allah forbade, and the one from my family who legalizes what Allah forbade, and the abandoner of my Sunnah."
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ سِتَّةٌ لَعَنْتُهُمْ لَعَنَهُمُ اللَّهُ وَكُلُّ نَبِيٍّ مُجَابٍ الْمُكَذِّبُ بِقَدْرِ اللَّهِ وَالزَّائِدُ فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ وَالْمُتَسَلِّطُ بِالْجَبَرُوتِ يُذِلُّ مَنْ أَعَزَّ اللَّهُ وَيُعِزُّ مَنْ أَذَلَّ اللَّهُ وَالْمُسْتَحِلُّ لِحُرَمِ اللَّهِ وَالْمُسْتَحِلُّ مِنْ عِتْرَتِي مَا حَرَّمَ اللَّهُ وَالتَّارِكُ لِسُنَّتِي «» قَدِ احْتَجَّ الْبُخَارِيُّ بِعَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي الْمَوَالِ وَ هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحُ الْإِسْنَادِ وَلَا أَعْرِفُ لَهُ عِلَّةً وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ صحيح ولا أعرف له علة
chain: Abū Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. Jaʿfar b. Darastawayh al-Fārisī \u003e Yaʿqūb b. Sufyān al-Fārisī And Ḥdthnā Abū Bakr b. Isḥāq al-Faqīh \u003e al-Ḥasan b. ʿAlī b. Ziyād \u003e Isḥāq b. Muḥammad al-Farwī \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Abū al-Mawāl al-Qurashī \u003e Muḥammad b. al-Muʾammal \u003e al-Faḍl b. Muḥammad al-Shaʿrānī \u003e Qutaybah b. Saʿīd \u003e Ibn Abū al-Mawāl ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Mawhab al-Qurashī \u003e Abū Bakr b. Muḥammad b. ʿAmr b. Ḥazm \u003e ʿAmrah \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو مُحَمَّدِ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ دَرَسْتَوَيْهِ الْفَارِسِيُّ ثنا يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ سُفْيَانَ الْفَارِسِيُّ وَحدثنا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْفَقِيهُ ثنا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ زِيَادٍ قَالَا ثنا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْفَرْوِيُّ ثنا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ أَبِي الْمَوَالِ الْقُرَشِيُّ وَأَخْبَرَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُؤَمَّلِ ثنا الْفَضْلُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الشَّعْرَانِيُّ ثنا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ ثنا ابْنُ أَبِي الْمَوَالِ عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مَوْهَبٍ الْقُرَشِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي بَكْرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَمْرِو بْنِ حَزْمٍ عَنْ عَمْرَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 103

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: A man came to the Prophet Muhammad and said, "O Muhammad, do you see a paradise as wide as the heavens and the earth? So, where is the fire?" The Prophet replied, "Have you not seen the night that covers everything? So, where does it put the day?" Allah knows best. The man said, "Indeed, Allah can do whatever He wills." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: A man came to the Prophet Muhammad and said, "O Muhammad, do you see a paradise as wide as the heavens and the earth? So, where is the fire?" The Prophet replied, "Have you not seen the night that covers everything? So, where does it put the day?" Allah knows best. The man said, "Indeed, Allah can do whatever He wills." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ ﷺ فَقَالَ يَا مُحَمَّدُ أَرَأَيْتَ جَنَّةً عَرْضُهَا السَّمَاوَاتُ وَالْأَرْضُ فَأَيْنَ النَّارُ؟ قَالَ «أَرَأَيْتَ اللَّيْلَ الَّذِي قَدْ أَلْبَسَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ فَأَيْنَ جَعَلَ النَّهَارَ؟» قَالَ اللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ قَالَ «كَذَلِكَ يَفْعَلُ اللَّهُ مَا يَشَاءُ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَا أَعْلَمُ لَهُ عِلَّةً وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» على شرطهما ولا أعلم له علة – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: al-Ḥākim Abū ʿAbdullāh Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh al-Ḥāfiẓ Imlāʾ Fī Shahr Rabīʿ al-Ākhir Sanah Thalāth And Tisʿīn Wathalāth Miāʾah \u003e Abū Aḥmad Bakr b. Muḥammad al-Ṣayrafī Bimarw \u003e Abū Ismāʿīl Muḥammad b. Ismāʿīl \u003e Abū al-Nuʿmān Muḥammad b. al-Faḍl \u003e ʿAbd al-Wāḥid b. Ziyād \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh al-Jawharī \u003e Muḥammad b. Isḥāq \u003e Muḥammad b. Maʿmar b. Ribʿī al-Qaysī \u003e Abū Hishām al-Mughīrah b. Salamah al-Makhzūmī \u003e ʿAbd al-Wāḥid b. Ziyād \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. ʿAbdullāh b. al-Aṣam \u003e Yazīd b. al-Aṣam \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا الْحَاكِمُ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْحَافِظُ إِمْلَاءً فِي شَهْرِ رَبِيعٍ الْآخِرِ سَنَةَ ثَلَاثٍ وَتِسْعِينَ وَثَلَاثِ مِائَةٍ أَنْبَأَ أَبُو أَحْمَدَ بَكْرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الصَّيْرَفِيُّ بِمَرْوَ ثنا أَبُو إِسْمَاعِيلَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ ثنا أَبُو النُّعْمَانِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْفَضْلِ ثنا عَبْدُ الْوَاحِدِ بْنُ زِيَادٍ وَأَخْبَرَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْجَوْهَرِيُّ وَاللَّفْظُ لَهُ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ أَنْبَأَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مَعْمَرِ بْنِ رِبْعِيٍّ الْقَيْسِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو هِشَامٍ الْمُغِيرَةُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ الْمَخْزُومِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْوَاحِدِ بْنُ زِيَادٍ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنُ الْأَصَمِّ ثنا يَزِيدُ بْنُ الْأَصَمِّ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 104

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "I do not know whether Tubba' was a Prophet or not, and I do not know whether Dhul-Qarnayn was a Prophet or not, and I do not know whether the prescribed punishments (hudood) are expiations for the people or not." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "I do not know whether Tubba' was a Prophet or not, and I do not know whether Dhul-Qarnayn was a Prophet or not, and I do not know whether the prescribed punishments (hudood) are expiations for the people or not." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «مَا أَدْرِي تُبَّعٌ أَنَبِيًّا كَانَ أَمْ لَا؟ وَمَا أَدْرِي ذَا الْقَرْنَيْنِ أَنَبِيًّا كَانَ أَمْ لَا؟ وَمَا أَدْرِي الْحُدُودُ كَفَّارَاتٌ لِأَهْلِهَا أَمْ لَا؟» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَا أَعْلَمُ لَهُ عِلَّةً وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» على شرطهما ولا أعلم له علة – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Aḥmad b. Jaʿfar al-Qaṭīʿī \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Aḥmad b. Ḥanbal from my father \u003e ʿAlī b. Ḥamshādh \u003e Ibrāhīm b. Abū Ṭālib \u003e Muḥammad b. Rāfiʿ And Muḥammad b. Yaḥyá \u003e ʿAbd al-Razzāq \u003e Maʿmar \u003e Ibn Abū Dhiʾb \u003e Saʿīd al-Maqburī \u003e Abū Hurayrah \u003e Qāl Rasūl
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْقَطِيعِيُّ أَنْبَأَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي وَحَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حَمْشَاذَ ثنا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ رَافِعٍ وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى قَالُوا ثنا عَبْدُ الرَّزَّاقِ أَنْبَأَ مَعْمَرٌ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي ذِئْبٍ عَنْ سَعِيدٍ الْمَقْبُرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 105

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: When Allah fashioned Adam in Paradise, He left him as He liked him to leave. Then Iblis roamed round him to see what actually that was and when he found him hollow from within, he recognised that he had been created with a disposition that he would not have control over himself.  – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: When Allah fashioned Adam in Paradise, He left him as He liked him to leave. Then Iblis roamed round him to see what actually that was and when he found him hollow from within, he recognised that he had been created with a disposition that he would not have control over himself.  – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ «لَمَّا خَلَقَ اللَّهُ آدَمَ صَوَّرَهُ وَتَرَكَهُ فِي الْجَنَّةِ مَا شَاءَ اللَّهُ أَنْ يَتْرُكَهُ فَجَعَلَ إِبْلِيسُ يُطِيفُ بِهِ فَلَمَّا رَآهُ أَجْوَفَ عَرَفَ أَنَّهُ خَلْقٌ لَا يَتَمَالَكُ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ وَقَدْ بَلَغَنِي أَنَّهُ أَخْرَجَهُ فِي آخِرِ الْكِتَابِ» على شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Aḥmad b. Jaʿfar al-Qaṭīʿī \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Aḥmad b. Ḥanbal from my father \u003e Bahz b. Asad \u003e Ḥammād b. Salamah \u003e Thābit \u003e Anas
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْقَطِيعِيُّ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي حَدَّثَنَا بَهْزُ بْنُ أَسَدٍ ثنا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ ثَابِتٍ عَنْ أَنَسٍ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 106

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: “You will most certainly follow the ways of those who came before you, arm’s length by arm’s length, forearm’s length by forearm’s length, hand span by hand span, until even if they entered a hole of a mastigure (lizard) you will enter it too.” They said: “O Messenger of Allah, (do you mean) the Jews and the Christians?” He said: “Who else?”  – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: “You will most certainly follow the ways of those who came before you, arm’s length by arm’s length, forearm’s length by forearm’s length, hand span by hand span, until even if they entered a hole of a mastigure (lizard) you will enter it too.” They said: “O Messenger of Allah, (do you mean) the Jews and the Christians?” He said: “Who else?”  – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «لَتَتَّبِعُنَّ سَنَنَ مَنْ قَبْلَكُمْ بَاعًا فَبَاعًا وَذِرَاعًا فَذِرَاعًا وَشِبْرًا فَشِبْرًا حَتَّى لَوْ دَخَلُوا جُحْرَ ضَبٍّ لَدَخَلْتُمُوهُ مَعَهُمْ» قَالَ قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ الْيَهُودُ وَالنَّصَارَى قَالَ «فَمَنْ إِذًا؟» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ بِهَذَا اللَّفْظِ» على شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū ʿAmr ʿUthmān b. Aḥmad b. al-Sammāk\u003e Quriʾ \u003e ʿAbd al-Malik b. Muḥammad \u003e Quraysh b. Anas \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAmr \u003e Abū Bakr b. Isḥāq \u003e Abū al-Muthanná \u003e Musaddad \u003e al-Muʿtamir \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAmr \u003e Abū Salamah \u003e Abū Hurayrah \u003e Qāl Rasūl
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو عَمْرٍو عُثْمَانُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ السَّمَّاكِ بِبَغْدَادَ قَالَ قُرِئَ عَلَى عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَنَا أَسْمَعُ ثنا قُرَيْشُ بْنُ أَنَسٍ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَمْرٍو وَحَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ أَنْبَأَ أَبُو الْمُثَنَّى ثنا مُسَدَّدٌ ثنا الْمُعْتَمِرُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 107

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: I heard Al-Bara' bin 'Azib saying: We went out with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ for the funeral of a man from the Ansar. When we reached the grave, and it was about to be covered with soil, the Prophet ﷺ sat down and looked towards the sky and the earth. He raised his gaze and lowered it three times, then he said, "O Allah! I seek refuge with You from the punishment of the grave." Then he said, "Verily, when a believing man is about to depart from this world and enter the Hereafter, angels with faces as bright as the sun descend upon him. They bring with them shrouds from Paradise and perfumes from Paradise. They sit with him as far as the eye can see." He said, "Then the angel of death comes to him and sits by
body: I heard Al-Bara' bin 'Azib saying: We went out with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ for the funeral of a man from the Ansar. When we reached the grave, and it was about to be covered with soil, the Prophet ﷺ sat down and looked towards the sky and the earth. He raised his gaze and lowered it three times, then he said, "O Allah! I seek refuge with You from the punishment of the grave." Then he said, "Verily, when a believing man is about to depart from this world and enter the Hereafter, angels with faces as bright as the sun descend upon him. They bring with them shrouds from Paradise and perfumes from Paradise. They sit with him as far as the eye can see." He said, "Then the angel of death comes to him and sits by
arabic: سَمِعْتُ الْبَرَاءَ بْنَ عَازِبٍ يَقُولُ خَرَجْنَا مَعَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ فِي جَنَازَةِ رَجُلٍ مِنَ الْأَنْصَارِ فَانْتَهَيْنَا إِلَى الْقَبْرِ وَلَمَّا يُلْحَدْ بَعْدُ قَالَ فَقَعَدْنَا حَوْلَ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ فَجَعَلَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ وَيَنْظُرُ إِلَى الْأَرْضِ وَجَعَلَ يَرْفَعُ بَصَرَهُ وَيَخْفِضُهُ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ قَالَ «اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ» ثُمَّ قَالَ «إِنَّ الرَّجُلَ الْمُسْلِمَ إِذَا كَانَ فِي قُبُلٍ مِنَ الْآخِرَةِ وَانْقِطَاعٍ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا جَاءَ مَلَكُ الْمَوْتِ فَقَعَدَ عِنْدَ رَأْسِهِ وَيَنْزِلُ مَلَائِكَةٌ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ كَأَنَّ وُجُوهَهُمُ الشَّمْسُ مَعَهُمْ أَكْفَانٌ مِنْ أَكْفَانِ الْجَنَّةِ وَحَنُوطٌ مِنْ حَنُوطِ الْجَنَّةِ فَيَقْعُدُونَ مِنْهُ مَدَّ الْبَصَرِ» قَالَ فَيَقُولُ مَلَكُ الْمَوْتِ أَيَّتُهَا النَّفْسُ الْمُطْمَئِنَّةُ اخْرُجِي إِلَى مَغْفِرَةٍ مِنَ اللَّهِ وَرِضْوَانٍ قَالَ فَتَخْرُجُ تَسِيلُ كَمَا تَسِيلُ الْقَطْرَةُ مِنَ السِّقَاءِ فَلَا يَتْرُكُونَهَا فِي يَدِهِ طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ فَيَصْعَدُونَ بِهَا إِلَى السَّمَاءِ فَلَا يَمُرُّونَ بِهَا عَلَى جُنْدٍ مِنْ مَلَائِكَةٍ إِلَّا قَالُوا مَا هَذِهِ الرُّوحُ الطَّيِّبَةُ؟ فَيَقُولُونَ فُلَانُ بْنُ فُلَانٍ بِأَحْسَنِ أَسْمَائِهِ فَإِذَا انْتَهَى إِلَى السَّمَاءِ فُتِحَتْ لَهُ أَبْوَابُ السَّمَاءِ ثُمَّ يُشَيِّعُهُ مِنْ كُلِّ سَمَاءٍ مُقَرَّبُوهَا إِلَى السَّمَاءِ الَّتِي تَلِيهَا حَتَّى يُنْتَهَى إِلَى السَّمَاءِ السَّابِعَةِ ثُمَّ يُقَالُ اكْتُبُوا كِتَابَهُ فِي عِلِّيِّينَ ثُمَّ يُقَالُ أَرْجِعُوا عَبْدِي إِلَى الْأَرْضِ فَإِنِّي وَعَدْتُهُمْ أَنِّي مِنْهَا خَلَقْتُهُمْ وَفِيهَا أُعِيدُهُمْ وَمِنْهَا أُخْرِجُهُمْ تَارَةً أُخْرَى فَتُرَدُّ رُوحُهُ إِلَى جَسَدِهِ فَتَأْتِيهِ الْمَلَائِكَةُ فَيَقُولُونَ مَنْ رَبُّكَ؟ قَالَ فَيَقُولُ اللَّهُ فَيَقُولُونَ مَا دِينُكَ؟ فَيَقُولُ الْإِسْلَامُ فَيَقُولُونَ مَا هَذَا الرَّجُلُ الَّذِي خَرَجَ فِيكُمْ؟ قَالَ فَيَقُولُ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ قَالَ فَيَقُولُونَ وَمَا يُدْرِيكَ؟ قَالَ فَيَقُولُ قَرَأْتُ كِتَابَ اللَّهِ فَآمَنْتُ بِهِ وَصَدَّقْتُ قَالَ فَيُنَادِي مُنَادٍ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ أَنْ صَدَقَ فَأَفْرِشُوهُ مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ وَأَلْبِسُوهُ مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ وَأَرُوهُ مَنْزِلَهُ مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ قَالَ وَيُمَدُّ لَهُ فِي قَبْرِهِ وَيَأْتِيهِ رَوْحُ الْجَنَّةِ وَرِيحُهَا قَالَ فَيُفْعَلُ ذَلِكَ بِهِمْ وَيَمْثُلُ لَهُ رَجُلٌ حَسَنُ الْوَجْهِ حَسَنُ الثِّيَابِ طَيِّبُ الرِّيحِ فَيَقُولُ أَبْشِرْ بِالَّذِي يَسُرُّكَ هَذَا يَوْمُكَ الَّذِي كُنْتَ تُوعَدُ فَيَقُولُ مَنْ أَنْتَ فَوَجْهُكَ وَجْهٌ يُبَشِّرُ بِالْخَيْرِ؟ قَالَ فَيَقُولُ أَنَا عَمَلُكَ الصَّالِحُ قَالَ فَهُوَ يَقُولُ رَبِّ أَقِمِ السَّاعَةَ كَيْ أَرْجِعَ إِلَى أَهْلِي وَمَالِي ثُمَّ قَرَأَ {يُثَبِّتُ اللَّهُ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا بِالْقَوْلِ الثَّابِتِ فِي الْحَيَاةِ الدُّنْيَا وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ} [إبراهيم 27] وَأَمَّا الْفَاجِرُ فَإِذَا كَانَ فِي قُبُلٍ مِنَ الْآخِرَةِ وَانْقِطَاعٍ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا أَتَاهُ مَلَكُ الْمَوْتِ فَيَقْعُدُ عِنْدَ رَأْسِهِ وَيَنْزِلُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ سُودُ الْوُجُوهِ مَعَهُمُ الْمُسُوحُ فَيَقْعُدُونَ مِنْهُ مَدَّ الْبَصَرِ فَيَقُولُ مَلَكُ الْمَوْتِ اخْرُجِي أَيَّتُهَا النَّفْسُ الْخَبِيثَةُ إِلَى سَخَطٍ مِنَ اللَّهِ وَغَضِبٍ قَالَ فَتُفَرَّقُ فِي جَسَدِهِ فَيَنْقَطِعُ مَعَهَا الْعُرُوقُ وَالْعَصَبُ كَمَا يُسْتَخْرَجُ الصُّوفُ الْمَبْلُولُ بِالسَّفُودِ ذِي الشُّعَبِ قَالَ فَيَقُومُونَ إِلَيْهِ فَلَا يَدَعُونَهُ فِي يَدِهِ طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ فَيَصْعَدُونَ بِهَا إِلَى السَّمَاءِ فَلَا يَمُرُّونَ عَلَى جُنْدٍ مِنَ الْمَلَائِكَةِ إِلَّا قَالُوا مَا هَذِهِ الرُّوحُ الْخَبِيثَةُ؟ قَالَ فَيَقُولُونَ فُلَانٌ بِأَقْبَحِ أَسْمَائِهِ قَالَ فَإِذَا انْتُهِيَ بِهِ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ غُلِّقَتْ دُونَهُ أَبْوَابُ السَّمَاوَاتِ قَالَ وَيُقَالُ اكْتُبُوا كِتَابَهُ فِي سِجِّينٍ قَالَ ثُمَّ يُقَالُ أَعِيدُوا عَبْدِي إِلَى الْأَرْضِ فَإِنِّي وَعَدْتُهُمْ أَنِّي مِنْهَا خَلَقْتُهُمْ وَفِيهَا أُعِيدُهُمْ وَمِنْهَا أُخْرِجُهُمْ تَارَةً أُخْرَى قَالَ فَيَرْمَى بِرُوحِهِ حَتَّى تَقَعَ فِي جَسَدِهِ قَالَ ثُمَّ قَرَأَ {وَمَنْ يُشْرِكْ بِاللَّهِ فَكَأَنَّمَا خَرَّ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ فَتَخْطَفُهُ الطَّيْرُ أَوْ تَهْوِي بِهِ الرِّيحُ فِي مَكَانٍ سَحِيقٍ} [الحج 31] قَالَ فَتَأْتِيهِ الْمَلَائِكَةُ فَيَقُولُونَ مَنْ رَبُّكَ؟ قَالَ فَيَقُولُ لَا أَدْرِي فَيُنَادِي مُنَادٍ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ أَنْ قَدْ كَذَبَ فَأَفْرِشُوهُ مِنَ النَّارِ وَأَلْبِسُوهُ مِنَ النَّارِ وَأَرُوهُ مَنْزِلَهُ مِنَ النَّارِ قَالَ فَيَضِيقُ عَلَيْهِ قَبْرُهُ حَتَّى تَخْتَلِفَ فِيهِ أَضْلَاعُهُ قَالَ وَيَأْتِيهِ رِيحُهَا وَحَرُّهَا قَالَ فَيُفْعَلُ بِهِ ذَلِكَ وَيَمْثُلُ لَهُ رَجُلٌ قَبِيحُ الْوَجْهِ قَبِيحُ الثِّيَابِ مُنْتِنُ الرِّيحِ فَيَقُولُ أَبْشِرْ بِالَّذِي يَسُؤْكَ هَذَا يَوْمُكَ الَّذِي كُنْتَ تُوعَدُ قَالَ فَيَقُولُ مَنْ أَنْتَ؟ فَوَجْهُكَ الْوَجْهُ يُبَشِّرُ بِالشَّرِّ قَالَ فَيَقُولُ أَنَا عَمَلُكَ الْخَبِيثُ قَالَ وَهُوَ يَقُولُ رَبِّ لَا تُقِمِ السَّاعَةَ
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb \u003e Muḥammad b. Isḥāq al-Ṣaghānī \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. Numayr from my father \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e al-Minhāl b. ʿAmr And Ḥdthnā Abū Bakr b. Isḥāq al-Faqīh \u003e Ismāʿīl b. Qutaybah \u003e Yaḥyá b. Yaḥyá \u003e Abū Muʿāwiyah \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e al-Minhāl b. ʿAmr \u003e Zādhān Abū ʿUmar \u003e al-Barāʾ b. ʿĀzib
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الصَّغَانِيُّ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ نُمَيْرٍ ثنا أَبِي ثنا الْأَعْمَشُ ثنا الْمِنْهَالُ بْنُ عَمْرٍو وَحدثنا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْفَقِيهُ أَنْبَأَ إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ قُتَيْبَةَ ثنا يَحْيَى بْنُ يَحْيَى أَنْبَأَ أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ ثنا الْمِنْهَالُ بْنُ عَمْرٍو عَنْ زَاذَانَ أَبِي عُمَرَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 108

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: From Abu Hurayrah, approximately from this narration, he wanted the narration of Al-Bara' except that he said, "Sleep like the believers sleep, and it is said to the wicked person, 'Sleep like the snoring one.' For there is no creature on the Earth except that it has a share in its body." This was narrated by Sufyan bin Sa'id, Shu'bah bin al-Hajjaj, and Zaidah bin Qudamah, who are the imams and preservers of the Ahmash. As for the narration of Thawri...
body: From Abu Hurayrah, approximately from this narration, he wanted the narration of Al-Bara' except that he said, "Sleep like the believers sleep, and it is said to the wicked person, 'Sleep like the snoring one.' For there is no creature on the Earth except that it has a share in its body." This was narrated by Sufyan bin Sa'id, Shu'bah bin al-Hajjaj, and Zaidah bin Qudamah, who are the imams and preservers of the Ahmash. As for the narration of Thawri...
arabic: عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ نَحْوًا مِنَ هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ يُرِيدُ حَدِيثَ الْبَرَاءِ إِلَّا أَنَّهُ قَالَ ارْقُدْ رَقْدَةَ الْمُتَّقِينَ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ الْأَوَّلِ وَيُقَالُ لِلْفَاجِرِ ارْقُدْ مَنْهُوشًا فَمَا مِنْ دَابَّةٍ فِي الْأَرْضِ إِلَّا وَلَهَا فِي جَسَدِهِ نَصِيبٌ وَقَدْ رَوَاهُ سُفْيَانُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ وَشُعْبَةُ بْنُ الْحَجَّاجِ وَزَائِدَةُ بْنُ قُدَامَةَ وَهُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ الْحُفَّاظُ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ أَمَا حَدِيثُ الثَّوْرِيِّ
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh al-ʿUmarī \u003e Muḥammad b. Isḥāq \u003e ʿAlī b. al-Mundhir \u003e Muḥammad b. Faḍl \u003e al-Aʿmash Fadhakarah Biʾisnād Naḥwih
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْعُمَرِيُّ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ ثنا عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْمُنْذِرِ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ فَضْلٍ ثنا الْأَعْمَشُ فَذَكَرَهُ بِإِسْنَادٍ نَحْوِهِ وَقَالَ فِي آخِرِهِ وَحَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْمُنْذِرِ فِي عَقِبِ خَبَرِهِ ثنا ابْنُ فُضَيْلٍ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي عَنْ أَبِي حَازِمٍ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 109

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: "We accompanied the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in a funeral procession until we reached the grave, and when no one was addressing the grave." And he mentioned the narration, as for the narration of Shu'bah."
body: "We accompanied the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in a funeral procession until we reached the grave, and when no one was addressing the grave." And he mentioned the narration, as for the narration of Shu'bah."
arabic: «خَرَجْنَا مَعَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ فِي جَنَازَةٍ فَأَتَيْنَا الْقَبْرَ وَلَمَّا يُلْحَدْ» وَذَكَرَ الْحَدِيثَ وَأَمَّا حَدِيثُ شُعْبَةَ
chain: Saʾaltuh \u003e Muḥammad b. Ibrāhīm al-Ṣūrī \u003e Muʾammal b. Ismāʿīl \u003e Sufyān \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e al-Minhāl b. ʿAmr \u003e Zādhān \u003e al-Barāʾ
chainArabic: فَحَدَّثَنَاهُ أَبُو مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ حَمْدَانَ الْجَلَّابُ بِهَمْدَانَ وَأَنَا سَأَلْتُهُ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ الصُّورِيُّ ثنا مُؤَمَّلُ بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ ثنا سُفْيَانُ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنِ الْمِنْهَالِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو عَنْ زَاذَانَ عَنِ الْبَرَاءِ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 110

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: From the Prophet ﷺ in the hadith of the grave, upon their condition, it has been extracted with the Manhal (a type of water source). As for the hadith of Zaidah – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: From the Prophet ﷺ in the hadith of the grave, upon their condition, it has been extracted with the Manhal (a type of water source). As for the hadith of Zaidah – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ فِي حَدِيثِ الْقَبْرِعلى شرطهما فقد احتجا بالمنهال وَأَمَّا حَدِيثُ زَائِدَةَ – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Saʾaltuh \u003e ʿAlī b. Muslim al-Aṣbahānī Bi-al-Rrī \u003e ʿAmmār b. Rajāʾ \u003e Muḥammad b. Bakr al-Bursānī \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e al-Minhāl b. ʿAmr \u003e Zādhān \u003e al-Barāʾ
chainArabic: فَحَدَّثَنِيهِ أَبُو سَعِيدِ بْنُ أَبِي بَكْرِ بْنِ أَبِي عُثْمَانَ رَحِمَهُمُ اللَّهُ وَأَنَا سَأَلْتُهُ ثنا عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ الْأَصْبَهَانِيُّ بِالرِّيِّ ثنا عَمَّارُ بْنُ رَجَاءٍ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَكْرٍ الْبُرْسَانِيُّ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنِ الْمِنْهَالِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو وَعَنْ زَاذَانَ عَنِ الْبَرَاءِ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 111

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: "We prayed with the Messenger of Allah, peace be upon him, for the funeral of a man from the Ansar. Then he mentioned the hadith of the grave and its length."
body: "We prayed with the Messenger of Allah, peace be upon him, for the funeral of a man from the Ansar. Then he mentioned the hadith of the grave and its length."
arabic: «صَلَّيْنَا مَعَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ عَلَى جَنَازَةِ رَجُلٍ مِنَ الْأَنْصَارِ» فَذَكَرَ حَدِيثَ الْقَبْرِ بِطُولِهِ «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ فَقَدِ احْتَجَّا جَمِيعًا بِالْمِنْهَالِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو وَزَاذَانَ أَبِي عُمَرَ الْكِنْدِيِّ وَفِي هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ فَوَائِدُ كَثِيرَةٌ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَقَمْعٌ لِلْمُبْتَدِعَةِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ بِطُولِهِ وَلَهُ شَوَاهِدُ عَلَى شَرْطِهِمَا يُسْتَدَلُّ بِهَا عَلَى صِحَّتِهِ»
chain: al-Ḥusayn b. al-Faḍl al-Bajalī \u003e Muʿāwiyah b. ʿAmr al-Azdī \u003e Zāʾidah \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e al-Minhāl b. ʿAmr \u003e Zādhān \u003e al-Barāʾ
chainArabic: فَحدثنا أَبُو سَعِيدٍ عَمْرُو بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مَنْصُورٍ الْعَدْلُ ثنا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ الْفَضْلِ الْبَجَلِيُّ ثنا مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمْرٍو الْأَزْدِيُّ ثنا زَائِدَةُ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنِ الْمِنْهَالِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو عَنْ زَاذَانَ عَنِ الْبَرَاءِ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 112

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: "The Prophet ﷺ mentioned the believer and the disbeliever, and then mentioned a portion of the hadith of the grave. The authenticity of this hadith is evident by its origin and witness. Perhaps someone may mistakenly think that the hadith that"
body: "The Prophet ﷺ mentioned the believer and the disbeliever, and then mentioned a portion of the hadith of the grave. The authenticity of this hadith is evident by its origin and witness. Perhaps someone may mistakenly think that the hadith that"
arabic: «ذَكَرَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ الْمُؤْمِنَ وَالْكَافِرَ ثُمَّ ذَكَرَ طَرَفًا مِنْ حَدِيثِ الْقَبْرِ» فَقَدْ بَانَ بِالْأَصْلِ وَالشَّاهِدِ صِحَّةُ هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ وَلَعَلَّ مُتَوَهِّمًا يَتَوَهَّمُ أَنَّ الْحَدِيثَ الَّذِي
chain: Abū Sahl Aḥmad b. Muḥammad b. Ziyād al-NaḥwīAnd ʾAbū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb from Aṣl Kitābih \u003e Yaḥyá b. Abū Ṭālib \u003e Wahb b. Jarīr \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Abū Isḥāq \u003e al-Barāʾ b. ʿĀzib
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو سَهْلٍ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ النَّحْوِيُّ بِبَغْدَادَ وَأَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ مِنْ أَصْلِ كِتَابِهِ قَالَا ثنا يَحْيَى بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ثنا وَهْبُ بْنُ جَرِيرٍ ثنا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ عَنِ الْبَرَاءِ بْنِ عَازِبٍ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 113

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: He said, "We went out with the messenger of Allah ﷺ for the funeral of an Ansari man. When we reached the grave and it was being prepared, the messenger of Allah ﷺ sat down and faced the qibla (the direction of prayer). We sat around him." Then he mentioned the hadith, "This hadith is explained in this way, and not like that. Indeed, the mention of Abu Al-Bakhtari in this hadith is a fabrication by Shuayb ibn Safwan, according to the consensus of the trustworthy narrators," in his narration from Yunus ibn Khubbab from Al-Minhali ibn Amr from Zadhan that he heard Al-Bara' narrate to us the authenticity of what I mentioned from Ja'far ibn Muhammad ibn Nasr al-Khuldii dictating in Baghdad. 'Ali ibn Abd al-Aziz narrated to us from Ibrahim ibn Ziyad Sabalan, who narrated from Abbada ibn Abbada who said, "I came to Yunus ibn Khubbab in Mina by the minaret, and he was narrating. So I asked him about the hadith of the torment of the grave, and he narrated it to me."
body: He said, "We went out with the messenger of Allah ﷺ for the funeral of an Ansari man. When we reached the grave and it was being prepared, the messenger of Allah ﷺ sat down and faced the qibla (the direction of prayer). We sat around him." Then he mentioned the hadith, "This hadith is explained in this way, and not like that. Indeed, the mention of Abu Al-Bakhtari in this hadith is a fabrication by Shuayb ibn Safwan, according to the consensus of the trustworthy narrators," in his narration from Yunus ibn Khubbab from Al-Minhali ibn Amr from Zadhan that he heard Al-Bara' narrate to us the authenticity of what I mentioned from Ja'far ibn Muhammad ibn Nasr al-Khuldii dictating in Baghdad. 'Ali ibn Abd al-Aziz narrated to us from Ibrahim ibn Ziyad Sabalan, who narrated from Abbada ibn Abbada who said, "I came to Yunus ibn Khubbab in Mina by the minaret, and he was narrating. So I asked him about the hadith of the torment of the grave, and he narrated it to me."
arabic: أَنَّهُ قَالَ «خَرَجْنَا مَعَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ فِي جَنَازَةِ رَجُلٍ مِنَ الْأَنْصَارِ فَأَتَيْنَا الْقَبْرَ وَلَمَّا يُلْحَدْ فَجَلَسَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ وَاسْتَقْبَلَ الْقِبْلَةَ وَجَلَسْنَا حَوْلَهُ» ثُمَّ ذَكَرَ الْحَدِيثَ «يُعَلَّلُ بِهِ هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ وَلَيْسَ كَذَلِكَ فَإِنَّ ذِكْرَ أَبِي الْبَخْتَرِيِّ فِي هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ وَهْمٌ مِنْ شُعَيْبِ بْنِ صَفْوَانَ لِإِجْمَاعِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الثِّقَاتِ» عَلَى رِوَايَتِهِ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ خَبَّابٍ عَنِ الْمِنْهَالِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو عَنْ زَاذَانَ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ الْبَرَاءَ حَدَّثَنَا بِصِحَّةِ مَا ذَكَرْتُهُ جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ نَصْرٍ الْخُلْدِيُّ إِمْلَاءً بِبَغْدَادَ ثنا عَلِيُّ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ ثنا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ زِيَادٍ سَبَلَانَ ثنا عَبَّادُ بْنُ عَبَّادٍ قَالَ أَتَيْتُ يُونُسَ بْنَ خَبَّابٍ بِمِنًى عِنْدَ الْمَنَارَةِ وَهُوَيَقُصُّ فَسَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ حَدِيثِ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ فَحَدَّثَنِي بِهِ
chain: Abū al-Ḥusayn ʿAbd al-Ṣamad b. ʿAlī b. Mukram al-Bazzār\u003e Jaʿfar b. Muḥammad b. Kazāl \u003e Abū Ibrāhīm al-Tarjumānī \u003e Shuʿayb b. Ṣafwān \u003e Yūnus b. Khabbāb \u003e al-Minhāl b. ʿAmr \u003e Zādhān \u003e Abū al-Bakhtarī al-Ṭāʾī \u003e al-Barāʾ b. ʿĀzib
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَاهُ أَبُو الْحُسَيْنِ عَبْدُ الصَّمَدِ بْنُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُكْرَمٍ الْبَزَّارُ بِبَغْدَادَ ثنا جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ كَزَالٍ ثنا أَبُو إِبْرَاهِيمَ التَّرْجُمَانِيُّ ثنا شُعَيْبُ بْنُ صَفْوَانَ ثنا يُونُسُ بْنُ خَبَّابٍ عَنِ الْمِنْهَالِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو عَنْ زَاذَانَ عَنْ أَبِي الْبَخْتَرِيِّ الطَّائِيِّ سَمِعْتُ الْبَرَاءَ بْنَ عَازِبٍ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 114

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: "We went out with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in a funeral procession. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ sat on the grave and we sat around him." And he mentioned the hadith in its entirety: "This is the authentic preserved hadith from the narration of Yunus ibn Khabbab." And thus Abu Khaled Ad-Dalani, Amr ibn Qais Al-Mulaiy, and Al-Hasan ibn Abdullah Al-Nakha'i narrated it from Minh'al ibn Amr. "As for the hadith of Abu Khaled Ad-Dalani..."
body: "We went out with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in a funeral procession. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ sat on the grave and we sat around him." And he mentioned the hadith in its entirety: "This is the authentic preserved hadith from the narration of Yunus ibn Khabbab." And thus Abu Khaled Ad-Dalani, Amr ibn Qais Al-Mulaiy, and Al-Hasan ibn Abdullah Al-Nakha'i narrated it from Minh'al ibn Amr. "As for the hadith of Abu Khaled Ad-Dalani..."
arabic: «خَرَجْنَا مَعَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ فِي جَنَازَةٍ فَجَلَسَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ عَلَى الْقَبْرِ وَجَلَسْنَا حَوْلَهُ» وَذَكَرَ الْحَدِيثَ بِطُولِهِ «هَذَا هُوَالصَّحِيحُ الْمَحْفُوظُ مِنْ حَدِيثِ يُونُسَ بْنِ خَبَّابٍ» وَهَكَذَا رَوَاهُ أَبُو خَالِدٍ الدَّالَانِيُّ وَعَمْرُو بْنُ قَيْسٍ الْمُلَائِيُّ وَالْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ النَّخَعِيُّ عَنِ الْمِنْهَالِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو «أَمَّا حَدِيثُ أَبِي خَالِدٍ الدَّالَانِيُّ»
chain: Abū ʿAmr Ismāʿīl b. Bujayd b. Aḥmad b. Yūsuf al-Sulamī \u003e Abū Muslim Ibrāhīm b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e Abū ʿAmr al-Ḍarīr \u003e Mahdī b. Maymūn \u003e Yūnus b. Khabbāb \u003e Aḥmad b. Jaʿfar al-Qaṭīʿī \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Aḥmad b. Ḥanbal from my father \u003e ʿAbd al-Razzāq \u003e Maʿmar \u003e Yūnus b. Khabbāb \u003e al-Minhāl b. ʿAmr \u003e Zādhān
chainArabic: وَأَخْبَرَنِي أَبُو عَمْرٍو إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ بُجَيْدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ يُوسُفَ السُّلَمِيُّ أَنْبَأَ أَبُو مُسْلِمٍ إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ثنا أَبُو عَمْرٍو الضَّرِيرُ ثنا مَهْدِيُّ بْنُ مَيْمُونٍ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ خَبَّابٍ وَأَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْقَطِيعِيُّ وَاللَّفْظُ لَهُ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي ثنا عَبْدُ الرَّزَّاقِ أَنْبَأَ مَعْمَرٌ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ خَبَّابٍ عَنِ الْمِنْهَالِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو عَنْ زَاذَانَ عَنِ الْبَرَاءِ بْنِ عَازِبٍ وَفِي حَدِيثِ عَبَّادِ بْنِ عَبَّادٍ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ الْبَرَاءَ بْنَ عَازِبٍ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 115

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: Regarding Minhal bin 'Amr: "And as for the narration of 'Amr bin Qais al-Mula'iyyah"
body: Regarding Minhal bin 'Amr: "And as for the narration of 'Amr bin Qais al-Mula'iyyah"
arabic: عَنِ الْمِنْهَالِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو «وَأَمَّا حَدِيثُ عَمْرِو بْنِ قَيْسٍ الْمُلَائِيُّ»
chain: al-Sarī b. Yaḥyá al-Tamīmī \u003e Abū Ghassān \u003e ʿAbd al-Salām b. Ḥarb \u003e Abū Khālid al-Dālānī
chainArabic: فَحدثنا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ ثنا السَّرِيُّ بْنُ يَحْيَى التَّمِيمِيُّ ثنا أَبُو غَسَّانَ ثنا عَبْدُ السَّلَامِ بْنُ حَرْبٍ ثنا أَبُو خَالِدٍ الدَّالَانِيُّ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 116

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: Concerning Al-Minhāl ibn 'Amr's narration, "As for the hadith of Al-Hasan ibn 'Ubaidillah..."
body: Concerning Al-Minhāl ibn 'Amr's narration, "As for the hadith of Al-Hasan ibn 'Ubaidillah..."
arabic: عَنِ الْمِنْهَالِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو «وَأَمَّا حَدِيثُ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ»
chain: Aḥmad b. Bishr al-Marthadī \u003e al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad b. Abū Shaybah \u003e Abū Khālid al-Aḥmar \u003e ʿAmr b. Qays al-Mulāʾī
chainArabic: فَحَدَّثَنَاهُ أَبُو بَكْرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ بَالَوَيْهِ ثنا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ بِشْرٍ الْمَرْثَدِيُّ ثنا الْقَاسِمُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ ثنا أَبُو خَالِدٍ الْأَحْمَرُ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ قَيْسٍ الْمُلَائِيِّ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 117

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: About the Prophet ﷺ , the narrations that I mentioned, all of them are authentic according to the conditions of the two trustworthy sheikhs.
body: About the Prophet ﷺ , the narrations that I mentioned, all of them are authentic according to the conditions of the two trustworthy sheikhs.
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ نَحْوَهُ هَذِهِ الْأَسَانِيدُ الَّتِي ذَكَرْتُهَا كُلُّهَا صَحِيحَةٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ
chain: Muḥammad b. ʿUthmān b. Abū Shaybah \u003e Aḥmad b. Yūnus \u003e Abū Bakr b. ʿAyyāsh \u003e al-Ḥasan b. ʿUbaydullāh \u003e al-Minhāl \u003e Zādhān \u003e al-Barāʾ
chainArabic: فَحَدَّثَنَاهُ أَبُو مُحَمَّدٍ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْمُزَنِيُّ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ ثنا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ يُونُسَ ثنا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ عَيَّاشٍ ثنا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ عَنِ الْمِنْهَالِ كُلُّهُمْ قَالُوا عَنْ زَاذَانَ عَنِ الْبَرَاءِ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 118

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: While the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and Bilal were walking in al-Baqi', the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "O Bilal, do you hear what I hear?" Bilal replied, "No, by Allah, O Messenger of Allah. I do not hear it." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Do you not hear the punishment of the inhabitants of the graves?" – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: While the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and Bilal were walking in al-Baqi', the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "O Bilal, do you hear what I hear?" Bilal replied, "No, by Allah, O Messenger of Allah. I do not hear it." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Do you not hear the punishment of the inhabitants of the graves?" – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: بَيْنَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ وَبِلَالٌ يَمْشِيَانِ بِالْبَقِيعِ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «يَا بِلَالُ هَلْ تَسْمَعُ مَا أَسْمَعُ؟» قَالَ لَا وَاللَّهِ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ مَا أَسْمَعُهُ قَالَ «أَلَا تَسْمَعُ أَهْلَ الْقُبُورِ يُعَذَّبُونَ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ بِهَذَا اللَّفْظِ إِنَّمَا اتَّفَقَا عَلَى حَدِيثِ شُعْبَةَ» عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ أَنَسٍ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ أَنَّهُ قَالَ «لَوْلَا أَنْ تَدَافَنُوا لَسَأَلْتُ اللَّهَ عَنْهُ أَنْ يُسْمِعَكُمْ عَذَابَ الْقَبْرِ» على شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū Bakr b. Isḥāq al-Faqīh \u003e ʿAlī b. al-Ḥusayn b. al-Junayd \u003e al-Muʿāfá b. Sulaymān al-Ḥarrānī \u003e Fulayḥ b. Sulaymān \u003e Hilāl b. ʿAlī / Ibn Abū Maymūnah \u003e Anas b. Mālik \u003e Baynā
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْفَقِيهُ أَنْبَأَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ الْجُنَيْدِ ثنا الْمُعَافَى بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ الْحَرَّانِيُّ ثنا فُلَيْحُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ حَدَّثَنِي هِلَالُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ وَهُوَ ابْنُ أَبِي مَيْمُونَةَ عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 119

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri entered upon the Messenger of Allah while he was wrapped in a Qatifa (a type of Yemeni garment made of wool) and he placed his hand on it and felt its heat above the Qatifa. Abu Sa'id said, "O Messenger of Allah, your cloak is very hot!" The Messenger of Allah said, "Indeed, we are inflicted with trials in this manner, and our reward is multiplied." Then Abu Sa'id asked, "O Messenger of Allah, who experiences the most severe trials?" The Messenger of Allah replied, "The prophets." Abu Sa'id asked again, "Then who?" He replied, "The scholars." Abu Sa'id asked once more, "Then who?" He replied, "Then the righteous." One of them would be tested with poverty to the extent that he could only find a garment to wear, and another would be tested with lice to the point of killing them. And none of them would be happier with trials than one of you would be with receiving gifts." Abu Al-Abbas narrated this to us from Bahar in the Musnad, and from Ar-Rabi' in Al-Fawaid, and I have combined both narrations. – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: Abu Sa'id Al-Khudri entered upon the Messenger of Allah while he was wrapped in a Qatifa (a type of Yemeni garment made of wool) and he placed his hand on it and felt its heat above the Qatifa. Abu Sa'id said, "O Messenger of Allah, your cloak is very hot!" The Messenger of Allah said, "Indeed, we are inflicted with trials in this manner, and our reward is multiplied." Then Abu Sa'id asked, "O Messenger of Allah, who experiences the most severe trials?" The Messenger of Allah replied, "The prophets." Abu Sa'id asked again, "Then who?" He replied, "The scholars." Abu Sa'id asked once more, "Then who?" He replied, "Then the righteous." One of them would be tested with poverty to the extent that he could only find a garment to wear, and another would be tested with lice to the point of killing them. And none of them would be happier with trials than one of you would be with receiving gifts." Abu Al-Abbas narrated this to us from Bahar in the Musnad, and from Ar-Rabi' in Al-Fawaid, and I have combined both narrations. – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: أَنَّ أَبَا سَعِيدٍ الْخُدْرِيَّ دَخَلَ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ وَهُوَ مَوْعُوكٌ عَلَيْهِ قَطِيفَةٌ وَوَضَعَ يَدَهُ عَلَيْهَا فَوَجَدَ حَرَارَتَهَا فَوْقَ الْقَطِيفَةِ فَقَالَ أَبُو سَعِيدٍ مَا أَشَدَّ حَرَّ حُمَّاكَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ؟ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «إِنَّا كَذَلِكَ يُشَدَّدُ عَلَيْنَا الْبَلَاءُ وَيُضَاعَفُ لَنَا الْأَجْرُ» ثُمَّ قَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ مَنْ أَشَدُّ النَّاسِ بَلَاءً؟ قَالَ «الْأَنْبِيَاءُ» قَالَ ثُمَّ مَنْ؟ قَالَ «الْعُلَمَاءُ» قَالَ ثُمَّ مَنْ؟ قَالَ «ثُمَّ الصَّالِحُونَ» كَانَ أَحَدُهُمْ يُبْتَلَى بِالْفَقْرِ حَتَّى مَا يَجِدُ إِلَّا الْعَبَاءَةَ يَلْبَسُهَا وَيُبْتَلَى بِالْقُمَّلِ حَتَّى تَقْتُلَهُ وَلَأَحَدُهُمْ كَانَ أَشَدَّ فَرَحًا بِالْبَلَاءِ مِنْ أَحَدِكُمْ بِالْعَطَاءِ «حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ عَنْ بَحْرٍ فِي الْمُسْنَدِ وَعَنِ الرَّبِيعِ فِي الْفَوَائِدِ وَأَنَا جَمَعْتُ بَيْنَهُمَا هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ فَقَدِ احْتَجَّ بِهِشَامِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ ثُمَّ لَهُ شَوَاهِدُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَلِحَدِيثِ عَاصِمِ بْنِ بَهْدَلَةَ عَنْ مُصْعَبِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ طُرُقٌ يُتَّبَعُ وَيُذَاكَرُ بِهَا وَقَدْ تَابَعَ الْعَلَاءُ بْنُ الْمُسَيَّبِ عَاصِمَ بْنَ بَهْدَلَةَ عَلَى رِوَايَتِهِ عَنْ مُصْعَبِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ» على شرط مسلم وله شواهد كثيرة – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb \u003e al-Rabīʿ b. Sulaymān al-Murādī And Baḥr b. Naṣr b. Sābiq al-Khawlānī \u003e al-Rabīʿ \u003e Baḥr \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Wahb \u003e Hishām b. Saʿd \u003e Zayd b. Aslam \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. Yasār
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ عَنِ الرَّبِيعِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ الْمُرَادِيِّ وَبَحْرِ بْنِ نَصْرِ بْنِ سَابِقٍ الْخَوْلَانِيِّ قَالَ الرَّبِيعُ حَدَّثَنَا وَقَالَ بَحْرٌ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ وَهْبٍ أَخْبَرَنِي هِشَامُ بْنُ سَعْدٍ عَنْ زَيْدِ بْنِ أَسْلَمَ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 120

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ was asked, "Who are the people who face the most severe trials?" He replied, "The prophets, then those who are most like them, then those who are most like them. When a person has strong faith, they are tested in accordance with their level of faith. And whoever has weak faith, will have weak trials."
body: The Prophet ﷺ was asked, "Who are the people who face the most severe trials?" He replied, "The prophets, then those who are most like them, then those who are most like them. When a person has strong faith, they are tested in accordance with their level of faith. And whoever has weak faith, will have weak trials."
arabic: سُئِلَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ أَيُّ النَّاسِ أَشَدُّ بَلَاءً؟ قَالَ «الْأَنْبِيَاءُ ثُمَّ الْأَمْثَلُ فَالْأَمْثَلُ فَإِذَا كَانَ الرَّجُلُ صُلْبَ الدِّينِ يُبْتَلَى الرَّجُلُ عَلَى قَدْرِ دِينِهِ فَمَنْ ثَخُنَ دِينُهُ ثَخُنَ بَلَاؤُهُ وَمَنْ ضَعُفَ دِينُهُ ضَعُفَ بَلَاؤُهُ» وَ هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَشَاهِدَهُ مَا
chain: Muḥammad b. Ghālib \u003e ʿAmr b. ʿAwn \u003e Khālid b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e al-ʿAlāʾ b. al-Musayyab \u003e Muṣʿab b. Saʿd from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنِيهِ أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْفَقِيهُ فِيمَا قَرَأْتُ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَصْلِ كِتَابِهِ أَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ غَالِبٍ ثنا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَوْنٍ ثنا خَالِدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنِ الْعَلَاءِ بْنِ الْمُسَيَّبِ عَنْ مُصْعَبِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 121

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: “I said: ‘O Messenger of Allah, which people are most severely tested?’ He said: ‘The Prophets, then the next best and the next best. A person is tested according to his religious commitment. If he is steadfast in his religious commitment, he will be tested more severely, and if he is frail in his religious commitment, his test will be according to his commitment. Trials will continue to afflict a person until they leave him walking on the earth with no sin on him.’”
body: “I said: ‘O Messenger of Allah, which people are most severely tested?’ He said: ‘The Prophets, then the next best and the next best. A person is tested according to his religious commitment. If he is steadfast in his religious commitment, he will be tested more severely, and if he is frail in his religious commitment, his test will be according to his commitment. Trials will continue to afflict a person until they leave him walking on the earth with no sin on him.’”
arabic: سَأَلْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ مَنْ أَشَدُّ النَّاسِ بَلَاءً؟ قَالَ «النَّبِيُّونَ ثُمَّ الْأَمْثَلُ فَالْأَمْثَلُ يُبْتَلَى الرَّجُلُ عَلَى حَسَبِ دِينِهِ إِنْ كَانَ صُلْبَ الدِّينِ اشْتَدَّ بَلَاؤُهُ وَإِنْ كَانَ فِي دِينِهِ رِقَّةٌ ابْتُلِيَ عَلَى حَسَبِ دِينِهِ فَمَا يَبْرَحُ الْبَلَاءُ عَلَى الْعَبْدِ حَتَّى يَدَعَهُ يَمْشِي عَلَى الْأَرْضِ لَيْسَ عَلَيْهِ خَطِيئَةٌ»

Salamah And Ḥammād b. Zayd Waʾabān al-ʿAṭṭār [Chain 3] ʿAbdullāh b. al-Ḥusayn al-Qāḍī \u003e al-Ḥārith b. Abū Usāmah \u003e Yazīd b. Mūsá al-Ashyab \u003e Shaybān [Chain 5] Abū al-ʿAbbās al-Maḥbūbī \u003e Aḥmad b. Sayyār \u003e Muḥammad b. Kathīr \u003e Sufyān [Chain 6] Abū ʿAmr b. Abū Saʿīd al-Naḥwī \u003e al-Ḥusayn b. ʿAbdullāh b. Yazīd al-Raqqī \u003e ʿUqbah b. Mukram \u003e Salm b. Qutaybah \u003e Hishām b. Abū ʿAbdullāh [Chain 7] Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Shaybānī \u003e Aḥmad b. Ḥāzim b. Abū Gharazah \u003e Aḥmad b. Yūnus Waʾabū Bakr b. Abū Shaybah \u003e Abū Bakr b. ʿAyyāsh \u003e ʿĀṣim b. Abū al-Najūd \u003e Muṣʿab b. Saʿd b. Abū Waqqāṣ from his father

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 122

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: On the authority of the Prophet ﷺ , he said: "When the appointed term of one of you is near and Allah has granted him a need in a specific land, then when he reaches the furthest extent of his footsteps, he will die. On the Day of Resurrection, the earth will say, 'O Lord, this is what You entrusted to me.' The two trustworthy men, the sheikhs, have attested to the authenticity of this hadith, with their narrators ending with 'Umar ibn Ali al-Muqaddami, which is agreed upon to be included in Sahih Bukhari and Sahih Muslim. Muhammad ibn Khalid al-Wahbi has also followed him in his chain of narration from Isma'il, based on their conditions." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: On the authority of the Prophet ﷺ , he said: "When the appointed term of one of you is near and Allah has granted him a need in a specific land, then when he reaches the furthest extent of his footsteps, he will die. On the Day of Resurrection, the earth will say, 'O Lord, this is what You entrusted to me.' The two trustworthy men, the sheikhs, have attested to the authenticity of this hadith, with their narrators ending with 'Umar ibn Ali al-Muqaddami, which is agreed upon to be included in Sahih Bukhari and Sahih Muslim. Muhammad ibn Khalid al-Wahbi has also followed him in his chain of narration from Isma'il, based on their conditions." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ إِذَا كَانَ أَجَلُ أَحَدِكُمْ بِأَرْضٍ أَثْبَتَ اللَّهُ لَهُ إِلَيْهَا حَاجَةً فَإِذَا بَلَغَ أَقْصَى أَثَرِهِ فَتَوَفَّاهُ فَتَقُولُ الْأَرْضُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ يَا رَبِّ هَذَا مَا اسْتَوْدَعْتَنِي «» قَدِ احْتَجَّ الشَّيْخَانِ بِرُوَاةِ هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ عَنْ آخِرِهِمْ وَعُمَرُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الْمُقَدَّمِيُّ مُتَّفَقٌ عَلَى إِخْرَاجِهِ فِي الصَّحِيحَيْنِ وَقَدْ تَابَعَهُ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ الْوَهْبِيُّ عَلَى سَنَدِهِ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَعلى شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū ʿAlī al-Ḥusayn b. ʿAlī al-Ḥāfiẓ \u003e al-Qāsim b. Zakariyyā al-Muṭarraz al-Muqriʾ \u003e Muḥammad b. Yaḥyá al-Qaṭīʿī \u003e ʿUmar b. ʿAlī al-Muqaddamī \u003e Ismāʿīl b. Abū Khālid \u003e Qays b. Abū Ḥāzim \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Masʿūd
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَلِيٍّ الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الْحَافِظُ ثنا الْقَاسِمُ بْنُ زَكَرِيَّا الْمُطَرَّزُ الْمُقْرِئُ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى الْقَطِيعِيُّ ثنا عُمَرُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الْمُقَدَّمِيُّ ثنا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ أَبِي خَالِدٍ عَنْ قَيْسِ بْنِ أَبِي حَازِمٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 123

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: On the authority of the Prophet ﷺ , he said: "If anyone's buried body is in the ground, and the need of that person arises, he is allowed to be dug up. When the remains are taken out, the earth will say on the Day of Resurrection: 'O Lord, this is what You entrusted me with.' And this hadith is narrated by Hisham from Ismail ibn Abi Khalid."
body: On the authority of the Prophet ﷺ , he said: "If anyone's buried body is in the ground, and the need of that person arises, he is allowed to be dug up. When the remains are taken out, the earth will say on the Day of Resurrection: 'O Lord, this is what You entrusted me with.' And this hadith is narrated by Hisham from Ismail ibn Abi Khalid."
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ إِذَا كَانَتْ مَنِيَّةُ أَحَدِكُمْ بِأَرْضٍ أُتِيحَ لَهُ الْحَاجَةُ فَيَصْعَدُ إِلَيْهَا فَيَكُونُ أَقْصَى أَثَرِهِ مِنْهُ فَيُقْبَضُ فِيهَا فَتَقُولُ الْأَرْضُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ رَبِّ هَذَا مَا اسْتَوْدَعْتَنِي «» وَقَدْ أَسْنَدَهُ هُشَيْمٌ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ أَبِي خَالِدٍ
chain: Abū al-Ḥasan ʿAlī b. al-ʿAbbās al-Iskandarānī al-ʿAdl Bimakkah \u003e Abū Jaʿfar Aḥmad b. Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Wāḥid al-Ḥimṣī \u003e Abū al-Ḥasan Kathīr b. ʿUbayd b. Numayr al-Madhḥijī \u003e Muḥammad b. Khālid al-Wahbī \u003e Ismāʿīl b. Abū Khālid \u003e Qays b. Abū Ḥāzim \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Masʿūd
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو الْحَسَنِ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْعَبَّاسِ الْإِسْكَنْدَرَانِيُّ الْعَدْلُ بِمَكَّةَ ثنا أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْوَاحِدِ الْحِمْصِيُّ ثنا أَبُو الْحَسَنِ كَثِيرُ بْنُ عُبَيْدِ بْنِ نُمَيْرٍ الْمَذْحِجِيُّ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ الْوَهْبِيُّ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ أَبِي خَالِدٍ عَنْ قَيْسِ بْنِ أَبِي حَازِمٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 124

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: From the Prophet ﷺ, he said: "When the term of one of you is near and he is in need of something in the land, Allah will fulfill it for him. Then on the Day of Resurrection, the earth will say, 'O Lord, this is what You entrusted to me.'" This hadith is supported by three trustworthy individuals reporting it from Isma'il, and Sufyan ibn 'Uyaynah also agreed with them. We are adhering to the condition of excluding additional reports from trustworthy sources in the chain of narration, and for this hadith, there are further evidence supporting the condition of the two sheikhs. Among them is...
body: From the Prophet ﷺ, he said: "When the term of one of you is near and he is in need of something in the land, Allah will fulfill it for him. Then on the Day of Resurrection, the earth will say, 'O Lord, this is what You entrusted to me.'" This hadith is supported by three trustworthy individuals reporting it from Isma'il, and Sufyan ibn 'Uyaynah also agreed with them. We are adhering to the condition of excluding additional reports from trustworthy sources in the chain of narration, and for this hadith, there are further evidence supporting the condition of the two sheikhs. Among them is...
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ إِذَا كَانَ أَجَلُ أَحَدِكُمْ بِأَرْضٍ جُعِلَتْ لَهُ إِلَيْهَا حَاجَةٌ فَيُوَفِّيهِ اللَّهُ بِهَا فَتَقُولُ الْأَرْضُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ رَبِّ هَذَا مَا اسْتَوْدَعْتَنِي «» فَقَدْ أَسْنَدَ هَذَا الْحَدِيثَ ثَلَاثَةٌ مِنَ الثِّقَاتِ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ وَوَافَقَهُ عَنْهُ سُفْيَانُ بْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ فَنَحْنُ عَلَى مَا شَرَطْنَا فِي إِخْرَاجِ الزِّيَادَةِ مِنَ الثِّقَةِ فِي الْوَصْلِ وَالسَّنَدِ ثُمَّ لِهَذَا الْحَدِيثِ شَوَاهِدُ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ فَمِنْهَا مَا
chain: my father
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو سَعِيدٍ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ الثَّقَفِيُّ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ الْحَضْرَمِيُّ ثنا مُوسَى بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حِبَّانَ ثنا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ مَهْدِيٍّ عَنْ هُشَيْمٍ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنْ قَيْسٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 125

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: The Prophet Muhammad, peace be upon him, said: "When Allah decrees death for a person in a certain place, He provides for him a need in that place." This is according to the condition of both. – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: The Prophet Muhammad, peace be upon him, said: "When Allah decrees death for a person in a certain place, He provides for him a need in that place." This is according to the condition of both. – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ «إِذَا قَضَى اللَّهُ لِرَجُلٍ مَوْتًا بِبَلْدَةٍ جَعَلَ لَهُ بِهَا حَاجَةً» على شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb \u003e al-ʿAbbās b. Muḥammad al-Dūrī \u003e Qabīṣah b. ʿUqbah \u003e Sufyān
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَاهُ أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ ثنا الْعَبَّاسُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الدُّورِيُّ ثنا قَبِيصَةُ بْنُ عُقْبَةَ ثنا سُفْيَانُ وَأَخْبَرَنِي بُكَيْرُ بْنُ الْحَدَّادِ الصُّوفِيُّ بِمَكَّةَ ثنا أَبُو مُسْلِمٍ ثنا عَبَّادُ بْنُ مُوسَى ثنا سُفْيَانُ وَأَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ وَاللَّفْظُ لَهُ أَنْبَأَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ غَالِبٍ ثنا أَبُو حُذَيْفَةَ ثنا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ عَنْ مَطَرِ بْنِ عُكَامِسَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 126

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Allah has not appointed a man to live on Earth except that He has made for him a need in it."
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Allah has not appointed a man to live on Earth except that He has made for him a need in it."
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «مَا جَعَلَ اللَّهُ أَجَلَ رَجُلٍ بِأَرْضٍ إِلَّا جُعِلَتْ لَهُ فِيهَا حَاجَةٌ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ فَقَدِ اتَّفَقَا جَمِيعًا عَلَى إِخْرَاجِ جَمَاعَةٍ مِنَ الصَّحَابَةِ لَيْسَ لِكُلِّ وَاحِدٍ مِنْهُمْ إِلَّا رَاوٍ وَاحِدٍ وَلَهُ شَاهِدٌ آخَرُ مِنْ رِوَايَةِ الثِّقَاتِ» رواته ثقات
chain: Muḥammad b. Mūsá b. Ḥātim \u003e ʿAlī b. al-Ḥasan b. Shaqīq \u003e Abū Ḥamzah \u003e Abū Isḥāq \u003e Maṭar b. ʿUkāmis al-ʿAbdī
chainArabic: وَحدثنا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ قَاسِمُ بْنُ الْقَاسِمِ السَّيَّارِيُّ بِمَرْوَ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَى بْنِ حَاتِمٍ ثنا عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ شَقِيقٍ ثنا أَبُو حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ عَنْ مَطَرِ بْنِ عُكَامِسٍ الْعَبْدِيِّ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 127

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: "When Allah decrees that a slave (of His) is to die in a land, He makes him have some need from it." Another chain reports a similar narration.
body: "When Allah decrees that a slave (of His) is to die in a land, He makes him have some need from it." Another chain reports a similar narration.
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «إِذَا أَرَادَ اللَّهُ قَبْضَ عَبْدٍ بِأَرْضٍ جَعَلَ لَهُ إِلَيْهَا حَاجَةً» هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ وَرُوَاتُهُ عَنْ آخِرِهِمْ ثِقَاتٌ وَسَمِعْتُ أَبَا الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدَ بْنَ يَعْقُوبَ يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ الْعَبَّاسَ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ الدُّورِيَّ يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ يَحْيَى بْنَ مَعِينٍ يَقُولُ اسْمُ أَبِي عَزَّةَ يَسَارِ بْنِ عَبْدٍ لَهُ صُحْبَةٌ وَأَمَّا أَبُو الْمَلِيحِ فَإِنِّي سَمِعْتُ عَلِيَّ بْنَ عُمَرَ الْحَافِظَ يَقُولُ يَلْزَمُ الْبُخَارِيُّ وَمُسْلِمًا إِخْرَاجُ حَدِيثِ أَبِي الْمَلِيحِ عَنْ أَبِي عَزَّةَ فَقَدِ احْتَجَّ الْبُخَارِيُّ بِحَدِيثِ أَبِي الْمَلِيحِ عَنْ بُرَيْدَةَ وَحَدِيثُ أَبِي عَزَّةَ رَوَاهُ جَمَاعَةٌ مِنَ الثِّقَاتِ الْحُفَّاظِ
chain: my father
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أَحْمَدَ بَكْرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الصَّيْرَفِيُّ ثنا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْقَاضِي ثنا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ وَحَدَّثَنِي بَكْرُ بْنُ الْحَدَّادِ بِمَكَّةَ ثنا أَبُو مُسْلِمٍ ثنا حَجَّاجُ بْنُ الْمِنْهَالِ قَالَا ثنا حَمَّادٌ ثنا أَيُّوبُ وَأَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْقَطِيعِيُّ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي ثنا إِسْمَاعِيلُ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ عَنْ أَبِي الْمَلِيحِ عَنْ أَبِي عَزَّةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 128

chapter.englishTitle: The narration of Ma'mar

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The believer is honorable and generous, while the sinner is hypocritical and contemptible." This was narrated by Ibn Shihab, 'Abd Rabih ibn Nafi‘ al-Hannat and Yahya ibn al-Durays from al-Thawri during his stay. Hajjaj ibn Abid is acceptable.
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The believer is honorable and generous, while the sinner is hypocritical and contemptible." This was narrated by Ibn Shihab, 'Abd Rabih ibn Nafi‘ al-Hannat and Yahya ibn al-Durays from al-Thawri during his stay. Hajjaj ibn Abid is acceptable.
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «الْمُؤْمِنُ غِرٌّ كَرِيمٌ وَالْفَاجِرُ خِبٌّ لَئِيمٌ» تَابَعَهُ ابْنُ شِهَابٍ عَبْدُ رَبِّهِ بْنُ نَافِعٍ الْحَنَّاطُ وَيَحْيَى بْنُ الضُّرَيْسِ عَنِ الثَّوْرِيِّ فِي إِقَامَتِهِ هَذَا الْإِسْنَادِحجاج عابد لا بأس به
chain: Abū al-Ḥasan Aḥmad b. Muḥammad al-ʿAnbarī \u003e ʿUthmān b. Saʿīd al-Dārimī \u003e Abū al-Ṭīb Ṭāhir b. Yaḥyá al-Bayhaqī Bihā from Aṣl Kitābih \u003e Khālī al-Faḍl b. Muḥammad al-Shaʿrānī \u003e Aḥmad b. Janāb al-Miṣṣīṣī \u003e ʿĪsá b. Yūnus \u003e Sufyān al-Thawrī \u003e al-Ḥajjāj b. Furāfiṣah \u003e Yaḥyá b. Abū Kathīr \u003e Abū Salamah \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْحَسَنِ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْعَنْبَرِيُّ ثنا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ الدَّارِمِيُّ وَحَدَّثَنِي أَبُو الطِّيبِ طَاهِرُ بْنُ يَحْيَى الْبَيْهَقِيُّ بِهَا مِنْ أَصْلِ كِتَابِهِ ثنا خَالِي الْفَضْلُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الشَّعْرَانِيُّ قَالَا ثنا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ جَنَابٍ الْمِصِّيصِيُّ ثنا عِيسَى بْنُ يُونُسَ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ الثَّوْرِيِّ عَنِ الْحَجَّاجِ بْنِ فُرَافِصَةَ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي كَثِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 129

chapter.englishTitle: As for the saying of Abu Shihab

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The believer is noble and generous, while the sinful one is humble and contemptible." As for the narration of Yahya ibn Dhirays, Muhammad ibn Humayd differs from it.
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The believer is noble and generous, while the sinful one is humble and contemptible." As for the narration of Yahya ibn Dhirays, Muhammad ibn Humayd differs from it.
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «الْمُؤْمِنُ غِرٌّ كَرِيمٌ وَالْفَاجِرُ خِبٌّ لَئِيمٌ» وَأَمَّا حَدِيثُ يَحْيَى بْنِ الضُّرَيْسِ فَدُونَهُ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ هَذَا حَدِيثٌ وَصَلَهُ الْمُتَقَدِّمُونَ مِنْ أَصْحَابِ الثَّوْرِيِّ وَأَفْسَدَهُ الْمُتَأَخِّرُونَ عَنْهُ وَأَمَّا الْحَجَّاجُ بْنُ فُرَافِصَةَ فَإِنَّ الْإِمَامَيْنِ لَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ لَكِنِّي سَمِعْتُ أَبَا الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدَ بْنَ يَعْقُوبَ يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ الْعَبَّاسَ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ الدُّورِيَّ يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ يَحْيَى بْنَ مَعِينٍ يَقُولُ الْحَجَّاجُ بْنُ فُرَافِصَةَ لَا بَأْسَ بِهِ وَقَالَ عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ أَبِي حَاتِمٍ سَمِعْتُ أَبِي يَقُولُ حَجَّاجُ بْنُ فُرَافِصَةَ شَيْخٌ صَالِحٌ مُتَعَبِّدٌ وَلَهُ شَاهِدٌ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي كَثِيرٍ أَقَامَ إِسْنَادَهُ
chain: Abū Bakr Yaʿqūb b. Yūsuf al-Muṭṭawiʿī \u003e Abū Dāwud Sulaymān b. Muḥammad al-Mubārakī \u003e Abū Shihāb \u003e Sufyān al-Thawrī \u003e al-Ḥajjāj b. Furāfiṣah \u003e Yaḥyá b. Abū Kathīr \u003e Abū Salamah \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: فَحَدَّثَنَاهُ أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ ثنا أَبُو بَكْرٍ يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ الْمُطَّوِعِيُّ بِبَغْدَادَ ثنا أَبُو دَاوُدَ سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْمُبَارَكِيُّ ثنا أَبُو شِهَابٍ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ الثَّوْرِيِّ عَنِ الْحَجَّاجِ بْنِ فُرَافِصَةَ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي كَثِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 130

chapter.englishTitle: As for the saying of Abu Shihab

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said: The believer is simple and generous, but the profligate is deceitful and ignoble.
body: The Prophet ﷺ said: The believer is simple and generous, but the profligate is deceitful and ignoble.
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «الْمُؤْمِنُ غِرٌّ كَرِيمٌ وَالْفَاجِرُ خِبٌّ لَئِيمٌ»
chain: Abū ʿAbdullāh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī b. ʿAbd al-Ḥamīd al-Ṣanʿānī Bimakkah \u003e Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm b. ʿAbbād \u003e ʿAbd al-Razzāq \u003e Bishr b. Rāfiʿ \u003e Yaḥyá b. Abū Kathīr \u003e Abū Salamah \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَاهُ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْحَمِيدِ الصَّنْعَانِيُّ بِمَكَّةَ ثنا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ عَبَّادٍ ثنا عَبْدُ الرَّزَّاقِ حَدَّثَنِي بِشْرُ بْنُ رَافِعٍ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي كَثِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 131

chapter.englishTitle: As for the saying of Abu Shihab

englishRaw: To read to him and his son the book of instructions, I said, "When I go to Mina, I will tell you." So when I went to Mina, I took my book and told him. Then I went to Mecca for a visit, where I met Abu Usama who said to me, "O Yamani, that boy from Rawas deceived you." I said, "How did he deceive me?" He said, "You took your book to him and told him." I said, "It's not surprising that he deceived me." Barth narrated to me from Yahya bin Abi Kathir from Abu Salama from Abu Hurayrah who said that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The believer is simple and generous while the evildoer is deceitful and ignoble." He then took out the singular narration and said, "Dictate to me." I said, "By Allah, I will not dictate it to you." So he left. I heard Ali bin Isa saying, "I heard Husayn bin Muhammad bin Ziyad saying, 'I heard Muhammad bin Yahya saying, 'Abu al-Asbat al-Harithi is Bashr bin Rafi'.''"
body: To read to him and his son the book of instructions, I said, "When I go to Mina, I will tell you." So when I went to Mina, I took my book and told him. Then I went to Mecca for a visit, where I met Abu Usama who said to me, "O Yamani, that boy from Rawas deceived you." I said, "How did he deceive me?" He said, "You took your book to him and told him." I said, "It's not surprising that he deceived me." Barth narrated to me from Yahya bin Abi Kathir from Abu Salama from Abu Hurayrah who said that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The believer is simple and generous while the evildoer is deceitful and ignoble." He then took out the singular narration and said, "Dictate to me." I said, "By Allah, I will not dictate it to you." So he left. I heard Ali bin Isa saying, "I heard Husayn bin Muhammad bin Ziyad saying, 'I heard Muhammad bin Yahya saying, 'Abu al-Asbat al-Harithi is Bashr bin Rafi'.''"
arabic: أَنْ أَقْرَأَ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَى ابْنِهِ كِتَابَ الْوَصَايَا فَقُلْتُ إِذَا صِرْتُ بِمِنًى حَدَّثْتُ فَلَمَّا صِرْتُ بِمِنًى حَمَلْتُ كِتَابِي فَحَدَّثْتُهُ ثُمَّ ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مَكَّةَ لِلزِّيَارَةِ فَلَقِيَنِي أَبُو أُسَامَةَ فَقَالَ لِي يَا يَمَانِيُّ خَدَعَكَ ذَاكَ الْغُلَامُ الرُّوَاسِيُّ فَقُلْتُ مَا خَدَعَنِي؟ قَالَ حَمَلْتَ إِلَيْهِ كِتَابِكَ فَحَدَّثْتَهُ فَقُلْتُ لَيْسَ بِعَجَبٍ أَنْ يَخْدَعَنِي حَدَّثَنِي بِشْرُ بْنُ رَافِعٍ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي كَثِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «الْمُؤْمِنُ غِرٌّ كَرِيمٌ وَالْفَاجِرُ خِبٌّ لَئِيمٌ» قَالَ فَأَخْرَجَ الْوَاحِدَ فَقَالَ أَمْلِ عَلَيَّ فَقُلْتُ وَاللَّهِ لَا أُمْلِيهِ عَلَيْكَ فَذَهَبَ سَمِعْتُ عَلِيَّ بْنَ عِيسَى يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ الْحُسَيْنَ بْنَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ مُحَمَّدَ بْنَ يَحْيَى يَقُولُ أَبُو الْأَسْبَاطِ الْحَارِثِيُّ هُوَ بِشْرُ بْنُ رَافِعٍ قَالَ الْحَاكِمُ «بِشْرُ بْنُ رَافِعٍ إِنَّمَا ذَكَرْتُهُ شَاهِدًا وَقَدْ أَلَانَ مَشَايِخُنَا الْقَوْلَ فِيهِ وَقَدْ وَجَدْتُ لَهُ شَاهِدًا آخَرَ مِنْ حَدِيثِ خَارِجَةَ»
chain: Abū Saʿīd b. Abū Bakr b. Abū ʿUthmān \u003e al-Imām Abū Bakr Muḥammad b. Isḥāq \u003e Aḥmad b. Yūsuf al-Sulamī \u003e ʿAbd al-Razzāq
chainArabic: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا سَعِيدِ بْنَ أَبِي بَكْرِ بْنِ أَبِي عُثْمَانَ يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ الْإِمَامَ أَبَا بَكْرٍ مُحَمَّدَ بْنَ إِسْحَاقَ يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ أَحْمَدَ بْنَ يُوسُفَ السُّلَمِيَّ يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَ الرَّزَّاقِ يَقُولُ كُنْتُ بِمَكَّةَ فَكَلَّمَنِي وَكِيعُ بْنُ الْجَرَّاحِ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 132

chapter.englishTitle: As for the saying of Abu Shihab

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said: The believer is simple and generous, but the profligate is deceitful and ignoble.
body: The Prophet ﷺ said: The believer is simple and generous, but the profligate is deceitful and ignoble.
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «الْمُؤْمِنُ غِرٌّ كَرِيمٌ وَالْفَاجِرُ خِبٌّ لَئِيمٌ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ تَدَاوَلَهُ الْأَئِمَّةُ بِالرِّوَايَةِ وَأَقَامَ بَعْضُ الرُّوَاةِ إِسْنَادَهُ أَمَا الشَّيْخَانِ فَإِنَّهُمَا لَمْ يَحْتَجَّا بِالْحَجَّاجِ بْنِ فُرَافِصَةَ وَلَا بِبِشْرِ بْنِ رَافِعٍ»
chain: Abū Bakr b. Isḥāq al-Faqīh \u003e Ismāʿīl b. Qutaybah \u003e Yaḥyá \u003e Khārijah \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Ḥusayn b. ʿAṭāʾ \u003e Abū al-Asbāṭ al-Ḥārithī \u003e Yaḥyá b. Abū Kathīr \u003e Abū Salamah \u003e Abū Hurayrah \u003e Qāl Rasūl
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْفَقِيهُ أَنْبَأَ إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ قُتَيْبَةَ ثنا يَحْيَى أَنْبَأَ خَارِجَةُ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ حُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَطَاءٍ عَنْ أَبِي الْأَسْبَاطِ الْحَارِثِيِّ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي كَثِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 133

chapter.englishTitle: As for the saying of Abu Shihab

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah, peace be upon him, said: "Whoever kills a person who has a treaty with the Muslims unjustly, his smell will not reach Paradise, even though its fragrance can be smelled from a distance of five hundred years of travel." – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: The Messenger of Allah, peace be upon him, said: "Whoever kills a person who has a treaty with the Muslims unjustly, his smell will not reach Paradise, even though its fragrance can be smelled from a distance of five hundred years of travel." – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ «مَنْ قَتَلَ نَفْسًا مُعَاهَدَةً بِغَيْرِ حَقِّهَا لَمْ يَجِدْ رَائِحَةَ الْجَنَّةِ وَإِنَّ رَائِحَتَهَا تُوجَدُ مِنْ مَسِيرَةِ خَمْسِمِائَةِ عَامٍ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ وَقَدْ وَجَدْنَا لِحَمَّادِ بْنِ سَلَمَةَ شَاهِدًا فِيهِ» على شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb \u003e Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Warrāq And Laqabuh Ḥamdān \u003e Abū Salamah Mūsá b. Ismāʿīl \u003e Ḥammād b. Salamah \u003e Yūnus b. ʿUbayd \u003e al-Ḥasan \u003e Abū Bakrah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ ثنا أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الْوَرَّاقُ وَلَقَبُهُ حَمْدَانُ ثنا أَبُو سَلَمَةَ مُوسَى بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ ثنا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ ثنا يُونُسُ بْنُ عُبَيْدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ أَبِي بَكْرَةَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 134

chapter.englishTitle: As for the saying of Abu Shihab

englishRaw: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying, "Whoever kills a person who has a treaty with the Muslims, unjustly, Allah has made Paradise forbidden for him. The smell of its fragrance can be found from a distance of five hundred years." As for the saying of Yunus bin Ubaid on behalf of Al-Hakam bin Al-Araj
body: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying, "Whoever kills a person who has a treaty with the Muslims, unjustly, Allah has made Paradise forbidden for him. The smell of its fragrance can be found from a distance of five hundred years." As for the saying of Yunus bin Ubaid on behalf of Al-Hakam bin Al-Araj
arabic: سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ «مَنْ قَتَلَ نَفْسًا مُعَاهَدَةً بِغَيْرِ حَقِّهَا حَرَّمَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ الْجَنَّةَ أَنْ يَشُمَّ رِيحَهَا وَرِيحُهَا يُوجَدُ مِنْ مَسِيرَةِ خَمْسِمِائَةِ عَامٍ» وَأَمَّا قَوْلُ مَنْ قَالَ يُونُسُ بْنُ عُبَيْدٍ عَنْ الْحَكَمِ بْنِ الْأَعْرَجِ
chain: Abū Isḥāq Ibrāhīm b. Muḥammad b. Yaḥyá \u003e Muḥammad b. Ḥamdūn b. Ziyād \u003e Abū Yūsuf Yaʿqūb b. Isḥāq al-Qulūsī \u003e Sharīk b. al-Khaṭṭāb al-ʿAnbarī \u003e Yūnus b. ʿUbayd \u003e al-Ḥasan \u003e Abū Bakrah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو إِسْحَاقَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ يَحْيَى ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حَمْدُونَ بْنِ زِيَادٍ ثنا أَبُو يُوسُفَ يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْقُلُوسِيُّ ثنا شَرِيكُ بْنُ الْخَطَّابِ الْعَنْبَرِيُّ ثنا يُونُسُ بْنُ عُبَيْدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ أَبِي بَكْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 135
