chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَاهُ إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفَضْلِ الشَّعْرَانِيُّ ثنا جَدِّي ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ صَالِحٍ حَدَّثَنِي حَرْمَلَةُ بْنُ عِمْرَانَ التُّجِيبِيُّ أَنَّ أَبَا السِّمْطِ سَعِيدَ بْنَ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ الْمَهْرِيَّ حَدَّثَهُ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُمَرَ أَنَّ مُعَاذَ بْنَ جَبَلٍ أَرَادَ سَفَرًا فَقَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 180

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: "He who commits a sin and then repents from it, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, 'O Allah, if You forgive, forgive abundantly, for there is no servant of Yours who does not sin.'" – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: "He who commits a sin and then repents from it, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, 'O Allah, if You forgive, forgive abundantly, for there is no servant of Yours who does not sin.'" – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: هُوَأَنْ يَأْتِيَ الرَّجُلُ الْفَاحِشَةَ ثُمَّ يَتُوبُ مِنْهَا قَالَ وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ تَغْفِرْ تَغْفِرْ جَمَّا وَأَيُّ عَبْدٍ لَكَ لَا أَلَمَّا؟» هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ وَإِنَّمَا خَرَّجَا حَدِيثَ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ طَاوُسٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ أَنَّهُ قَالَ لَمْ أَرَ شَيْئًا أَقْرَبَ بِاللَّمَمِ مِنَ الَّذِي قَالَ أَبُو هُرَيْرَةَ كُتِبَ عَلَى ابْنِ آدَمَ حَظُّهُ مِنَ الزِّنَا الْحَدِيثَ وَالَّذِي عِنْدِي أَنَّهُمَا تَرَكَا حَدِيثَ عَمْرِو بْنِ دِينَارٍ لِلْحَدِيثِ الَّذِي على شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb \u003e Muḥammad b. Sinān al-Qazzāz \u003e Abū ʿĀṣim \u003e Zakariyyā b. Isḥāq \u003e ʿAmr b. Dīnār \u003e ʿAṭāʾ \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās al--Adhīn Yajtanibūn Kabāʾir al-Ithm And al-Fawāḥish al-Njm 32 \u003e Huwaʾan Yaʾtī al-a man al-Fāḥishah Thum Yatūb Minhā
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سِنَانٍ الْقَزَّازُ ثنا أَبُو عَاصِمٍ ثنا زَكَرِيَّا بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ دِينَارٍ عَنْ عَطَاءٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ {الَّذِينَ يَجْتَنِبُونَ كَبَائِرَ الْإِثْمِ وَالْفَوَاحِشَ} [النجم 32] قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 181

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The one who acknowledges their sin and then leaves it behind, don't you hear the words of the poet [in Al-Bahr Al-Rajz]: "If you forgive, O Allah, you forgive a multitude, And no servant is like You, when he doesn't sin." And this narration does not weaken the first evidence, as Zakariya ibn Ishaq is a trustworthy and reliable narrator, and Rawh ibn Ubada narrated from Zakariya. And I have mentioned in the conditions of this book the exclusion of interpretations from the companions.
body: The one who acknowledges their sin and then leaves it behind, don't you hear the words of the poet [in Al-Bahr Al-Rajz]: "If you forgive, O Allah, you forgive a multitude, And no servant is like You, when he doesn't sin." And this narration does not weaken the first evidence, as Zakariya ibn Ishaq is a trustworthy and reliable narrator, and Rawh ibn Ubada narrated from Zakariya. And I have mentioned in the conditions of this book the exclusion of interpretations from the companions.
arabic: الَّذِي يُلِمُّ بِالذَّنْبِ ثُمَّ يَدَعُهُ أَلَمْ تَسْمَعْ قَوْلَ الشَّاعِرِ [البحر الرجز] إِنْ تَغْفِرِ اللَّهُمَّ تَغْفِرْ جَمَّا وَأَيُّ عَبْدٍ لَكَ لَا أَلَمَّا « » وَهَذَا التَّوْقِيفُ لَا يُوهِنُ السَّنَدَ الْأَوَّلَ فَإِنَّ زَكَرِيَّا بْنَ إِسْحَاقَ حَافِظٌ ثِقَةٌ وَقَدْ حَدَّثَ بِهِ رَوْحُ بْنُ عُبَادَةَ عَنْ زَكَرِيَّا وَقَدْ ذَكَرْتُ فِي شَرَائِطِ هَذَا الْكِتَابِ إِخْرَاجُ التَّفَاسِيرِ عَنْ الصَّحَابَةِ
chain: ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. al-Ḥasan al-Qāḍī \u003e Ibrāhīm b. al-Ḥusayn \u003e Ādam b. Abū Iyās \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Abū Bakr b. Isḥāq \u003e Muḥammad b. Ghālib \u003e ʿAffān b. Muslim \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e Manṣūr \u003e Mujāhid \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَاهُ عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الْقَاضِي ثنا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ثنا آدَمُ بْنُ أَبِي إِيَاسٍ ثنا شُعْبَةُ وَأَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ أَنْبَأَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ غَالِبٍ ثنا عَفَّانُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ ثنا شُعْبَةُ ثنا مَنْصُورٌ عَنْ مُجَاهِدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ فِي هَذِهِ الْآيَةِ {إِلَّا اللِّمَمَ} [النجم 32] قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 182

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "All my Ummah (followers) will enter Paradise except those who refuse." They asked, "Who would refuse, O Messenger of Allah?" He replied, "Those who disobey me, they are the ones who refuse." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "All my Ummah (followers) will enter Paradise except those who refuse." They asked, "Who would refuse, O Messenger of Allah?" He replied, "Those who disobey me, they are the ones who refuse." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ «كُلُّ أُمَّتِي يَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ إِلَّا مَنْ أَبَى» قَالُوا وَمَنْ يَأْبَى يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ؟ قَالَ «مَنْ عَصَانِي فَقَدْ أَبَى» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ وَلَهُ إِسْنَادٌ آخَرُ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ عَلَى شَرْطِهِمَا» على شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Aḥmad b. Jaʿfar al-Qaṭīʿī \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Aḥmad b. Ḥanbal from my father \u003e Surayj b. al-Nuʿmān \u003e Fulayḥ b. Sulaymān \u003e Hilāl b. ʿAlī \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. Yasār \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْقَطِيعِيُّ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي ثنا سُرَيْجُ بْنُ النُّعْمَانِ ثنا فُلَيْحُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ هِلَالِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 183

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "You will not enter Paradise except those who refuse and wander astray from the path of Allah, like the stray camel." And he has another witness from Abu Umamah Al-Bahili.
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "You will not enter Paradise except those who refuse and wander astray from the path of Allah, like the stray camel." And he has another witness from Abu Umamah Al-Bahili.
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «لَتَدْخُلُنَّ الْجَنَّةَ إِلَّا مَنْ أَبَى وَشَرَدَ عَلَى اللَّهِ كَشِرَادِ الْبَعِيرِ» وَلَهُ شَاهِدٌ أَيْضًا عَنْ أَبِي أُمَامَةَ الْبَاهِلِيِّ
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Aḥmad b. Ḥanbal from my father \u003e Yaʿqūb b. Ibrāhīm b. Saʿd from my father \u003e Ṣāliḥ b. Kaysān \u003e al-Aʿraj \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرْنَاهُ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي ثنا يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ سَعْدٍ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي عَنْ صَالِحِ بْنِ كَيْسَانَ عَنِ الْأَعْرَجِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 184

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: Ali heard a word from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , so he said, "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying, 'All of you will enter Paradise except for those who transgress against Allah like the wandering camel against its people.'" Al-Dhahabi remained silent about it in his summary. – Remains Silent
body: Ali heard a word from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , so he said, "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying, 'All of you will enter Paradise except for those who transgress against Allah like the wandering camel against its people.'" Al-Dhahabi remained silent about it in his summary. – Remains Silent
arabic: عَنْ أَلْيَنِ كَلِمَةٍ سَمِعَهَا مِنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ فَقَالَ سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ «كُلُّكُمْ يَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ إِلَّا مَنْ شَرَدَ عَلَى اللَّهِ شِرَادَ الْبَعِيرِ عَلَى أَهْلِهِ» سكت عنه الذهبي في التلخيص – سكت عنه
chain: Aḥmad b. Ibrāhīm b. Milḥān \u003e Yaḥyá b. Bukayr \u003e al-Layth \u003e Saʿīd b. Abū Hilāl \u003e Abū Khālid \u003e Mar Abū Umāmah al-Bāhilī \u003e Khālid b. Yazīd b. Muʿāwiyah Fasaʾalah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرْنَاهُ أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ ثنا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ مِلْحَانَ ثنا يَحْيَى بْنُ بُكَيْرٍ حَدَّثَنِي اللَّيْثُ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ أَبِي هِلَالٍ عَنْ أَبِي خَالِدٍ قَالَ مَرَّ أَبُو أُمَامَةَ الْبَاهِلِيُّ عَلَى خَالِدِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ بْنِ مُعَاوِيَةَ فَسَأَلَهُ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 185

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said, "Verily, Allah has one hundred portions of mercy, of which He has distributed one portion among His creation in this world. Through this small portion, His creatures experience love, kindness, and mercy. Allah has kept ninety-nine portions of mercy for the Day of Resurrection, where He will shower His beloved servants with His immense mercy." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: The Prophet ﷺ said, "Verily, Allah has one hundred portions of mercy, of which He has distributed one portion among His creation in this world. Through this small portion, His creatures experience love, kindness, and mercy. Allah has kept ninety-nine portions of mercy for the Day of Resurrection, where He will shower His beloved servants with His immense mercy." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ «إِنَّ لِلَّهِ مِائَةَ رَحْمَةٍ قَسَمَ مِنْهَا رَحْمَةً بَيْنَ أَهْلِ الدُّنْيَا فَوَسِعَتْهُمْ إِلَى آجَالِهِمْ وَأَخَّرَ تِسْعَةً وَتِسْعِينَ لِأَوْلِيَائِهِ وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ ﷻ قَابِضٌ تِلْكَ الرَّحْمَةَ الَّتِي قَسَمَهَا بَيْنَ أَهْلِ الدُّنْيَا إِلَى تِسْعٍ وَتِسْعِينَ فَكَمَّلَهَا مِائَةَ رَحْمَةٍ لِأَوْلِيَائِهِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ بِهَذَا اللَّفْظِ إِنَّمَا اتَّفَقَا فِيهِ عَلَى حَدِيثِ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ حُمَيْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ وَسُلَيْمَانَ التَّيْمِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عُثْمَانَ عَنْ سَلْمَانَ مُخْتَصَرًا ثُمَّ أَخْرَجَهُ مُسْلِمٌ مِنْ حَدِيثِ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ بْنِ أَبِي سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ أَبِي رَبَاحٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ أَكْمَلَ مِنَ الْحَدِيثَيْنِ وَلَهُ شَاهِدٌ عَلَى نَسَقِ حَدِيثِ عَوْفٍ» على شرطهما وأخرجا منه – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. Ṣāliḥ b. Hāniʾ \u003e al-Ḥasan b. al-Faḍl al-Bajalī \u003e Hawdhah b. Khalīfah \u003e ʿAwf \u003e Muḥammad b. Sīrīn And Khilās \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ صَالِحِ بْنِ هَانِئٍ حَدَّثَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ الْفَضْلِ الْبَجَلِيُّ ثنا هَوْذَةُ بْنُ خَلِيفَةَ ثنا عَوْفٌ حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سِيرِينَ وَخِلَاسٌ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 186

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: On the authority of the Prophet ﷺ , he said, "Verily, Allah created on the day He created the heavens and the earth one hundred mercies. Each mercy encompasses the heavens and the earth. He distributed one mercy among all of His creation and kept ninety-nine mercies for Himself. On the Day of Judgment, He will restore this mercy, and thus it will become one hundred mercies, by which He will have mercy upon His servants." Another commentator, Jundub ibn Abdullah, also attested to this. Al-Dhahabi did not mention it in his summary. – Remains Silent
body: On the authority of the Prophet ﷺ , he said, "Verily, Allah created on the day He created the heavens and the earth one hundred mercies. Each mercy encompasses the heavens and the earth. He distributed one mercy among all of His creation and kept ninety-nine mercies for Himself. On the Day of Judgment, He will restore this mercy, and thus it will become one hundred mercies, by which He will have mercy upon His servants." Another commentator, Jundub ibn Abdullah, also attested to this. Al-Dhahabi did not mention it in his summary. – Remains Silent
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ «إِنَّ اللَّهَ خَلَقَ يَوْمَ خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ مِائَةَ رَحْمَةٍ كُلُّ رَحْمَةٍ طِبَاقُهَا طِبَاقُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ فَقَسَمَ رَحْمَةً بَيْنَ جَمِيعِ الْخَلَائِقِ وَأَخَّرَ تِسْعَةً وَتِسْعِينَ رَحْمَةً لِنَفْسِهِ فَإِذَا كَانَ يَوْمُ الْقِيَامَةِ رَدَّ هَذِهِ الرَّحْمَةَ فَصَارَ مِائَةَ رَحْمَةٍ يَرْحَمُ بِهَا عِبَادَهُ» وَلَهُ شَاهِدٌ آخَرُ مُفَسَّرٌ عَنْ جُنْدُبِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِسكت عنه الذهبي في التلخيص – سكت عنه
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās ʿAbdullāh b. al-Ḥusayn al-Qāḍī Bimarw \u003e al-Ḥārith b. Abū Usāmah \u003e Yazīd b. Hārūn \u003e al-Ḥajjāj b. Abū Zaynab \u003e Abū ʿUthmān al-Nahdī \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ الْقَاضِي بِمَرْوَ ثنا الْحَارِثُ بْنُ أَبِي أُسَامَةَ ثنا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ أَنْبَأَ الْحَجَّاجُ بْنُ أَبِي زَيْنَبَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عُثْمَانَ النَّهْدِيَّ يُحَدِّثُ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 187

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: An Arab came with his camel. He tied its reins and then secured it. He prayed behind the Messenger of Allah ﷺ . When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ finished his prayer, the man went to his camel, removed its reins, and mounted it. Then he called out, "O Allah, have mercy on me and Muhammad and do not include anyone else in Your mercy." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "What are you saying? Is he (the camel) more misguided or you?" They replied, "We heard what he said." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Indeed, mercy is vast. Allah has created one hundred mercies, and He has sent down only one of them for His creation. Through this mercy, creatures show compassion to one another, including jinn, humans, and animals. Ninety-nine mercies remain with Allah. Do you consider him more misguided or you?"
body: An Arab came with his camel. He tied its reins and then secured it. He prayed behind the Messenger of Allah ﷺ . When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ finished his prayer, the man went to his camel, removed its reins, and mounted it. Then he called out, "O Allah, have mercy on me and Muhammad and do not include anyone else in Your mercy." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "What are you saying? Is he (the camel) more misguided or you?" They replied, "We heard what he said." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Indeed, mercy is vast. Allah has created one hundred mercies, and He has sent down only one of them for His creation. Through this mercy, creatures show compassion to one another, including jinn, humans, and animals. Ninety-nine mercies remain with Allah. Do you consider him more misguided or you?"
arabic: جَاءَ أَعْرَابِيٌّ فَأَنَاخَ رَاحِلَتَهُ ثُمَّ عَقَلَهَا فَصَلَّى خَلْفَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ فَلَمَّا سَلَّمَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ أَتَى رَاحِلَتَهُ فَأَطْلَقَ عِقَالَهَا ثُمَّ رَكِبَهَا ثُمَّ نَادَى اللَّهُمَّ ارْحَمْنِي وَمُحَمَّدًا وَلَا تُشْرِكْ فِي رَحْمَتِنَا أَحَدًا فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «مَا تَقُولُونَ أَهُوَ أَضَلُّ أَمْ بَعِيرُهُ؟ أَلَمْ تَسْمَعُوا مَا قَالَ؟» قَالُوا بَلَى فَقَالَ «لَقَدْ حَظَّرَ رَحْمَةً وَاسِعَةً إِنَّ اللَّهَ خَلَقَ مِائَةَ رَحْمَةٍ فَأَنْزَلَ رَحْمَةً تَعَاطَفَ بِهَا الْخَلَائِقُ جِنُّهَا وَإِنْسُهَا وَبَهَائِمُهَا وَعِنْدَهُ تِسْعَةٌ وَتِسْعُونَ تَقُولُونَ أَهُوَ أَضَلُّ أَمْ بَعِيرُهُ؟»
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb \u003e al-ʿAbbās b. Muḥammad al-Dūrī \u003e ʿAbd al-Ṣamad b. ʿAbd al-Wārith from my father \u003e al-Jurayrī \u003e Abū ʿAbdullāh al-Jisrī \u003e Jundub
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ ثنا الْعَبَّاسُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الدُّورِيُّ ثنا عَبْدُ الصَّمَدِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْوَارِثِ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي حَدَّثَنِي الْجُرَيْرِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْجِسْرِيِّ ثنا جُنْدُبٌ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 188

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: Ibn Abbas reported that one of them (the narrators) raised him to the Prophet ﷺ and said, "Verily, Gabriel used to put clay in the mouth of Pharaoh for fear that he would say, 'There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah'."
body: Ibn Abbas reported that one of them (the narrators) raised him to the Prophet ﷺ and said, "Verily, Gabriel used to put clay in the mouth of Pharaoh for fear that he would say, 'There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah'."
arabic: عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ رَفَعَهُ أَحَدُهُمَا إِلَى النَّبِيِّ ﷺ «إِنَّ جَبْرَائِيلَ كَانَ يَدُسُّ فِي فَمِ فِرْعَونَ الطِّينَ مَخَافَةَ أَنْ يَقُولَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ»
chain: Aḥmad b. Jaʿfar al-Qaṭīʿī \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Aḥmad b. Ḥanbal from my father \u003e Muḥammad b. Jaʿfar \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿAdī b. Thābit And ʿAṭāʾ b. al-Sāʾib \u003e Saʿīd b. Jubayr
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْقَطِيعِيُّ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ ثنا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ عَدِيِّ بْنِ ثَابِتٍ وَعَطَاءِ بْنِ السَّائِبِ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 189

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: "'Adi bin Thabit and 'Ata bin As-Sa'ib informed me, from Sa'eed bin Jubair, from Ibn 'Abbas - and one of them mentioned that it was from the Prophet ﷺ - that he mentioned that Jibra'il began shoving clay in the mouth of Fir'awn out of fear that he would say La Ilaha Illallah and Allah would have mercy upon him - or fearing that Allah would have mercy upon him."  – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: "'Adi bin Thabit and 'Ata bin As-Sa'ib informed me, from Sa'eed bin Jubair, from Ibn 'Abbas - and one of them mentioned that it was from the Prophet ﷺ - that he mentioned that Jibra'il began shoving clay in the mouth of Fir'awn out of fear that he would say La Ilaha Illallah and Allah would have mercy upon him - or fearing that Allah would have mercy upon him."  – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ أَنَّهُ ذَكَرَ أَنَّ جَبْرَئِيلَ جَعَلَ يَدُسُّ فِي فَمِ فِرْعَونَ الطِّينَ خَشْيَةَ أَنْ يَقُولَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ فَيَرْحَمَهُ اللَّهُ أَوْ قَالَ خَشْيَةَ أَنْ يَرْحَمَهُ اللَّهُ «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» على شرط البخاري ومسلم – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū ʿAlī al-Ḥāfiẓ \u003e ʿAbdān al-Ahwāzī \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Aʿlá \u003e Khālid b. al-Ḥārith \u003e Shuʿbah \u003e ʿAdī b. Thābit And ʿAṭāʾ b. al-Sāʾib \u003e Saʿīd b. Jubayr \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَلِيٍّ الْحَافِظُ أَنْبَأَ عَبْدَانُ الْأَهْوَازِيُّ نا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى ثنا خَالِدُ بْنُ الْحَارِثِ ثنا شُعْبَةَ أَخْبَرَنِي عَدِيُّ بْنُ ثَابِتٍ وَعَطَاءُ بْنُ السَّائِبِ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 190

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying in one of his prayers, "O Allah, reckon me with an easy reckoning." When he finished, I said, "O Messenger of Allah, what is the reckoning?" He said, "It is to be examined in His book, and be pardoned. Verily, whoever undergoes reckoning on that day, O Aisha, he shall perish. Every hardship that afflicts a believer, even a thorn prick, will be expiation for him from Allah." – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying in one of his prayers, "O Allah, reckon me with an easy reckoning." When he finished, I said, "O Messenger of Allah, what is the reckoning?" He said, "It is to be examined in His book, and be pardoned. Verily, whoever undergoes reckoning on that day, O Aisha, he shall perish. Every hardship that afflicts a believer, even a thorn prick, will be expiation for him from Allah." – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ فِي بَعْضِ صَلَاتِهِ «اللَّهُمَّ حَاسِبْنِي حِسَابًا يَسِيرًا» فَلَمَّا انْصَرَفَ قُلْتُ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ مَا الْحِسَابُ قَالَ «يُنْظَرُ فِي كِتَابِهِ وَيُتَجَاوَزُ عَنْهُ إِنَّهُ مَنْ نُوقِشَ الْحِسَابَ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَا عَائِشَةُ هَلَكَ وَكُلُّ مَا يُصِيبُ الْمُؤْمِنَ يُلْقِي اللَّهُ عَنْهُ حَتَّى الشَّوْكَةَ تَشُوكُهُ» هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ بِهَذَا اللَّفْظِ إِنَّمَا اتَّفَقَا عَلَى حَدِيثِ ابْنِ أَبِي مُلَيْكَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ «مَنْ نُوقِشَ الْحِسَابَ عُذِّبَ» على شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb \u003e Abū Zurʿah ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. ʿAmr al-Dimashqī \u003e Aḥmad b. Khālid al-Wahbī \u003e Muḥammad b. Isḥāq And ʾAnbaʾ Aḥmad b. Jaʿfar al-Qaṭīʿī \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Aḥmad b. Ḥanbal from my father \u003e Ismāʿīl b. ʿUlayyah \u003e Muḥammad b. Isḥāq \u003e ʿAbd al-Wāḥid b. Ḥamzah b. ʿAbdullāh b. al-Zubayr \u003e ʿAbbād b. ʿAbdullāh b. al-Zubayr \u003e ʿĀʾishah \u003e Rasūl
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ ثنا أَبُو زُرْعَةَ عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ عَمْرٍو الدِّمَشْقِيُّ ثنا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ الْوَهْبِيُّ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ وَأَنْبَأَ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْقَطِيعِيُّ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي ثنا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ عُلَيَّةَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْوَاحِدِ بْنِ حَمْزَةِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الزُّبَيْرِ عَنْ عَبَّادِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الزُّبَيْرِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 191

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: “The wise man is the one who takes account of himself and strives for that which is after death. And the helpless man is the one who follows his own whims then indulges in wishful thinking about Allah.”  – Sound Chain per Bukhārī
body: “The wise man is the one who takes account of himself and strives for that which is after death. And the helpless man is the one who follows his own whims then indulges in wishful thinking about Allah.”  – Sound Chain per Bukhārī
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «الْكَيِّسُ مَنْ دَانَ نَفْسَهُ وَعَمِلَ لِمَا بَعْدَ الْمَوْتِ وَالْعَاجِزُ مَنْ أَتْبَعَ نَفْسَهُ هَوَاهَا وَتَمَنَّى عَلَى اللَّهِ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الْبُخَارِيِّ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» لا والله يعني ليس على شرط البخاري كما قال الحاكم أبو بكر واه – على شرط البخاري
chain: al-Ḥasan b. Ḥalīm al-Marwazī \u003e Abū al-Muwajjah \u003e ʿAbdān \u003e ʿAbdullāh \u003e Abū Bakr b. Abū Maryam al-Ghassānī \u003e Ḍamrah b. Ḥabīb \u003e Shaddād b. Aws \u003e Qāl Rasūl
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ حَلِيمٍ الْمَرْوَزِيُّ ثنا أَبُو الْمُوَجَّهِ ثنا عَبْدَانُ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ أَنْبَأَ أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي مَرْيَمَ الْغَسَّانِيُّ عَنْ ضَمْرَةَ بْنِ حَبِيبٍ عَنْ شَدَّادِ بْنِ أَوْسٍ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 192

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: وَأَبِي دَاوُدَ» «فَصَحُّ الْحَدِيثِ.
body: وَأَبِي دَاوُدَ» «فَصَحُّ الْحَدِيثِ.
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ «الْمُؤْمِنُ مُكَفَّرٌ» «قَدِ اتَّفَقَا عَلَى عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ حُمَيْدٍ وَ هَذَا حَدِيثٌ غَرِيبٌ صَحِيحٌ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ لِجَهَالَةِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ الزُّهْرِيِّ هَذَا» غريب صحيح ما خرجاه لجهالة محمد
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās ʿAbdullāh b. al-Ḥusayn al-Qāḍī Bimarw \u003e al-Ḥārith b. Abū Usāmah \u003e Rawḥ b. ʿUbādah \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. ʿAwf \u003e Ḥusayn b. ʿUthmān b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman And ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Ḥumayd b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. ʿAwf \u003e ʿĀmir b. Saʿd from his father
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ الْقَاضِي بِمَرْوَ ثنا الْحَارِثُ بْنُ أَبِي أُسَامَةَ ثنا رَوْحُ بْنُ عُبَادَةَ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ عَوْفٍ حَدَّثَنِي حُسَيْنُ بْنُ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ وَعَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ حُمَيْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ عَوْفٍ عَنْ عَامِرِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 193

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "This nation will be gathered into three groups: a group that will enter Paradise without any reckoning, a group that will be held accountable with an easy reckoning before entering Paradise, and a group that will come on their hands and knees like mountains, burdened with sins. Allah will ask about them although He is most aware of them, and they will say, 'These are your servants, O Allah.' Allah will then relieve them of their burden and place it upon the Jews and Christians, and admit them to Paradise through His mercy." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "This nation will be gathered into three groups: a group that will enter Paradise without any reckoning, a group that will be held accountable with an easy reckoning before entering Paradise, and a group that will come on their hands and knees like mountains, burdened with sins. Allah will ask about them although He is most aware of them, and they will say, 'These are your servants, O Allah.' Allah will then relieve them of their burden and place it upon the Jews and Christians, and admit them to Paradise through His mercy." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ تُحْشَرُ هَذِهِ الْأُمَّةُ عَلَى ثَلَاثَةِ أَصْنَافٍ صِنْفٌ يَدْخُلُونَ الْجَنَّةَ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ وَصِنْفٌ يُحَاسَبُونَ حِسَابًا يَسِيرًا ثُمَّ يَدْخُلُونَ الْجَنَّةَ وَصِنْفٌ يَجِيئُونَ عَلَى ظُهُورِهِمْ أَمْثَالُ الْجِبَالِ الرَّاسِيَاتِ ذُنُوبًا فَيَسْأَلُ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَهُوَأَعْلَمُ بِهِمْ فَيَقُولُ مَا هَؤُلَاءِ؟ فَيَقُولُونَ هَؤُلَاءِ عَبِيدٌ مِنْ عِبَادَكَ فَيَقُولُ حُطُّوهَا عَنْهُمْ وَاجْعَلُوهَا عَلَى الْيَهُودِ وَالنَّصَارَى وَأَدْخِلُوهُمْ بِرَحْمَتِي الْجَنَّةَ «» هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ مِنْ حَدِيثِ حَرَمِيِّ بْنِ عُمَارَةَ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ فَأَمَّا حَجَّاجُ بْنُ نَصْرٍ فَإِنِّي قَرَنْتُهُ إِلَى حَرَمِيٍّ لِأَنِّي عَلَوْتُ فِيهِ على شرط البخاري ومسلم – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū al-Ḥasan Aḥmad b. ʿUthmān al-Ādamī \u003e Abū Qilābah \u003e Ḥajjāj b. Nuṣayr \u003e Shaddād b. Saʿīd \u003e Abū Bakr b. Isḥāq al-Faqīh \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Aḥmad b. Ḥanbal \u003e ʿUbaydullāh b. ʿUmar al-Qawārīrī \u003e Ḥaramī b. ʿUmārah \u003e Shaddād b. Saʿīd Abū Ṭalḥah al-Rāsibī \u003e Ghaylān b. Jarīr \u003e Abū Burdah \u003e Abū Mūsá
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْحَسَنِ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ عُثْمَانَ الْآدَمِيُّ بِبَغْدَادَ ثنا أَبُو قِلَابَةَ ثنا حَجَّاجُ بْنُ نُصَيْرٍ ثنا شَدَّادُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ وَأَخْبَرَنِي أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْفَقِيهُ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ ثنا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عُمَرَ الْقَوَارِيرِيُّ ثنا حَرَمِيُّ بْنُ عُمَارَةَ ثنا شَدَّادُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ أَبُو طَلْحَةَ الرَّاسِبِيُّ عَنْ غَيْلَانَ بْنِ جَرِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي بُرْدَةَ عَنْ أَبِي مُوسَى قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 194

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: There was a boy on the side of the road, and the Prophet Muhammad ﷺ passed by with people. When the boy's mother saw the crowd, she was afraid her son would be trampled, so she picked him up and said, "My son, my son." The people asked the Prophet, "O Messenger of Allah, why would this woman throw her son into the fire?" The Prophet ﷺ said, "By Allah, His beloved ones will not be thrown into the fire." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: There was a boy on the side of the road, and the Prophet Muhammad ﷺ passed by with people. When the boy's mother saw the crowd, she was afraid her son would be trampled, so she picked him up and said, "My son, my son." The people asked the Prophet, "O Messenger of Allah, why would this woman throw her son into the fire?" The Prophet ﷺ said, "By Allah, His beloved ones will not be thrown into the fire." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: كَانَ صَبِيٌّ عَلَى ظَهْرِ الطَّرِيقِ فَمَرَّ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ وَمَعَهُ نَاسٌ فَلَمَّا رَأَتْ أُمُّ الصَّبِيِّ الْقَوْمَ خَشِيَتْ أَنْ يُوطَأَ ابْنُهَا فَسَمِعَتْ فَحَمَلَتْهُ فَقَالَتِ ابْنِي ابْنِي قَالَ الْقَوْمُ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ مَا كَانَتْ هَذِهِ لِيُلْقَى ابْنُهَا فِي النَّارِ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «وَلَا اللَّهُ يُلْقِي حَبِيبَهُ فِي النَّارِ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» على شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: ʿAlī b. Bundār al-Zāhid \u003e Jaʿfar b. Muḥammad al-Firyābī \u003e Muḥammad b. al-Muthanná al-Zamin \u003e Khālid b. al-Ḥārith \u003e Ḥumayd \u003e Anas
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنِي عَلِيُّ بْنُ بُنْدَارٍ الزَّاهِدُ ثنا جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْفِرْيَابِيُّ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى الزَّمِنُ ثنا خَالِدُ بْنُ الْحَارِثِ ثنا حُمَيْدٌ عَنْ أَنَسٍ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 195

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: A man came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said, "O Messenger of Allah, one of us commits a sin." He said, "It is written against him." The man said, "Then he seeks forgiveness from Him and repents." He said, "He will be forgiven and granted repentance, and Allah does not become weary until you become weary." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī
body: A man came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said, "O Messenger of Allah, one of us commits a sin." He said, "It is written against him." The man said, "Then he seeks forgiveness from Him and repents." He said, "He will be forgiven and granted repentance, and Allah does not become weary until you become weary." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī
arabic: أَنَّ رَجُلًا أَتَى رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ أَحَدُنَا يُذْنِبُ قَالَ «يُكْتَبُ عَلَيْهِ» قَالَ ثُمَّ يَسْتَغْفِرُ مِنْهُ وَيَتُوبُ قَالَ «يُغْفَرُ لَهُ وَيُتَابُ عَلَيْهِ وَلَا يَمَلُّ اللَّهُ حَتَّى تَمَلُّوا» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الْبُخَارِيِّ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» على شرط البخاري – على شرط البخاري
chain: Aḥmad b. Salmān al-Faqīh\u003e Quriʾ \u003e Muḥammad b. al-Haytham al-Qāḍī \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Ṣāliḥ \u003e al-Layth \u003e Yazīd b. Abū Ḥabīb \u003e Abū al-Khayr \u003e ʿUqbah b. ʿĀmir al-Juhanī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ سَلْمَانَ الْفَقِيهُ بِبَغْدَادَ قَالَ قُرِئَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْهَيْثَمِ الْقَاضِي وَأَنَا أَسْمَعُ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ صَالِحٍ حَدَّثَنِي اللَّيْثُ عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ أَبِي حَبِيبٍ عَنْ أَبِي الْخَيْرِ عَنْ عُقْبَةَ بْنِ عَامِرٍ الْجُهَنِيِّ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 196

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: "The major sins, from the beginning of Surah An-Nisa' until 'if you avoid the major sins which you are forbidden from' [An-Nisa' 31], are thirty verses from the beginning of the Surah." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: "The major sins, from the beginning of Surah An-Nisa' until 'if you avoid the major sins which you are forbidden from' [An-Nisa' 31], are thirty verses from the beginning of the Surah." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: الْكَبَائِرُ مِنْ أَوَّلِ سُورَةِ النِّسَاءِ إِلَى {إِنْ تَجْتَنِبُوا كَبَائِرَ مَا تُنْهَوْنَ عَنْهُ} [النساء 31] مِنْ أَوَّلِ السُّورَةِ ثَلَاثِينَ آيَةً «» هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَجَبَ إِخْرَاجُهُ عَلَى مَا شَرَطْتُ فِي تَفْسِيرِ الصَّحَابَةِ على شرطهما وهو تفسير صحابي – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū Bakr Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh al-Shāfiʿī \u003e Isḥāq b. al-Ḥasan \u003e Abū Ḥudhayfah \u003e Sufyān \u003e Abū Zakariyyā Yaḥyá b. Muḥammad al-ʿAnbarī \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Salām \u003e Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm \u003e Wakīʿ \u003e Sufyān \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Abū al-Ḍuḥá \u003e Masrūq \u003e ʿAbdullāh \u003e al-Kabāʾir from Awwal Sūrah al-Nisāʾ \u003e In Tajtanibūā Kabāʾir
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الشَّافِعِيُّ ثنا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ ثنا أَبُو حُذَيْفَةَ ثنا سُفْيَانُ وَحَدَّثَنَا أَبُو زَكَرِيَّا يَحْيَى بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْعَنْبَرِيُّ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ السَّلَامِ ثنا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ أَنْبَأَ وَكِيعٌ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ عَنِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ أَبِي الضُّحَى عَنْ مَسْرُوقٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 197

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said during the Farewell Pilgrimage: "Indeed, the allies of Allah are those who establish the five daily prayers that Allah prescribed for them, fast during Ramadan and consider it as an obligation, give Zakat (charity) from their wealth and consider it as an obligation, and avoid major sins that Allah has forbidden." Then a man asked him, "O Messenger of Allah, what are the major sins?" He replied, "They are nine: associating partners with Allah, killing a believer unjustly, fleeing from the battlefield, consuming the property of orphans, consuming interest, slandering chaste women, disobeying one's Muslim parents, participating in the violation of the sanctity of the Kaaba, whether you are alive or dead." Then he said, "A man does not die until he commits these major sins, establishes prayer, and gives Zakat, except that he will be with the Prophet ﷺ in a dwelling whose doors are made of gold." "This hadith has been cited through narrators other than Abd al-Hameed ibn Sinan. As for Umayr ibn Qatadah, he is a companion of the Prophet ﷺ and his son Ubaid agreed on its authenticity and its use as evidence." Umayr ibn Qatadah was a companion of the Prophet, and there was no need for Abd al-Hameed ibn Sinan to state that. I said this to clarify his ignorance and confirm his reliability according to Ibn Hibban.
body: The Prophet ﷺ said during the Farewell Pilgrimage: "Indeed, the allies of Allah are those who establish the five daily prayers that Allah prescribed for them, fast during Ramadan and consider it as an obligation, give Zakat (charity) from their wealth and consider it as an obligation, and avoid major sins that Allah has forbidden." Then a man asked him, "O Messenger of Allah, what are the major sins?" He replied, "They are nine: associating partners with Allah, killing a believer unjustly, fleeing from the battlefield, consuming the property of orphans, consuming interest, slandering chaste women, disobeying one's Muslim parents, participating in the violation of the sanctity of the Kaaba, whether you are alive or dead." Then he said, "A man does not die until he commits these major sins, establishes prayer, and gives Zakat, except that he will be with the Prophet ﷺ in a dwelling whose doors are made of gold." "This hadith has been cited through narrators other than Abd al-Hameed ibn Sinan. As for Umayr ibn Qatadah, he is a companion of the Prophet ﷺ and his son Ubaid agreed on its authenticity and its use as evidence." Umayr ibn Qatadah was a companion of the Prophet, and there was no need for Abd al-Hameed ibn Sinan to state that. I said this to clarify his ignorance and confirm his reliability according to Ibn Hibban.
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ فِي حَجَّةِ الْوَدَاعِ «أَلَا إِنَّ أَوْلِيَاءَ اللَّهِ الْمُصَلُّونَ مَنْ يُقِيمُ الصَّلَوَاتِ الْخَمْسِ الَّتِي كُتِبَتْ عَلَيْهِ وَيَصُومُ رَمَضَانَ وَيَحْتَسِبُ صَوْمَهُ يَرَى أَنَّهُ عَلَيْهِ حَقٌّ وَيُعْطِي زَكَاةَ مَالِهِ يَحْتَسِبُهَا وَيَجْتَنِبُ الْكَبَائِرَ الَّتِي نَهَى اللَّهُ عَنْهَا» ثُمَّ إِنَّ رَجُلًا سَأَلَهُ فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ مَا الْكَبَائِرُ؟ فَقَالَ هُوَ تِسْعٌ الشِّرْكُ بِاللَّهِ وَقَتْلُ نَفْسِ مُؤْمِنٍ بِغَيْرِ حَقٍّ وَفِرَارٌ يَوْمَ الزَّحْفِ وَأَكْلُ مَالِ الْيَتِيمِ وَأَكْلُ الرِّبَا وَقَذْفُ الْمُحْصَنَةِ وَعُقُوقُ الْوَالِدَيْنِ الْمُسْلِمَيْنِ وَاسْتِحْلَالُ الْبَيْتِ الْحَرَامِ قِبْلَتِكُمْ أَحْيَاءً وَأَمْوَاتًا ثُمَّ قَالَ «لَا يَمُوتُ رَجُلٌ لَمْ يَعْمَلْ هَؤُلَاءِ الْكَبَائِرَ وَيُقِيمُ الصَّلَاةَ وَيُؤْتِي الزَّكَاةَ إِلَّا كَانَ مَعَ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ فِي دَارٍ أَبْوَابُهَا مَصَارِيعُ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ» «قَدِ احْتَجَّا بِرُوَاةِ هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ غَيْرِ عَبْدِ الْحَمِيدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ فَأَمَّا عُمَيْرُ بْنُ قَتَادَةَ فَإِنَّهُ صَحَابِيٌّ وَابْنُهُ عُبَيْدٌ مُتَّفَقٌ عَلَى إِخْرَاجِهِ وَالِاحْتِجَاجِ بِهِ» عمير بن قتادة صحابي ولم يحتاجا بعبد الحميد قال قلت لجهالته ووثقه ابن حبان
chain: Abū Bakr Aḥmad b. Kāmil al-Qāḍī Imlāʾ \u003e Abū Qilābah ʿAbd al-Malik b. Muḥammad \u003e Muʿādh b. Hāniʾ \u003e Ḥarb b. Shaddād \u003e Yaḥyá b. Abū Kathīr \u003e ʿAbd al-Ḥamīd b. Sinān \u003e ʿUbayd b. ʿUmayr from his father \u003e And Kānat Lah Ṣuḥbah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ كَامِلٍ الْقَاضِي إِمْلَاءً ثنا أَبُو قِلَابَةَ عَبْدُ الْمَلِكِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ ثنا مُعَاذُ بْنُ هَانِئٍ ثنا حَرْبُ بْنُ شَدَّادٍ ثنا يَحْيَى بْنُ أَبِي كَثِيرٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْحَمِيدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ بْنِ عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ أَنَّهُ حَدَّثَهُ وَكَانَتْ لَهُ صُحْبَةٌ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 199

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The Prophet Muhammad ﷺ said, "Indeed, a person can attain the status of those who observe night prayers and fast during the day through their good character." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: The Prophet Muhammad ﷺ said, "Indeed, a person can attain the status of those who observe night prayers and fast during the day through their good character." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «إِنَّ الرَّجُلَ لَيُدْرِكُ بِحُسْنِ خُلُقِهِ دَرَجَاتِ قَائِمِ اللَّيْلِ صَائِمِ النَّهَارِ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ وَشَاهِدُهُ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ» على شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb \u003e al-ʿAbbās b. Muḥammad al-Dūrī \u003e Abū al-Naḍr \u003e al-Layth b. Saʿd \u003e Yazīd b. ʿAbdullāh b. al-Hād \u003e ʿAmr b. Abū ʿAmr \u003e al-Muṭṭalib \u003e ʿĀʾishah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ ثنا الْعَبَّاسُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الدُّورِيُّ ثنا أَبُو النَّضْرِ عَنِ اللَّيْثِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الْهَادِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ أَبِي عَمْرٍو عَنِ الْمُطَّلِبِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 200

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Verily, Allah will elevate the rank of a servant through his good character, just as He elevates him through fasting and prayer." This is according to the condition of being a Muslim. – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Verily, Allah will elevate the rank of a servant through his good character, just as He elevates him through fasting and prayer." This is according to the condition of being a Muslim. – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «إِنَّ اللَّهَ لِيُبَلِّغُ الْعَبْدَ بِحُسْنِ خَلْقِهِ دَرَجَةَ الصَّوْمِ وَالصَّلَاةِ» على شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū Saʿīd Ismāʿīl b. Aḥmad al-Bājī \u003e Abū Yaʿlá \u003e Ibrāhīm b. al-Mustamir al-ʿUrūqī \u003e Ḥibbān b. Hilāl \u003e Ḥammād b. Salamah \u003e Budayl \u003e ʿAṭāʾ \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو سَعِيدٍ إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ الْبَاجِيُّ أَنْبَأَ أَبُو يَعْلَى ثنا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ الْمُسْتَمِرِّ الْعُرُوقِيُّ ثنا حِبَّانُ بْنُ هِلَالٍ ثنا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ بُدَيْلٍ عَنْ عَطَاءٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 201

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: O Abu Abdur Rahman, indeed, we are descendants of Al-Mughira, a people who possess arrogance. Have you heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say anything about this? Abdullah ibn Umar said, "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say, 'No man who has arrogance in himself and walks arrogantly will meet Allah while Allah is angry with him.'" – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: O Abu Abdur Rahman, indeed, we are descendants of Al-Mughira, a people who possess arrogance. Have you heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say anything about this? Abdullah ibn Umar said, "I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say, 'No man who has arrogance in himself and walks arrogantly will meet Allah while Allah is angry with him.'" – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: لَهُ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ إِنَّا بَنُو الْمُغِيرَةِ قَوْمٌ فِينَا نَخْوَةٌ فَهَلْ سَمِعْتَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ فِي ذَلِكَ شَيْئًا؟ فَقَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عُمَرَ سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ «مَا مِنْ رَجُلٍ يَتَعَاظَمُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَيَخْتَالُ فِي مِشْيَتِهِ إِلَّا لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهُوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» على شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb \u003e Ibrāhīm b. Marzūq al-Baṣrī Bimiṣr \u003e ʿUmar b. Yūnus b. al-Qāsim al-Yamāmī from my father \u003e ʿIkrimah b. Khālid b. Saʿīd b. al-ʿĀṣ al-Makhzūmī \u003e Laqī ʿAbdullāh b. ʿUmar b. al-Khaṭṭāb
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ ثنا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ مَرْزُوقٍ الْبَصْرِيُّ بِمِصْرَ أَنْبَأَنَا عُمَرُ بْنُ يُونُسَ بْنِ الْقَاسِمِ الْيَمَامِيِّ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي أَنَّ عِكْرِمَةَ بْنَ خَالِدِ بْنِ سَعِيدِ بْنِ الْعَاصِ الْمَخْزُومِيَّ حَدَّثَهُ أَنَّهُ لَقِيَ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ بْنَ عُمَرَ بْنِ الْخَطَّابِ فَقَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 202

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Shall I not inform you about the people of Paradise? They are the meek and weak. And the people of Hellfire are every haughty, arrogant, and contemptuous person." – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Shall I not inform you about the people of Paradise? They are the meek and weak. And the people of Hellfire are every haughty, arrogant, and contemptuous person." – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «أَلَا أُنَبِّئُكُمْ بِأَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ؟ الْمَغْلُوبُونَ الضُّعَفَاءُ وَأَهْلُ النَّارِ كُلُّ جَعْظَرِيٍّ جَوَّاظٍ مُسْتَكْبِرٍ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» على شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū al-Faḍl al-Ḥasan b. Yaʿqūb b. Yūsuf \u003e Yaḥyá b. Abū Ṭālib \u003e Zayd b. al-Ḥubāb \u003e Mūsá b. ʿAlī b. Rabāḥ from his father \u003e Surāqah b. Mālik
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْفَضْلِ الْحَسَنُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ بْنِ يُوسُفَ ثنا يَحْيَى بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ ثنا زَيْدُ بْنُ الْحُبَابِ حَدَّثَنِي مُوسَى بْنُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ رَبَاحٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ سُرَاقَةَ بْنِ مَالِكٍ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 203

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: From the Prophet ﷺ in what he narrated from his Lord, the Almighty, he said, "Pride is My cloak, so anyone who competes with Me over My cloak, I will break it."
body: From the Prophet ﷺ in what he narrated from his Lord, the Almighty, he said, "Pride is My cloak, so anyone who competes with Me over My cloak, I will break it."
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ فِيمَا يَحْكِي عَنْ رَبِّهِ ﷻ قَالَ «الْكِبْرِيَاءُ رِدَائِي فَمَنْ نَازَعَنِي رِدَائِي قَصَمْتُهُ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ بِهَذَا اللَّفْظِ إِنَّمَا أَخْرَجَهُ مُسْلِمٌ مِنْ طَرِيقِ الْأَغَرِّ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ بِغَيْرِ هَذَا اللَّفْظِ» أخرجه مسلم
chain: Abū Bakr Aḥmad b. Salmān al-Faqīh\u003e Jaʿfar b. Abū ʿUthmān al-Ṭayālisī \u003e Sahl b. Bakkār \u003e Ḥammād b. Salamah \u003e Qatādah \u003e Saʿīd b. al-Musayyib \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ سَلْمَانَ الْفَقِيهُ بِبَغْدَادَ ثنا جَعْفَرُ بْنُ أَبِي عُثْمَانَ الطَّيَالِسِيُّ ثنا سَهْلُ بْنُ بَكَّارٍ ثنا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ الْمُسَيِّبِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 204

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The translation of the sentence into English is: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to ride a donkey, wear woolen clothing, tend to sheep, and visit the welcoming of guests." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: The translation of the sentence into English is: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to ride a donkey, wear woolen clothing, tend to sheep, and visit the welcoming of guests." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: «كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَرْكَبُ الْحِمَارَ وَيَلْبَسُ الصُّوفَ وَيَعْتَقِلُ الشَّاةَ وَيَأْتِي مُرَاعَاةَ الضَّيْفِ» على شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū Bakr Ismāʿīl b. Muḥammad b. Ismāʿīl al-Faqīh Bi-al-Rrī \u003e Abū Bakr Muḥammad b. al-Faraj al-Azraq \u003e Hāshim b. al-Qāsim \u003e Shaybān Abū Muʿāwiyah \u003e Ashʿath b. Abū al-Shaʿthāʾ \u003e Abū Burdah \u003e Abū Mūsá
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ الْفَقِيهُ بِالرِّيِّ ثنا أَبُو بَكْرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْفَرَجِ الْأَزْرَقُ ثنا هَاشِمُ بْنُ الْقَاسِمِ ثنا شَيْبَانُ أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ عَنْ أَشْعَثَ بْنِ أَبِي الشَّعْثَاءِ عَنْ أَبِي بُرْدَةَ عَنْ أَبِي مُوسَى قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 205

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The translation in English is: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to ride a donkey, wear wool clothes, free sheep, and visit guests."
body: The translation in English is: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to ride a donkey, wear wool clothes, free sheep, and visit guests."
arabic: «كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَرْكَبُ الْحِمَارَ وَيَلْبَسُ الصُّوفَ وَيَعْتَقِلُ الشَّاةَ وَيَأْتِي مُرَاعَاةَ الضَّيْفِ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ وَإِنَّمَا ذَكَرْتُهُ فِي هَذِهِ الْمَوَاضِعِ لِأَنَّ هَذِهِ الْخَلَّالَ مِنَ الْإِيمَانِ وَلَهُ شَاهِدٌ يَنْفَرِدُ بِهِ زَبَّانُ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ»
chain: Abū al-Ṭayyib Muḥammad b. Aḥmad al-Ḥīrī \u003e Abū Bakr b. Muḥammad b. Nuʿaym al-Madanī \u003e Bishr b. Khālid al-ʿAskarī \u003e Abū al-Naḍr Hāshim b. al-Qāsim \u003e Shaybān Abū Muʿāwiyah \u003e Ashʿath b. Abū al-Shaʿthāʾ \u003e Abū Burdah \u003e Abū Mūsá
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الطَّيِّبِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ الْحِيرِيُّ ثنا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ نُعَيْمٍ الْمَدَنِيُّ ثنا بِشْرُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ الْعَسْكَرِيُّ ثنا أَبُو النَّضْرِ هَاشِمُ بْنُ الْقَاسِمِ ثنا شَيْبَانُ أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ عَنْ أَشْعَثَ بْنِ أَبِي الشَّعْثَاءِ عَنْ أَبِي بُرْدَةَ عَنْ أَبِي مُوسَى قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 206

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: From the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , he said: "Whoever gives up wearing clothes, while being able to do so, out of humility for Allah, Allah will call him to the heads of creation until he is given a choice in the garments of faith, and he can wear whichever he wishes." Al-Dhahabi remained silent about it in his summary. – Remains Silent
body: From the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , he said: "Whoever gives up wearing clothes, while being able to do so, out of humility for Allah, Allah will call him to the heads of creation until he is given a choice in the garments of faith, and he can wear whichever he wishes." Al-Dhahabi remained silent about it in his summary. – Remains Silent
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ «مَنْ تَرَكَ اللِّبَاسَ وَهُوَقَادِرٌ عَلَيْهِ تَوَاضُعًا لِلَّهِ دَعَاهُ اللَّهُ عَلَى رُءُوسِ الْخَلَائِقِ حَتَّى يُخَيَّرَ فِي حُلَلِ الْإِيمَانِ يَلْبَسُ أَيَّهَا شَاءَ» سكت عنه الذهبي في التلخيص – سكت عنه
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb \u003e al-Rabīʿ b. Sulaymān \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Wahb \u003e Yaḥyá b. Ayyūb \u003e Zabbān b. Fāʾid \u003e Sahl b. Muʿādh b. Anas al-Juhanī from his father
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ ثنا الرَّبِيعُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ وَهْبٍ أَخْبَرَنِي يَحْيَى بْنُ أَيُّوبَ عَنْ زَبَّانَ بْنِ فَائِدٍ عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ مُعَاذِ بْنِ أَنَسٍ الْجُهَنِيِّ عَنْ أَبِيهِ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 207

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: He took off his shoes, put them on his shoulder, and took hold of the reins of his camel. He then led her through the crowd. Abu Ubaydah said, "O Amir al-Mu'minin, you are doing this? You are taking off your shoes and putting them on your shoulder, and taking hold of the reins of your camel and leading her through the crowd? It pleases me that the people of the city are honoring you." 'Umar said, "Oh, it isn't that anyone other than you said this, Abu Ubaydah. I only did it so that I could be an example for the nation of Muhammad ﷺ . Verily, we were the most humiliated people and Allah honored us with Islam. So, whatever we seek honor in, other than what Allah has honored us with, Allah will humiliate us." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: He took off his shoes, put them on his shoulder, and took hold of the reins of his camel. He then led her through the crowd. Abu Ubaydah said, "O Amir al-Mu'minin, you are doing this? You are taking off your shoes and putting them on your shoulder, and taking hold of the reins of your camel and leading her through the crowd? It pleases me that the people of the city are honoring you." 'Umar said, "Oh, it isn't that anyone other than you said this, Abu Ubaydah. I only did it so that I could be an example for the nation of Muhammad ﷺ . Verily, we were the most humiliated people and Allah honored us with Islam. So, whatever we seek honor in, other than what Allah has honored us with, Allah will humiliate us." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: عَنْهَا وَخَلَعَ خُفَّيْهِ فَوَضَعَهُمَا عَلَى عَاتِقِهِ وَأَخَذَ بِزِمَامِ نَاقَتِهِ فَخَاضَ بِهَا الْمَخَاضَةَ فَقَالَ أَبُو عُبَيْدَةَ يَا أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ أَنْتَ تَفْعَلُ هَذَا تَخْلَعُ خُفَّيْكَ وَتَضَعُهُمَا عَلَى عَاتِقِكَ وَتَأْخُذُ بِزِمَامِ نَاقَتِكَ وَتَخُوضُ بِهَا الْمَخَاضَةَ؟ مَا يَسُرُّنِي أَنَّ أَهْلَ الْبَلَدِ اسْتَشْرَفُوكَ فَقَالَ عُمَرُ «أَوَّهْ لَمْ يَقُلْ ذَا غَيْرُكَ أَبَا عُبَيْدَةَ جَعَلْتُهُ نَكَالًا لَأُمَّةِ مُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ إِنَّا كُنَّا أَذَلَّ قَوْمٍ فَأَعَزَّنَا اللَّهُ بِالْإِسْلَامِ فَمَهْمَا نَطْلُبُ الْعِزَّةَ بِغَيْرِ مَا أَعَزَّنَا اللَّهُ بِهِ أَذَلَّنَا اللَّهُ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ لِاحْتِجَاجِهِمَا جَمِيعًا بأيوبَ بْنِ عَائِذٍ الطَّائِيِّ وَسَائِرِ رُوَاتِهِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ وَلَهُ شَاهِدٌ مِنْ حَدِيثِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ قَيْسِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ» على شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. Muḥammad al-Baghdādī \u003e Ismāʿīl b. Isḥāq al-Qāḍī \u003e ʿAlī b. al-Madīnī \u003e Sufyān \u003e Ayyūb b. ʿĀʾidh al-Ṭāʾī \u003e Qays b. Muslim \u003e Ṭāriq b. Shihāb
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْبَغْدَادِيُّ ثنا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْقَاضِي ثنا عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْمَدِينِيِّ ثنا سُفْيَانُ ثنا أَيُّوبُ بْنُ عَائِذٍ الطَّائِيُّ عَنْ قَيْسِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ طَارِقِ بْنِ شِهَابٍ قَالَ خَرَجَ عُمَرُ بْنُ الْخَطَّابِ إِلَى الشَّامِ وَمَعَنَا أَبُو عُبَيْدَةَ بْنُ الْجَرَّاحِ فَأَتَوْا عَلَى مَخَاضَةٍ وَعُمَرُ عَلَى نَاقَةٍ لَهُ فَنَزَلَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 208

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: When Umar arrived in Sham, the soldiers met him while he was wearing a garment and sandals and had a turban on his head. He was holding the reins of his camel as he crossed the water. Someone said to him, "O Amir al-Mu'minin, the soldiers and the elite of Sham meet you while you are in this state?" Umar replied, "Verily, we are a nation whom Allah has honored with Islam, and we will not seek honor through anything else." Al-Dhahabi remained silent about this in the summary translation. – Remains Silent
body: When Umar arrived in Sham, the soldiers met him while he was wearing a garment and sandals and had a turban on his head. He was holding the reins of his camel as he crossed the water. Someone said to him, "O Amir al-Mu'minin, the soldiers and the elite of Sham meet you while you are in this state?" Umar replied, "Verily, we are a nation whom Allah has honored with Islam, and we will not seek honor through anything else." Al-Dhahabi remained silent about this in the summary translation. – Remains Silent
arabic: لَمَّا قَدِمَ عُمَرُ الشَّامَ لَقِيَهُ الْجُنُودُ وَعَلَيْهِ إِزَارٌ وَخُفَّانِ وَعِمَامَةٌ وَهُوَ آخِذٌ بِرَأْسِ بَعِيرِهِ يَخُوضُ الْمَاءَ فَقَالَ لَهُ يَعْنِي قَائِلٌ يَا أَمِيرَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ تَلْقَاكَ الْجُنُودُ وَبَطَارِقَةُ الشَّامِ وَأَنْتَ عَلَى حَالِكَ هَذَا؟ فَقَالَ عُمَرُ «إِنَّا قَوْمٌ أَعَزَّنَا اللَّهُ بِالْإِسْلَامِ فَلَنْ نَبْتَغِيَ الْعِزَّةَ بِغَيْرِهِ» سكت عنه الذهبي في التلخيص – سكت عنه
chain: ʿAlī b. Ḥamshādh al-ʿAdl \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿĪsá b. al-Sakan al-Wāsiṭī \u003e ʿAmr b. ʿAwn \u003e Abū Muʿāwiyah \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Qays b. Muslim \u003e Ṭāriq b. Shihāb
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حَمْشَاذَ الْعَدْلُ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِيسَى بْنِ السَّكَنِ الْوَاسِطِيُّ ثنا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَوْنٍ ثنا أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ ثنا الْأَعْمَشُ عَنْ قَيْسِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ طَارِقِ بْنِ شِهَابٍ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 209

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said: Those who do not show mercy to our young ones and do not realise the right of our elders are not from us.  – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: The Prophet ﷺ said: Those who do not show mercy to our young ones and do not realise the right of our elders are not from us.  – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: النَّبِيَّ ﷺ قَالَ «لَيْسَ مِنَّا مَنْ لَمْ يَرْحَمْ صَغِيرَنَا وَيَعْرِفْ حَقَّ كَبِيرِنَا» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ فَقَدِ احْتَجَّ بِعَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ الْيَحْصِبِيِّ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» وَشَاهِدُهُ الْحَدِيثُ الْمَعْرُوفُ مِنْ حَدِيثِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ وَغَيْرِهِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ شُعَيْبٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ جَدِّهِ وَفِي حَدِيثِ عِكْرِمَةَ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ «وَيَأْمُرُ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَيَنْهَى عَنِ الْمُنْكَرِ» «وَإِنَّمَا تَرَكْتُهُ لِأَنَّ رَاوِيَةَ لَيْثِ بْنِ أَبِي سُلَيْمٍ» على شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū Bakr b. Isḥāq al-Faqīh \u003e Bishr b. Mūsá \u003e al-Ḥumaydī \u003e Sufyān \u003e Ibn Abū Najīḥ \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. ʿĀmir \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. ʿUmar And Yablugh Bih
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْفَقِيهُ أَنْبَأَنَا بِشْرُ بْنُ مُوسَى ثنا الْحُمَيْدِيُّ ثنا سُفْيَانُ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي نَجِيحٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُمَرَ وَيَبْلُغُ بِهِ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 210

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Blessings are with your elders." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Blessings are with your elders." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «الْبَرَكَةُ مَعَ أَكَابِرِكُمْ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الْبُخَارِيِّ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» على شرط البخاري – على شرط البخاري
chain: Abū Aḥmad Ḥamzah b. al-ʿAbbās al-ʿAqabī \u003e ʿAbd al-Karīm b. al-Haytham \u003e Nuʿaym b. Ḥammād \u003e Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Aḥmad al-Maḥbūbī Bimarw \u003e Aḥmad b. Sayyār \u003e Wārith b. ʿUbaydullāh \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. al-Mubārak \u003e Khālid b. Mihrān al-Ḥadhhāʾ \u003e ʿIkrimah \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās \u003e Qāl Rasūl
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أَحْمَدَ حَمْزَةُ بْنُ الْعَبَّاسِ الْعَقَبِيُّ بِبَغْدَادَ ثنا عَبْدُ الْكَرِيمِ بْنُ الْهَيْثَمِ ثنا نُعَيْمُ بْنُ حَمَّادٍ وَأَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ الْمَحْبُوبِيُّ بِمَرْوَ ثنا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ سَيَّارٍ ثنا وَارِثُ بْنُ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَا ثنا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ أَنْبَأَ خَالِدُ بْنُ مِهْرَانَ الْحَذَّاءُ عَنْ عِكْرِمَةَ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 211

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: "O Allah, bear witness that I have issued a warning concerning (failure to fulfill) the rights of the two weak ones: Orphans and women.'"  – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: "O Allah, bear witness that I have issued a warning concerning (failure to fulfill) the rights of the two weak ones: Orphans and women.'"  – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «إِنِّي أُحَرِّجُ عَلَيْكُمْ حَقَّ الضَّعِيفَيْنِ الْيَتِيمِ وَالْمَرْأَةِ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» على شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū ʿAbdullāh Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb al-Ḥāfiẓ \u003e Yaḥyá b. Muḥammad b. Yaḥyá \u003e Musaddad \u003e ʿAlī b. Ḥamshādh \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Aḥmad b. Ḥanbal from my father \u003e Yaḥyá / ān Ibn Saʿīd \u003e Ibn ʿAjlān \u003e Saʿīd al-Maqburī \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ الْحَافِظُ ثنا يَحْيَى بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ يَحْيَى ثنا مُسَدَّدٌ وَثنا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حَمْشَاذَ أَنْبَأَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي قَالَا ثنا يَحْيَى يَعْنِيَانِ ابْنَ سَعِيدٍ ثنا ابْنُ عَجْلَانَ عَنْ سَعِيدٍ الْمَقْبُرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 212

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: "He gathered a group of people and met Aba Dhar while he was near the middle pillar and the people were around him. So, I sat with him until my knees touched his knees. I forgot the mentioned conversation and everything I wanted to ask him slipped away from me. So, I raised my head towards the sky and tried to remember. I said, 'O Aba Dhar, guide me towards an action that, if a servant performs it, they would enter Paradise.' He said, 'The Prophet ﷺ said: "Believe in Allah."' I said, 'O Messenger of Allah, is there an action that accompanies faith?' He said, 'He should be content with whatever Allah has provided for him.' I said, 'O Messenger of Allah, what if he has nothing?' He said, 'He should speak kindly.' I said, 'What if he is unable to speak?' He said, 'Then, let him help a person in need.' I said, 'What if he is weak and powerless?' He said, 'Then, let him do good to others by joining their good actions.' I said, 'What if he is crippled?' Then, he turned towards me and said, 'What do you want for your companion?' I said, 'Let him refrain from hurting others.' I said, 'O Messenger of Allah, indeed all of this seems easy.' He said, 'By the One in whose hand is the soul of Muhammad, there is no characteristic that a servant acts upon seeking the face of Allah, except that it will hold his hand on the Day of Resurrection and not leave him until it enters him into Paradise.'" – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: "He gathered a group of people and met Aba Dhar while he was near the middle pillar and the people were around him. So, I sat with him until my knees touched his knees. I forgot the mentioned conversation and everything I wanted to ask him slipped away from me. So, I raised my head towards the sky and tried to remember. I said, 'O Aba Dhar, guide me towards an action that, if a servant performs it, they would enter Paradise.' He said, 'The Prophet ﷺ said: "Believe in Allah."' I said, 'O Messenger of Allah, is there an action that accompanies faith?' He said, 'He should be content with whatever Allah has provided for him.' I said, 'O Messenger of Allah, what if he has nothing?' He said, 'He should speak kindly.' I said, 'What if he is unable to speak?' He said, 'Then, let him help a person in need.' I said, 'What if he is weak and powerless?' He said, 'Then, let him do good to others by joining their good actions.' I said, 'What if he is crippled?' Then, he turned towards me and said, 'What do you want for your companion?' I said, 'Let him refrain from hurting others.' I said, 'O Messenger of Allah, indeed all of this seems easy.' He said, 'By the One in whose hand is the soul of Muhammad, there is no characteristic that a servant acts upon seeking the face of Allah, except that it will hold his hand on the Day of Resurrection and not leave him until it enters him into Paradise.'" – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: فَجَمَعَ حَدِيثًا فَلَقِيَ أَبَا ذَرٍّ وَهُوَ عِنْدَ الْجَمْرَةِ الْوُسْطَى وَحَوْلَهُ النَّاسُ قَالَ فَجَلَسْتُ إِلَيْهِ حَتَّى مَسَّتْ رُكْبَتِي رُكْبَتَيْهِ فَنَسِيتُ ذَلِكَ الْحَدِيثَ وَتَفَلَّتَ مِنِّي كُلُّ شَيْءٍ أَرَدْتُ أَنْ أَسْأَلَهُ عَنْهُ فَرَفَعْتُ رَأْسِي إِلَى السَّمَاءِ فَجَعَلْتُ أَتَذْكُرُ فَقُلْتُ يَا أَبَا ذَرٍّ دُلَّنِي عَلَى عَمَلٍ إِذَا عَمِلَ بِهِ الْعَبْدُ دَخَلَ الْجَنَّةَ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «تُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ» قُلْتُ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِنَّ مَعَ الْإِيمَانِ عَمَلًا؟ قَالَ «يَرْضَخُ مِمَّا رَزَقَهُ اللَّهُ» قُلْتُ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ فَإِنْ كَانَ مُعْدَمًا لَا شَيْءَ لَهُ؟ قَالَ «يَقُولُ مَعْرُوفًا بِلِسَانِهِ» قُلْتُ فَإِنْ كَانَ عَيِيًّا لَا يَبْلُغُ عَنْهُ لِسَانُهُ؟ قَالَ «فَلْيُعِنْ مَغْلُوبًا» قُلْتُ فَإِنْ كَانَ ضَعِيفًا لَا قُوَّةَ لَهُ؟ قَالَ «فَلْيَصْنَعْ لِأَخْرَقَ» قُلْتُ فَإِنْ كَانَ أَخْرَقَ؟ فَالْتَفَتَ إِلَيَّ فَقَالَ «مَا تُرِيدُ أَنْ تَدَعَ فِي صَاحِبِكَ خَيْرًا؟» قَالَ «يَدَعُ النَّاسَ مِنْ أَذَاهُ» قُلْتُ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِنَّ هَذَا لَيَسِيرٌ كُلُّهُ قَالَ «وَالَّذِي نَفْسُ مُحَمَّدٍ بِيَدِهِ مَا مِنْهُنَّ خَصْلَةٌ يَعْمَلُ بِهَا عَبْدٌ يَبْتَغِي بِهَا وَجْهَ اللَّهِ إِلَّا أَخَذَتْ بِيَدِهِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ فَلَمْ تُفَارِقْهُ حَتَّى تُدْخِلَهُ االْجَنَّةَ» هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ فَقَدِ احْتَجَّ فِي كِتَابِهِ بِأَبِي كَثِيرٍ الزُّبَيْدِيِّ وَاسْمُهُ يَزِيدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أُذَيْنَةَ وَهُوَ تَابِعِيٌّ مَعْرُوفٌ يُقَالُ لَهُ أَبُو كَثِيرٍ الْأَعْمَى وَهَذَا الْحَدِيثُ لَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ على شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb \u003e al-ʿAbbās b. al-Walīd b. Mazyad al-Bayrūtī from my father \u003e al-Awzāʿī \u003e Abū Kathīr al-Zubaydī from his father
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ أَنْبَأَ الْعَبَّاسُ بْنُ الْوَلِيدِ بْنِ مَزْيَدٍ الْبَيْرُوتِيُّ أَخْبَرَنِي أَبِي قَالَ سَمِعْتُ الْأَوْزَاعِيَّ يَقُولُ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو كَثِيرٍ الزُّبَيْدِيُّ عَنْ أَبِيهِ وَكَانَ يُجَالِسُ أَبَا ذَرٍّ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 213

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said: There is hesitation in everything except in the actions of the next world.  – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: The Prophet ﷺ said: There is hesitation in everything except in the actions of the next world.  – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ «التُّؤَدَةُ فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ خَيْرٌ إِلَّا فِي عَمَلِ الْآخِرَةِ» هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ على شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū Bakr b. Isḥāq al-Faqīh \u003e Muḥammad b. Ghālib b. Ḥārith \u003e ʿAffān b. Muslim \u003e ʿAbd al-Wāḥid b. Ziyād \u003e al-Aʿmash \u003e Mālik b. al-Ḥārith \u003e Muṣʿab b. Saʿd from his father \u003e al-Aʿmash And Lā Aʿlamuh Illā
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْفَقِيهُ أَنْبَأَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ غَالِبِ بْنِ حَارِثٍ ثنا عَفَّانُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ ثنا عَبْدُ الْوَاحِدِ بْنُ زِيَادٍ ثنا الْأَعْمَشُ عَنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ الْحَارِثِ عَنْ مُصْعَبِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ الْأَعْمَشُ وَلَا أَعْلَمُهُ إِلَّا

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 214

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: “When Allah created Adam, He breathed the soul into him, then he sneezed and said: ‘All praise is due to Allah.’ So he praised Allah by His permission. Then His Lord said to him: ‘May Allah have mercy upon you O Adam. Go to those angels – to that gathering of them sitting – so say: 'As-Salamu alaikum.' They said 'Wa Alaikas-Salamu Wa Rahmatullah’. Then he returned to his Lord, He said: ‘This is your greeting and the greeting of your children among each other.’ Then Allah said to him – while His Two Hands were closed – ‘Choose which of them you wish.’ He said: ‘I chose the right My Lord and both of the Hands of my Lord are right, blessed.’ Then He extended it, and there was Adam and his offspring in it.’ So he said: ‘What are these O my Lord?’ He said: ‘These are your offspring?’ Each one of them had his age written between his eyes. But among them there was a man who was the most illuminating of them – or among the most illuminated of them. He said: ‘O Lord! Who is this?’ He said: ‘This is your son Dawud, I wrote forty years for him.’ He said: ‘O Lord! Add to his age.’ He said: ‘That is what I have written for him.’ He said: ‘O Lord! Give him sixty of my years.’ He said: ‘So you shall have it.’” He said: “Then, he resided in Paradise as long as Allah willed, then he was cast from it, so Adam was counting for himself.” He said: “So the Angel of death came to him, and Adam said to him: ‘You are hasty, one-thousand years were written for me.’ He said: ‘Of course! But you gave sixty years to your son Dawud.’ So he rejected, and his offspring rejected, and he forgot, and his offspring forgot.” He said: “So ever since that day, what is written and witnessed has been decreed.”  – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: “When Allah created Adam, He breathed the soul into him, then he sneezed and said: ‘All praise is due to Allah.’ So he praised Allah by His permission. Then His Lord said to him: ‘May Allah have mercy upon you O Adam. Go to those angels – to that gathering of them sitting – so say: 'As-Salamu alaikum.' They said 'Wa Alaikas-Salamu Wa Rahmatullah’. Then he returned to his Lord, He said: ‘This is your greeting and the greeting of your children among each other.’ Then Allah said to him – while His Two Hands were closed – ‘Choose which of them you wish.’ He said: ‘I chose the right My Lord and both of the Hands of my Lord are right, blessed.’ Then He extended it, and there was Adam and his offspring in it.’ So he said: ‘What are these O my Lord?’ He said: ‘These are your offspring?’ Each one of them had his age written between his eyes. But among them there was a man who was the most illuminating of them – or among the most illuminated of them. He said: ‘O Lord! Who is this?’ He said: ‘This is your son Dawud, I wrote forty years for him.’ He said: ‘O Lord! Add to his age.’ He said: ‘That is what I have written for him.’ He said: ‘O Lord! Give him sixty of my years.’ He said: ‘So you shall have it.’” He said: “Then, he resided in Paradise as long as Allah willed, then he was cast from it, so Adam was counting for himself.” He said: “So the Angel of death came to him, and Adam said to him: ‘You are hasty, one-thousand years were written for me.’ He said: ‘Of course! But you gave sixty years to your son Dawud.’ So he rejected, and his offspring rejected, and he forgot, and his offspring forgot.” He said: “So ever since that day, what is written and witnessed has been decreed.”  – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ لَمَّا خَلَقَ اللَّهُ آدَمَ وَنَفَخَ فِيهِ الرُّوحَ عَطَسَ فَقَالَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ فَحَمِدَ اللَّهَ بِإِذْنِ اللَّهِ فَقَالَ لَهُ رَبُّهُ رَحِمَكَ اللَّهُ رَبُّكَ يَا آدَمُ وَقَالَ لَهُ يَا آدَمُ اذْهَبْ إِلَى أُولَئِكَ الْمَلَائِكَةِ إِلَى مَلَأٍ مِنْهُمْ جُلُوسٍ فَقُلِ السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْ فَذَهَبَ فَقَالُوا وَعَلَيْكَ السَّلَامُ وَرَحْمَةُ اللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ ثُمَّ رَجَعَ إِلَى رَبِّهِ فَقَالَ هَذِهِ تَحِيَّتُكَ وَتَحِيَّةُ بَنِيكَ وَبَنِيهِمْ فَقَالَ اللَّهُ لَهُ وَيَدَاهُ مَقْبُوضَتَانِ اخْتَرْ أَيَّهُمَا شِئْتَ فَقَالَ اخْتَرْتُ يَمِينَ رَبِّي وَكِلْتَا يَدَيْ رَبِّي يَمِينٌ مُبَارَكَةٌ ثُمَّ بَسَطَهَا فَإِذَا فِيهَا آدَمُ وَذُرِّيَّتُهُ فَقَالَ أَيْ رَبِّ مَا هَؤُلَاءِ؟ قَالَ ذُرِّيَّتُكَ فَإِذَا كُلُّ إِنْسَانٍ مَكْتُوبٌ عُمْرُهُ بَيْنَ عَيْنَيْهِ وَإِذَا فِيهِمْ رَجُلٌ أَضْوَؤُهُمْ أَوْ قَالَ مِنْ أَضْوَئِهِمْ لَمْ يُكْتَبْ لَهُ إِلَّا أَرْبَعِينَ سَنَةً قَالَ يَا رَبِّ زِدْ فِي عُمْرِهِ قَالَ ذَاكَ الَّذِي كُتِبَ لَهُ قَالَ فَإِنِّي قَدْ جَعَلْتُ لَهُ مِنْ عُمْرِي سِتِّينَ سَنَةً قَالَ أَنْتَ وَذَاكَ قَالَ ثُمَّ أُسْكِنَ الْجَنَّةَ مَا شَاءَ اللَّهُ ثُمَّ أُهْبِطَ مِنْهَا آدَمُ يَعُدُّ لِنَفْسِهِ فَأَتَاهُ مَلَكُ الْمَوْتِ فَقَالَ لَهُ آدَمُ قَدْ عَجِلْتَ قَدْ كُتِبَ لِي أَلْفُ سَنَةٍ قَالَ بَلَى وَلَكِنَّكَ جَعَلْتَ لِابْنِكَ دَاوُدَ مِنْهَا سِتِّينَ سَنَةً فَجَحَدَ فَجَحَدَتْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُ وَنَسِيَ فَنَسِيَتْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُ فَيَوْمَئِذٍ أُمْرِنَا بِالْكِتَابِ وَالشُّهُودِ «» هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ فَقَدِ احْتَجَّ بِالْحَارِثِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي ذُبَابٍ وَقَدْ رَوَاهُ عَنْهُ غَيْرُ صَفْوَانَ وَإِنَّمَا خَرَّجْتُهُ مِنْ حَدِيثِ صَفْوَانَ لِأَنِّي عَلَوْتُ فِيهِ وَلَهُ شَاهِدٌ صَحِيحٌعلى شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb \u003e Bakkār b. Qutaybah al-Qāḍī Bimiṣr \u003e Ṣafwān b. ʿĪsá al-Qāḍī \u003e al-Ḥārith b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Abū Dhubāb \u003e Saʿīd b. Abū Saʿīd al-Maqburī \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ ثنا بَكَّارُ بْنُ قُتَيْبَةَ الْقَاضِي بِمِصْرَ ثنا صَفْوَانُ بْنُ عِيسَى الْقَاضِي ثنا الْحَارِثُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي ذُبَابٍ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ الْمَقْبُرِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 215

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: This tradition has also been narrated on the authority of ‘A’ishah through a different chain.  – Sound
body: This tradition has also been narrated on the authority of ‘A’ishah through a different chain.  – Sound
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ نَحْوَهُصحيح – صحيح
chain: Abū Bakr Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Faqīh al-Shāshī Fī Ākharīn \u003e Abū Bakr ʿArūbah \u003e Makhlad b. Mālik \u003e Abū Khālid al-Aḥmar \u003e Dāwud b. Abū Hind \u003e al-Shaʿbī \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الْفَقِيهُ الشَّاشِيُّ فِي آخَرِينَ قَالُوا ثنا أَبُو بَكْرٍ عَرُوبَةُ ثنا مَخْلَدُ بْنُ مَالِكٍ ثنا أَبُو خَالِدٍ الْأَحْمَرُ عَنْ دَاوُدَ بْنِ أَبِي هِنْدٍ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 216

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: "To be solitude for Ibrahim, words for Musa, and visions for Muhammad ﷺ ." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī
body: "To be solitude for Ibrahim, words for Musa, and visions for Muhammad ﷺ ." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī
arabic: أَنْ يَكُونَ الْخُلَّةُ لِإِبْرَاهِيمَ وَالْكَلَامُ لِمُوسَى وَالرُّؤْيَةُ لِمُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الْبُخَارِيِّ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ وَلَهُ شَاهِدٌ صَحِيحٌ عَنْ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ فِي الرُّؤْيَةِ» على شرط البخاري – على شرط البخاري
chain: Abū Bakr b. Isḥāq al-Faqīh \u003e Hishām b. ʿAlī al-Sadūsī \u003e Sahl b. Bakkār \u003e Hishām b. ʿAbdullāh \u003e al-Ḥusayn b. Muḥammad b. Ziyād \u003e Muḥammad b. Bashhār And Muḥammad b. al-Muthanná \u003e Muʿādh b. Hishām from my father \u003e Qatādah \u003e ʿIkrimah \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās \u003e Ataʿjabūn \u003e Yakūn
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْفَقِيهُ أَنْبَأَ هِشَامُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ السَّدُوسِيُّ ثنا سَهْلُ بْنُ بَكَّارٍ ثنا هِشَامُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ وَأَخْبَرَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى قَالَا ثنا مُعَاذُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ عِكْرِمَةَ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ «أَتَعْجَبُونَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 217

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: Mohammed ﷺ saw his Lord, and he had a third witness with a reliable chain of narrators.
body: Mohammed ﷺ saw his Lord, and he had a third witness with a reliable chain of narrators.
arabic: رَأَى مُحَمَّدٌ ﷺ رَبَّهُ «» وَلَهُ شَاهِدٌ ثَالِثٌ صَحِيحُ الْإِسْنَادِ
chain: Ṣāliḥ b. Muḥammad b. Ḥabīb al-Ḥāfiẓ \u003e Muḥammad b. al-Ṣabbāḥ
chainArabic: أَخْبَرْنَاهُ أَبُو نَصْرٍ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ سَهْلٍ الْفَقِيهُ وَأَبُو الْحَسَنِ عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الشَّرَغَاوَشُونِي الْبُخَارِيَّانِ بِبُخَارَى قَالَا ثنا صَالِحُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَبِيبٍ الْحَافِظُ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الصَّبَّاحِ وَحدثنا أَبُو سَعِيدٍ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ الثَّقَفِيُّ ثنا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى الْحُلْوَانِيُّ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الصَّبَّاحِ الدَّوْلَابِيُّ ثنا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ زَكَرِيَّا عَنْ عَاصِمٍ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ وَعِكْرِمَةَ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 218

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: "Muhammad ﷺ saw his Lord."
body: "Muhammad ﷺ saw his Lord."
arabic: «قَدْ رَأَى مُحَمَّدٌ ﷺ رَبَّهُ»
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Aḥmad al-Maḥbūbī Bimarw \u003e Saʿīd b. Masʿūd \u003e Yazīd b. Hārūn \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAmr \u003e Abū Salamah \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ الْمَحْبُوبِيُّ بِمَرْوَ ثنا سَعِيدُ بْنُ مَسْعُودٍ ثنا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ أَنْبَأَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَمْرٍو عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 219

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The translation of the given Arabic text into English is: "That the Messenger of Allah, peace be upon him, saw Gabriel (Jibril), peace be upon him, and these news that I mentioned are all authentic, and Allah knows best."
body: The translation of the given Arabic text into English is: "That the Messenger of Allah, peace be upon him, saw Gabriel (Jibril), peace be upon him, and these news that I mentioned are all authentic, and Allah knows best."
arabic: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ رَأَى جَبْرِيلَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ «وَهَذِهِ الْأَخْبَارُ الَّتِي ذَكَرْتُهَا صَحِيحَةٌ كُلُّهَا وَاللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ»
chain: Abū Bakr Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh al-Shāfiʿī \u003e Isḥāq b. al-Ḥasan \u003e Abū Ḥudhayfah \u003e Sufyān \u003e Ibn Jurayj \u003e ʿAṭāʾ \u003e Ibn ʿAbbās
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الشَّافِعِيُّ ثنا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ ثنا أَبُو حُذَيْفَةَ ثنا سُفْيَانُ عَنِ ابْنِ جُرَيْجٍ عَنْ عَطَاءٍ عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ رَآهُ مَرَّتَيْنِ حَدِيثُ كَذَا قَدِ اعْتَمَدَهُ الشَّيْخَانِ فِي هَذَا الْبَابِ أَخْبَارُ عَائِشَةَ بِنْتِ الصِّدِّيقِ وَأُبَيِّ بْنِ كَعْبٍ وَعَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ وَأَبِي ذَرٍّ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 220

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "To the prophets belong golden pulpits." He said, "They sit and my pulpit remains empty. I do not sit or recline on it, standing before my Lord, fearing that He may raise me up to Paradise and leave my nation behind. So I say, 'O Lord, my nation, my nation.' And Allah, the Almighty and Exalted, says, 'O Muhammad, what do you want me to do with your nation?' So I say, 'O Lord, hasten their reckoning.' So they are called and held accountable. Among them are those who enter Paradise by the mercy of Allah, and among them are those who enter Paradise by my intercession. And I will continue to intercede until I am given a parchment with the names of men who have been sent to the Fire, and I will present it to Malik, the guardian of the Fire. He will say, 'O Muhammad, have you left anything in the Fire due to the anger of your Lord against your nation?' Then I will give him the remaining portion." – Repudiated
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "To the prophets belong golden pulpits." He said, "They sit and my pulpit remains empty. I do not sit or recline on it, standing before my Lord, fearing that He may raise me up to Paradise and leave my nation behind. So I say, 'O Lord, my nation, my nation.' And Allah, the Almighty and Exalted, says, 'O Muhammad, what do you want me to do with your nation?' So I say, 'O Lord, hasten their reckoning.' So they are called and held accountable. Among them are those who enter Paradise by the mercy of Allah, and among them are those who enter Paradise by my intercession. And I will continue to intercede until I am given a parchment with the names of men who have been sent to the Fire, and I will present it to Malik, the guardian of the Fire. He will say, 'O Muhammad, have you left anything in the Fire due to the anger of your Lord against your nation?' Then I will give him the remaining portion." – Repudiated
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «لِلْأَنْبِيَاءِ مَنَابِرُ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ» قَالَ فَيَجْلِسُونَ عَلَيْهَا وَيَبْقَى مِنْبَرِي لَا أَجْلِسُ عَلَيْهِ أَوْ لَا أَقْعُدُ عَلَيْهِ قَائِمًا بَيْنَ يَدَيْ رَبِّي مَخَافَةَ أَنْ يَبْعَثَ بِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ وَيُبْقِي أُمَّتِي مِنْ بَعْدِي فَأَقُولُ يَا رَبِّ أُمَّتِي أُمَّتِي فَيَقُولُ اللَّهُ ﷻ يَا مُحَمَّدُ مَا تُرِيدُ أَنْ أَصْنَعَ بِأُمَّتِكَ فَأَقُولُ يَا رَبِّ عَجِّلْ حِسَابَهُمْ فَيُدْعَى بِهِمْ فَيُحَاسَبُونَ فَمِنْهُمْ مَنْ يَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ بِرَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ وَمِنْهُمْ مَنْ يَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ بِشَفَاعَتِي فَمَا أَزَالُ أُشَفَّعُ حَتَّى أُعْطَى صِكَاكًا بِرِجَالٍ قَدْ بُعِثَ بِهِمْ إِلَى النَّارِ وَآتِي مَالِكًا خَازِنَ النَّارِ فَيَقُولُ يَا مُحَمَّدُ مَا تَرَكْتَ لِلنَّارِ لِغَضَبِ رَبِّكَ فِي أُمَّتِكَ مِنْ بَقِيَّةٍ «» هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحُ الْإِسْنَادِ غَيْرَ أَنَّ الشَّيْخَيْنِ لَمْ يَحْتَجَّا بِمُحَمَّدِ بْنِ ثَابِتٍ الْبُنَانِيِّ وَهُوَ قَلِيلُ الْحَدِيثِ يَجْمَعُ حَدِيثَهُ وَالْحَدِيثُ غَرِيبٌ فِي أَخْبَارِ الشَّفَاعَةِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ الحديث منكر – ضعيف منكر
chain: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Saʿīd al-Rāzī \u003e Abū Zurʿah ʿUbaydullāh b. ʿAbd al-Karīm al-Rāzī And Ḥdthnā Abū ʿAlī al-Ḥusayn b. ʿAlī al-Ḥāfiẓ Imlāʾ \u003e Ibrāhīm b. ʿAbdullāh b. Ayyūb al-Mukharrimī
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ الرَّازِيُّ ثنا أَبُو زُرْعَةَ عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْكَرِيمِ الرَّازِيُّ وَحدثنا أَبُو عَلِيٍّ الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الْحَافِظُ إِمْلَاءً ثنا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ أَيُّوبَ الْمُخَرِّمِيُّ وَأَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو أَحْمَدَ بَكْرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الصَّيْرَفِيُّ بِمَرْوَ ثنا أَبُو الْمُوَجِّهِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَمْرٍو الْفَزَارِيُّ قَالُوا ثنا سَعِيدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْجَرْمِيُّ ثنا عَبْدُ الْوَاحِدِ بْنُ وَاصِلٍ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ ثَابِتٍ الْبُنَانِيُّ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الْحَارِثِ بْنِ نَوْفَلٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 221

chapter.englishTitle: As for the story of Samurah ibn Jundub

englishRaw: I heard Awf ibn Malik Al-Ashja'i say: "We stayed with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in a place for the night. I woke up during the night, and found that there was something longer than the back of my saddle that had stuck to the ground, due to every person and his camel being stuck to the ground. So I walked through the people until I came to the sleeping place of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , but he was not there. I placed my hand on his bed and found that it was cold. I went through the people and said, 'Indeed, we belong to Allah, and indeed to Him we will return.' The news of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ spread until I left the whole camp and saw a darkness. I threw a stone and moved towards the darkness. Then I saw Mu'adh ibn Jabal and Abu 'Ubaydah ibn al-Jarrah in front of me, and there was a sound between us like the clapping of sandals or the sound of pebbles when they are hit by the wind. Some of us said to others, 'O people, remain steady until the morning comes or the Messenger of Allah ﷺ comes to you.' So we remained as long as Allah willed, then he called out, 'Did Mu'adh ibn Jabal, Abu 'Ubaydah ibn al-Jarrah, and Awf ibn Malik come?' So we said, 'Yes.' He came towards us and we came out to him. We did not ask him anything, nor did he inform us anything, until he sat on his bed and said, 'Do you know what my Lord has chosen for me tonight?' We said, 'Allah and His Messenger know best.' He said, 'Indeed, He has chosen to give me a choice between having half of my Ummah enter Paradise or intercession, and I have chosen intercession.' So we said, 'O Messenger of Allah, supplicate to Allah to make us among its people.' He said, 'It is for every Muslim.'"
body: I heard Awf ibn Malik Al-Ashja'i say: "We stayed with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in a place for the night. I woke up during the night, and found that there was something longer than the back of my saddle that had stuck to the ground, due to every person and his camel being stuck to the ground. So I walked through the people until I came to the sleeping place of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , but he was not there. I placed my hand on his bed and found that it was cold. I went through the people and said, 'Indeed, we belong to Allah, and indeed to Him we will return.' The news of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ spread until I left the whole camp and saw a darkness. I threw a stone and moved towards the darkness. Then I saw Mu'adh ibn Jabal and Abu 'Ubaydah ibn al-Jarrah in front of me, and there was a sound between us like the clapping of sandals or the sound of pebbles when they are hit by the wind. Some of us said to others, 'O people, remain steady until the morning comes or the Messenger of Allah ﷺ comes to you.' So we remained as long as Allah willed, then he called out, 'Did Mu'adh ibn Jabal, Abu 'Ubaydah ibn al-Jarrah, and Awf ibn Malik come?' So we said, 'Yes.' He came towards us and we came out to him. We did not ask him anything, nor did he inform us anything, until he sat on his bed and said, 'Do you know what my Lord has chosen for me tonight?' We said, 'Allah and His Messenger know best.' He said, 'Indeed, He has chosen to give me a choice between having half of my Ummah enter Paradise or intercession, and I have chosen intercession.' So we said, 'O Messenger of Allah, supplicate to Allah to make us among its people.' He said, 'It is for every Muslim.'"
