arabic: يَا أَنَسُ مَا تَقُولُ فِي الْحَوْضِ؟ قَالَ قُلْتُ «مَا حَسِبْتُ أَنِّي أَعِيشُ حَتَّى أَرَى مِثْلَكُمْ يَمْتَرُونَ فِي الْحَوْضِ لَقَدْ تَرَكْتُ بَعْدِي عَجَائِزَ مَا تُصَلِّي وَاحِدَةٌ مِنْهُنَّ صَلَاةً إِلَّا سَأَلْتَ رَبَّهَا أَنْ يُورِدَهَا حَوْضَ مُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ وَلَهُ عَنْ حُمَيْدٍ شَاهِدٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِهِمَا»
chain: Abū Bakr b. Isḥāq \u003e Abū al-Muthanná And Muḥammad b. Ayyūb \u003e Musaddad \u003e Khālid b. al-Ḥārith \u003e Ḥumayd \u003e Anas
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ ثنا أَبُو الْمُثَنَّى وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَيُّوبَ قَالَا ثنا مُسَدَّدٌ ثنا خَالِدُ بْنُ الْحَارِثِ ثنا حُمَيْدٌ عَنْ أَنَسٍ قَالَ دَخَلْتُ عَلَى عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ وَهُمْ يَتَرَاجَعُونَ فِي ذِكْرِ الْحَوْضِ قَالَ فَقَالَ جَاءَكُمْ أَنَسٌ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 261

chapter.englishTitle: Ashath b. Jabir

englishRaw: I entered upon Ubaidullah bin Ziyad while they were discussing and reminiscing about the pond, then he mentioned it in a similar manner to them. – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: I entered upon Ubaidullah bin Ziyad while they were discussing and reminiscing about the pond, then he mentioned it in a similar manner to them. – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ وَهُمْ يَتَرَاجَعُونَ فِي ذِكْرِ الْحَوْضِ ثُمَّ ذَكَرَهُ بِمِثْلِهِعلى شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū al-Muwajjah \u003e ʿAbdān \u003e ʿAbd al-Wahhāb b. ʿAbd al-Ḥamīd \u003e Ḥumayd \u003e Anas
chainArabic: أَخْبَرْنَاهُ أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ السَّيَّارِيُّ بِمَرْوَ ثنا أَبُو الْمُوَجَّهِ ثنا عَبْدَانُ ثنا عَبْدُ الْوَهَّابِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْحَمِيدٍ ثنا حُمَيْدٌ عَنْ أَنَسٍ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 262

chapter.englishTitle: Ashath b. Jabir

englishRaw: "He was sitting by the Prophet's door ﷺ when he came out and we were sitting. He said, 'Listen.' We said, 'We are listening, O Messenger of Allah.' He said, 'Verily, there will be rulers after me, so do not believe them in their lies, nor support them in their cruelty. Whoever believes them in their lies and supports them in their cruelty, he will not meet me at the Fountain (in Paradise).'" – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: "He was sitting by the Prophet's door ﷺ when he came out and we were sitting. He said, 'Listen.' We said, 'We are listening, O Messenger of Allah.' He said, 'Verily, there will be rulers after me, so do not believe them in their lies, nor support them in their cruelty. Whoever believes them in their lies and supports them in their cruelty, he will not meet me at the Fountain (in Paradise).'" – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: أَنَّهُ كَانَ قَاعِدًا عَلَى بَابِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ فَخَرَجَ وَنَحْنُ قُعُودٌ فَقَالَ «اسْمَعُوا» قُلْنَا سَمِعْنَا يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ قَالَ «إِنَّهُ سَيَكُونُ أُمَرَاءُ مِنْ بَعْدِي فَلَا تُصَدِّقُوهُمْ بِكَذِبِهِمْ وَلَا تُعِينُوهُمْ عَلَى ظُلْمِهِمْ فَإِنَّهُ مَنْ صَدَّقَهُمْ بِكَذِبِهِمْ وَأَعَانَهُمْ عَلَى ظُلْمِهِمْ فَلَنْ يَرِدَ عَلَيَّ الْحَوْضَ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» وَشَاهِدَهُ الْحَدِيثُ الْمَشْهُورُ عَنْ الشَّعْبِيِّ عَنْ كَعْبِ بْنِ عُجْرَةَ مَعَ الْخِلَافِ عَلَيْهِ فِيهِعلى شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb \u003e al-ʿAbbās b. Muḥammad al-Dūrī \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Bakr al-Sahmī \u003e Ḥātim b. Abū Ṣaghīrah \u003e Simāk b. Ḥarb \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Khabbāb \u003e Khabbāb
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ ثنا الْعَبَّاسُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الدُّورِيُّ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ بَكْرٍ السَّهْمِيُّ ثنا حَاتِمُ بْنُ أَبِي صَغِيرَةَ عَنْ سِمَاكِ بْنِ حَرْبٍ أَنَّ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ بْنَ خَبَّابٍ أَخْبَرَهُمْ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي خَبَّابٌ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 263

chapter.englishTitle: Ashath b. Jabir

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out to us, we were made up of nine; five and four. The first of the numbers for the Arabs, and the latter for the non-Arabs. He said: 'Listen, have you heard that after me there will leaders, whoever enters upon them and condones to their lies, and supports them in their oppression, then he is not from me and I am not from him, and he shall not drink with me from the Hawd. And whoever does not enter upon them, nor help them in their oppression, nor condones to their lies, then he is from me, and I am from him, and he shall drink with me at the Hawd.'"
body: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out to us, we were made up of nine; five and four. The first of the numbers for the Arabs, and the latter for the non-Arabs. He said: 'Listen, have you heard that after me there will leaders, whoever enters upon them and condones to their lies, and supports them in their oppression, then he is not from me and I am not from him, and he shall not drink with me from the Hawd. And whoever does not enter upon them, nor help them in their oppression, nor condones to their lies, then he is from me, and I am from him, and he shall drink with me at the Hawd.'"
arabic: خَرَجَ عَلَيْنَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ وَنَحْنُ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ خَمْسَةٌ مِنَ الْعَرَبِ وَأَرْبَعَةٌ مِنَ الْعَجَمِ فَقَالَ «أَتَسْمَعُونَ؟» قُلْنَا سَمِعْنَا مَرَّتَيْنِ قَالَ «اسْمَعُوا إِنَّهُ سَيَكُونُ بَعْدِي أُمَرَاءُ فَمَنْ دَخَلَ عَلَيْهِمْ فَصَدَّقَهُمْ بِكَذِبِهِمْ وَأَعَانَهُمْ عَلَى ظُلْمِهِمْ فَلَيْسَ مِنِّي وَلَسْتُ مِنْهُ وَلَيْسَ بِوَارِدٍ عَلَيَّ الْحَوْضَ وَمَنْ لَمْ يَدْخُلْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَمْ يُصَدِّقْهُمْ بِكَذِبِهِمْ وَلَمْ يُعِنْهُمْ عَلَى ظُلْمِهِمْ فَهُوَ مِنِّي وَأَنَا مِنْهُ وَسَيَرِدُ عَلَيَّ الْحَوْضَ» رَوَاهُ مِسْعَرُ بْنُ كِدَامٍ وَسُفْيَانُ الثَّوْرِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي حَصِينٍ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ الْعَدَوِيِّ عَنْ كَعْبِ بْنِ عُجْرَةَ «أَمَا حَدِيثُ الثَّوْرِيِّ»
chain: Muḥammad b. Muslim al-Wāsiṭī \u003e Muḥammad b. Sābiq \u003e Mālik b. Mighwal \u003e Abū Ḥaṣīn \u003e al-Shaʿbī \u003e Kaʿb b. ʿUjrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرْنَاهُ أَبُو بَكْرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ الْبَزَّارُ بِبَغْدَادَ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ الْوَاسِطِيُّ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سَابِقٍ ثنا مَالِكُ بْنُ مِغْوَلٍ عَنْ أَبِي حَصِينٍ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ عَنْ كَعْبِ بْنِ عُجْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 264

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: "The Messenger of Allah came out to us, and there were nine of us. He said; 'After me there will be rulers, whoever believes in their lies and helps them in their wrongdoing is not of me, and I am not of him, and he will not come to me at the Cistern. Whoever does not believe their lies and does not help them in their wrongdoing, he is of me, and I am of hi, and he will come to me at the Cistern."'
body: "The Messenger of Allah came out to us, and there were nine of us. He said; 'After me there will be rulers, whoever believes in their lies and helps them in their wrongdoing is not of me, and I am not of him, and he will not come to me at the Cistern. Whoever does not believe their lies and does not help them in their wrongdoing, he is of me, and I am of hi, and he will come to me at the Cistern."'
arabic: خَرَجَ عَلَيْنَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ وَنَحْنُ تِسْعَةٌ وَبَيْنَنَا وَسَائِدُ مِنْ أَدَمٍ أَحْمَرَ فَقَالَ «إِنَّهُ سَيَكُونُ بَعْدِي أُمَرَاءُ فَمَنْ صَدَّقَهُمْ بِكَذِبِهِمْ وَأَعَانَهُمْ عَلَى ظُلْمِهِمْ فَلَيْسَ مِنِّي وَلَسْتُ مِنْهُ وَلَنْ يَرِدَ عَلَيَّ الْحَوْضَ وَمَنْ لَمْ يُصَدِّقْهُمْ بِكَذِبِهِمْ وَلَمْ يُعِنْهُمْ عَلَى ظُلْمِهِمْ فَهُوَ مِنِّي وَأَنَا مِنْهُ وَسَيَرِدُ عَلَيَّ الْحَوْضَ» وَقَدْ شَهِدَ جَابِرُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَوْلَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ هَذَا لِكَعْبِ بْنِ عُجْرَةَ
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Aḥmad b. Ḥanbal \u003e Hārūn b. Isḥāq al-Hamdānī \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Wahhāb al-Qannād \u003e Sufyān \u003e Misʿar \u003e Abū Ḥaṣīn \u003e al-Shaʿbī \u003e ʿĀṣim al-ʿAdawī \u003e Kaʿb b. ʿUjrah
chainArabic: فَأَخْبَرَنَاهُ أَبُو مُحَمَّدٍ الْإِسْفَرَايِينِيُّ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ ثنا هَارُونُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْهَمْدَانِيُّ حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْوَهَّابِ الْقَنَّادُ ثنا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ مِسْعَرٍ عَنْ أَبِي حَصِينٍ عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ الْعَدَوِيِّ عَنْ كَعْبِ بْنِ عُجْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 265

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said to Ka'ab ibn 'Ujrah, "May Allah protect you, O Ka'ab ibn 'Ujrah, from the rule of fools." Ka'ab asked, "What is the rule of fools?" The Prophet replied, "They are rulers who will come after me, neither following my guidance nor adhering to my Sunnah. Whoever believes in their lies and supports them in their injustice is not one of me, and I am not one of them. They will not join me at my Fountain. But those who do not believe in their lies and do not support them in their injustice are truly from me, and I am from them. They will join me at my Fountain. O Ka'ab ibn 'Ujrah, fasting is a shield, charity extinguishes sins, and prayers are either an offering or a proof."
body: The Prophet ﷺ said to Ka'ab ibn 'Ujrah, "May Allah protect you, O Ka'ab ibn 'Ujrah, from the rule of fools." Ka'ab asked, "What is the rule of fools?" The Prophet replied, "They are rulers who will come after me, neither following my guidance nor adhering to my Sunnah. Whoever believes in their lies and supports them in their injustice is not one of me, and I am not one of them. They will not join me at my Fountain. But those who do not believe in their lies and do not support them in their injustice are truly from me, and I am from them. They will join me at my Fountain. O Ka'ab ibn 'Ujrah, fasting is a shield, charity extinguishes sins, and prayers are either an offering or a proof."
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ قَالَ لِكَعْبِ بْنِ عُجْرَةَ «أَعَاذَكَ اللَّهُ يَا كَعْبَ بْنَ عُجْرَةَ مِنْ إِمَارَةِ السُّفَهَاءِ» قَالَ وَمَا إِمَارَةُ السُّفَهَاءِ؟ قَالَ أُمَرَاءُ يَكُونُونَ مِنْ بَعْدِي لَا يَهْتَدُونَ بِهَدْيِي وَلَا يَسْتَنُّونَ بِسُنَّتِي فَمَنْ صَدَّقَهُمْ بِكَذِبِهِمْ وَأَعَانَهُمْ عَلَى ظُلْمِهِمْ فَأُولَئِكَ لَيْسُوا مِنِّي وَلَسْتُ مِنْهُمْ وَلَا يَرِدُونَ عَلَيَّ حَوْضِي وَمَنْ لَمْ يُصَدِّقْهُمْ بِكَذِبِهِمْ وَلَمْ يُعِنْهُمْ عَلَى ظُلْمِهِمْ فَأُولَئِكَ مِنِّي وَأَنَا مِنْهُمْ وَسَيَرِدُونَ عَلَيَّ حَوْضِي يَا كَعْبَ بْنَ عُجْرَةَ الصَّوْمُ جُنَّةٌ وَالصَّدَقَةُ تُطْفِئُ الْخَطِيئَةَ وَالصَّلَاةُ قُرْبَانٌ أَوْ قَالَ بُرْهَانٌ
chain: Aḥmad b. Jaʿfar al-Qaṭīʿī \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Aḥmad b. Ḥanbal from my father \u003e ʿAbd al-Razzāq \u003e Maʿmar \u003e Ibn Khuthaym \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Sābiṭ \u003e Jābir b. ʿAbdullāh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْقَطِيعِيُّ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي ثنا عَبْدُ الرَّزَّاقِ أَنْبَأَ مَعْمَرٌ عَنِ ابْنِ خُثَيْمٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ سَابِطٍ عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 266

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "I entered Paradise and there I saw a river, on the banks of which were tents made of pearls. I struck the water with my hand and it emitted a fragrance of musk. I said to Jibril, 'What is this?' He replied, 'This is Al-Kawthar which your Lord, Exalted and Mighty, has granted you.'" – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "I entered Paradise and there I saw a river, on the banks of which were tents made of pearls. I struck the water with my hand and it emitted a fragrance of musk. I said to Jibril, 'What is this?' He replied, 'This is Al-Kawthar which your Lord, Exalted and Mighty, has granted you.'" – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ دَخَلْتُ الْجَنَّةَ فَإِذَا أَنَا بِنَهْرٍ يَجْرِي حَافَّتَاهُ خِيَامُ اللُّؤْلُؤِ فَضَرَبْتُ بِيَدِي إِلَى مَجْرَى الْمَاءِ فَإِذَا مِسْكٌ أَذْفَرُ فَقُلْتُ لِجِبْرِيلَ مَا هَذَا؟ قَالَ هَذَا الْكَوْثَرُ الَّذِي أَعْطَاكَهُ رَبُّكَ ﷻ «» هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ بِهَذَا اللَّفْظِ على شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū ʿAbdullāh Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb al-Ḥāfiẓ \u003e Yaḥyá b. Muḥammad \u003e ʿAyyāsh b. al-Walīd al-Raqqām \u003e ʿAbd al-Aʿlá b. ʿAbd al-Aʿlá \u003e Ḥumayd \u003e Anas
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ الْحَافِظُ ثنا يَحْيَى بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ ثنا عَيَّاشُ بْنُ الْوَلِيدِ الرَّقَّامُ ثنا عَبْدُ الْأَعْلَى بْنُ عَبْدِ الْأَعْلَى ثنا حُمَيْدٌ عَنْ أَنَسٍ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 267

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said, "Paradise has one hundred levels, between each two levels is like the distance between the heavens and the earth. And the highest level of Paradise is Al-Firdaus, and from it springs the rivers of Paradise. So when you ask Allah, ask Him for Al-Firdaus."
body: The Prophet ﷺ said, "Paradise has one hundred levels, between each two levels is like the distance between the heavens and the earth. And the highest level of Paradise is Al-Firdaus, and from it springs the rivers of Paradise. So when you ask Allah, ask Him for Al-Firdaus."
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ قَالَ «الْجَنَّةُ مِائَةُ دَرَجَةٍ بَيْنَ كُلِّ دَرَجَتَيْنِ كَمَا بَيْنَ السَّمَاءِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَالْفِرْدَوْسُ مِنْ أَعْلَاهَا دَرَجَةً وَمِنْهَا تَفَجَّرُ أَنْهَارُ الْجَنَّةِ فَإِذَا سَأَلْتُمُ اللَّهَ فَاسْأَلُوهُ الْفِرْدَوْسَ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» وَلَهُ شَاهِدٌ صَحِيحٌ بِمِثْلِ هَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ وَأَبِي سَعِيدٍ
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb \u003e Muḥammad b. Isḥāq al-Ṣaghānī \u003e Surayj b. al-Nuʿmān \u003e Fulayḥ b. Sulaymān \u003e Hilāl b. ʿAlī \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. Yasār \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الصَّغَانِيُّ ثنا سُرَيْجُ بْنُ النُّعْمَانِ ثنا فُلَيْحُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ هِلَالِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 268

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: About the Prophet, peace be upon him, in a similar manner, it was narrated with an authentic chain of narrators from Ubada bin As-Samit, following their conditions. – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: About the Prophet, peace be upon him, in a similar manner, it was narrated with an authentic chain of narrators from Ubada bin As-Samit, following their conditions. – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ نَحْوَهُ وَكَذَلِكَ رُوِيَ بِإِسْنَادٍ صَحِيحٍ عَنْ عُبَادَةَ بْنِ الصَّامِتِعلى شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. Muḥammad b. Nājiyah \u003e Hārūn b. Maʿrūf \u003e Ibn Wahb \u003e Fulayḥ b. Sulaymān \u003e Hilāl b. ʿAlī \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. Yasār \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرْنَاهُ أَبُو مُحَمَّدِ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْمُزَنِيُّ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ نَاجِيَةَ ثنا هَارُونُ بْنُ مَعْرُوفٍ ثنا ابْنُ وَهْبٍ أَخْبَرَنِي فُلَيْحُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ هِلَالِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 269

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said, "Paradise has one hundred levels, between each two levels there is a distance like that between the heavens and the earth. And Al-Firdaus is the highest level of Paradise, from which the rivers of Paradise spring forth. So when you ask Allah, ask Him for Al-Firdaus."
body: The Prophet ﷺ said, "Paradise has one hundred levels, between each two levels there is a distance like that between the heavens and the earth. And Al-Firdaus is the highest level of Paradise, from which the rivers of Paradise spring forth. So when you ask Allah, ask Him for Al-Firdaus."
arabic: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ قَالَ «الْجَنَّةُ مِائَةُ دَرَجَةٍ مَا بَيْنَ كُلِّ دَرَجَتَيْنِ كَمَا بَيْنَ السَّمَاءِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَالْفِرْدَوْسُ مِنْ أَعْلَاهَا دَرَجَةً وَمِنْهَا تَفَجَّرُ أَنْهَارُ الْجَنَّةِ فَإِذَا سَأَلْتُمُ اللَّهَ فَاسْأَلُوهُ الْفِرْدَوْسَ»
chain: Abū Bakr b. Isḥāq \u003e Muḥammad b. Ghālib \u003e ʿAffān b. Muslim And ʾAbū al-Walīd al-Ṭayālisī \u003e Hammām \u003e Zayd b. Aslam \u003e ʿAṭāʾ b. Yasār \u003e ʿUbādah b. al-Ṣāmit
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَاهُ أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ أَنْبَأَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ غَالِبٍ ثنا عَفَّانُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ وَأَبُو الْوَلِيدِ الطَّيَالِسِيُّ قَالَا ثنا هَمَّامٌ عَنْ زَيْدِ بْنِ أَسْلَمَ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ عَنْ عُبَادَةَ بْنِ الصَّامِتِ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 270

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: ʿIn Paradise there are chambers the inside of which can be seen from the outside and the outside can be seen from the inside.ʿ A Bedouin said: O Messenger of Allah ﷺ, who are they for? He said: “For the one who speaks kind words, feeds people and prays to Allah at night when people are asleep.”  – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: ʿIn Paradise there are chambers the inside of which can be seen from the outside and the outside can be seen from the inside.ʿ A Bedouin said: O Messenger of Allah ﷺ, who are they for? He said: “For the one who speaks kind words, feeds people and prays to Allah at night when people are asleep.”  – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ «إِنَّ فِي الْجَنَّةِ غُرَفًا يُرَى ظَاهِرُهَا مِنْ بَاطِنِهَا وَبَاطِنُهَا مِنْ ظَاهِرِهَا» فَقَالَ أَبُو مَالِكٍ الْأَشْعَرِيُّ لِمَنْ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ؟ قَالَ «لِمَنْ أَطَابَ الْكَلَامَ وَأَطْعَمَ الطَّعَامَ وَبَاتَ قَائِمًا وَالنَّاسُ نِيَامٌ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ فَقَدِ احْتَجَّا جَمِيعًا بِحُيَيٍّ وَهُوَ أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الْمَذْحِجِيُّ صَاحِبُ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ وَيُقَالُ مَوْلَاهُ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» على شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Aḥmad b. Muḥammad b. Ismāʿīl b. Mihrān from my father \u003e Hārūn b. Saʿīd al-Aylī \u003e Ibn Wahb \u003e Ḥuyay \u003e Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥman \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. ʿAmr
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ ثنا أَبِي ثنا هَارُونُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ الْأَيْلِيُّ ثنا ابْنُ وَهْبٍ حَدَّثَنِي حُيَيٌّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 271

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: From Anas, in his statement {by the Lote Tree of the Utmost Boundary}, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "A tree was raised for me whose boundaries reach the seventh heaven. Its fruits are like the baskets of Hiraa, and its leaves are like the ears of elephants. Two visible rivers flow from its trunk, and two hidden rivers flow from it." I said: "O Jibril, what are these?" He said: "As for the hidden rivers, they are in Paradise, and as for the visible rivers, they are the Nile and the Euphrates." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: From Anas, in his statement {by the Lote Tree of the Utmost Boundary}, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "A tree was raised for me whose boundaries reach the seventh heaven. Its fruits are like the baskets of Hiraa, and its leaves are like the ears of elephants. Two visible rivers flow from its trunk, and two hidden rivers flow from it." I said: "O Jibril, what are these?" He said: "As for the hidden rivers, they are in Paradise, and as for the visible rivers, they are the Nile and the Euphrates." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: عَنْ أَنَسٍ فِي قَوْلِهِ ﷻ {عِنْدَ سِدْرَةِ الْمُنْتَهَى} [النجم 14] أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ رُفِعَتْ لِي سِدْرَةٌ مُنْتَهَاهَا فِي السَّمَاءِ السَّابِعَةِ نَبْقُهَا مِثْلُ قِلَالِ هَجَرَ وَرَقُهَا مِثْلُ آذَانِ الْفِيلِ يَخْرُجُ مِنْ سَاقِهَا نَهْرَانِ ظَاهِرَانِ وَنَهْرَانِ بَاطِنَانِ قَالَ قُلْتُ يَا جِبْرِيلُ مَا هَذَانِ؟ قَالَ أَمَا الْبَاطِنَانِ فَفِي الْجَنَّةِ وَأَمَّا الظَّاهِرَانِ فَالنِّيلُ وَالْفُرَاتُ «» هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ بِهَذِهِ السِّيَاقَةِ وَلَهُ شَاهِدٌ غَرِيبٌ مِنْ حَدِيثِ شُعْبَةَ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ أَنَسٍ صَحِيحُ الْإِسْنَادِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ على شرطهما ولم يخرجاه بهذه السياقة – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Aḥmad b. Jaʿfar al-Qaṭīʿī \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Aḥmad b. Ḥanbal from my father \u003e ʿAbd al-Razzāq \u003e Maʿmar \u003e Qatādah \u003e Anas Fī
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْقَطِيعِيُّ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي ثنا عَبْدُ الرَّزَّاقِ أَنْبَأَ مَعْمَرٌ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 272

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: He said, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "I was lifted to the Sidrah (lote tree) when there were four rivers, two visible and two hidden. As for the visible ones, they are the Nile and the Euphrates, and as for the hidden ones, they are two rivers in Paradise. I was brought three cups, one filled with milk, one filled with honey, and one filled with wine. So I took the one with milk and drank from it. It was said to me, 'You have chosen the Fitrah (natural disposition) for yourself and your nation.'"
body: He said, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "I was lifted to the Sidrah (lote tree) when there were four rivers, two visible and two hidden. As for the visible ones, they are the Nile and the Euphrates, and as for the hidden ones, they are two rivers in Paradise. I was brought three cups, one filled with milk, one filled with honey, and one filled with wine. So I took the one with milk and drank from it. It was said to me, 'You have chosen the Fitrah (natural disposition) for yourself and your nation.'"
arabic: أَنَّهُ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ رُفِعَتْ لِيَ السِّدْرَةُ فَإِذَا أَرْبَعَةُ أَنْهَارٍ نَهْرَانِ ظَاهِرَانِ وَنَهْرَانِ بَاطِنَانِ فَأَمَّا الظَّاهِرَانِ فَالنِّيلُ وَالْفُرَاتُ وَأَمَّا الْبَاطِنَانِ فَنَهَرَانِ فِي الْجَنَّةِ وَأُتِيتُ بِثَلَاثَةِ أَقْدَاحٍ قَدَحٍ فِيهِ لَبَنٌ وَقَدَحٍ فِيهِ عَسَلٌ وَقَدَحٍ فِيهِ خَمْرٌ فَأَخَذْتُ الَّذِي فِيهِ اللَّبَنُ فَشَرِبْتُ فَقِيلَ لِي أَصَبْتَ الْفِطْرَةَ أَنْتَ وَأُمَّتُكَ قَالَ الْحَاكِمُ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قُلْتُ لِشَيْخِنَا أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ لِمَ لَمْ يُخَرِّجَا هَذَا الْحَدِيثَ؟ قَالَ لِأَنَّ أَنَسَ بْنَ مَالِكٍ لَمْ يَسْمَعْهُ مِنَ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ إِنَّمَا سَمِعَهُ مِنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ صَعْصَعَةَ قَالَ الْحَاكِمُ «ثُمَّ نَظَرْتُ فَإِذَا الْأَحْرُفُ الَّتِي سَمِعَهَا مِنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ صَعْصَعَةَ غَيْرُ هَذِهِ وَلِيَعْلَمْ طَالِبُ هَذَا الْعِلْمِ أَنَّ حَدِيثَ الْمِعْرَاجِ قَدْ سَمِعَ أَنَسٌ بَعْضَهُ مِنَ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ وَبَعْضَهُ مِنْ أَبِي ذَرٍّ الْغِفَارِيِّ وَبَعْضَهُ مِنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ صَعْصَعَةَ غَيْرُ هَذِهِ وَبَعْضَهُ مِنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ»
chain: Abū ʿAbdullāh Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb al-Ḥāfiẓ \u003e Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Anas al-Qurashī \u003e Ḥafṣ b. ʿAbdullāh al-Aslamī \u003e Ibrāhīm b. Ṭahmān \u003e Shuʿbah b. al-Ḥajjāj \u003e Qatādah \u003e Anas b. Mālik
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ الْحَافِظُ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَنَسٍ الْقُرَشِيُّ ثنا حَفْصُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْأَسْلَمِيُّ حَدَّثَنِي إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ طَهْمَانَ عَنْ شُعْبَةَ بْنِ الْحَجَّاجِ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 273

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: "The people of Paradise are a hundred and twenty rows, eighty of them are from this nation, and forty are from the rest of the nations."  – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: "The people of Paradise are a hundred and twenty rows, eighty of them are from this nation, and forty are from the rest of the nations."  – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «أَهْلُ الْجَنَّةِ عِشْرُونَ وَمِائَةُ صَفٍّ هَذِهِ الْأُمَّةُ مِنْهَا ثَمَانُونَ صَفًّا» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ وَلَهُ شَاهِدٌ مِنْ حَدِيثِ سُفْيَانَ الثَّوْرِيِّ عَنْ عَلْقَمَةَ بْنِ مَرْثَدٍ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ بُرَيْدَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ» على شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū al-ʿAbbās Muḥammad b. Yaʿqūb \u003e Aḥmad b. ʿAbd al-Jabbār \u003e Muḥammad b. Fuḍayl \u003e Abū Sinān Ḍirār b. Murrah \u003e Muḥārib b. Dithār \u003e Ibn Buraydah from his father
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ ثنا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْجَبَّارِ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ فُضَيْلٍ ثنا أَبُو سِنَانٍ ضِرَارُ بْنُ مُرَّةَ عَنْ مُحَارِبِ بْنِ دِثَارٍ عَنِ ابْنِ بُرَيْدَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 274

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: Abu Ali al-Hafiz narrated to us that Abdan al-Ahwazi informed us that al-Hasan ibn al-Harith informed him that Mu'ammal ibn Isma'il informed him that Sufyan reported to us and Bakr ibn Muhammad al-Sayrafi informed us that Muhammad ibn Ghaleb informed him that Abdullah ibn Umar narrated to him from Amr ibn Muhammad al-Anqazi from Sufyan from Alqamah ibn Marthad from Sulaiman ibn Buraida from his father that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The people of Paradise are eighty from this Ummah." This hadith was transmitted by Yahya ibn Sa'id and Abdul Rahman ibn Mahdi from ath-Thawri.
body: Abu Ali al-Hafiz narrated to us that Abdan al-Ahwazi informed us that al-Hasan ibn al-Harith informed him that Mu'ammal ibn Isma'il informed him that Sufyan reported to us and Bakr ibn Muhammad al-Sayrafi informed us that Muhammad ibn Ghaleb informed him that Abdullah ibn Umar narrated to him from Amr ibn Muhammad al-Anqazi from Sufyan from Alqamah ibn Marthad from Sulaiman ibn Buraida from his father that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The people of Paradise are eighty from this Ummah." This hadith was transmitted by Yahya ibn Sa'id and Abdul Rahman ibn Mahdi from ath-Thawri.
arabic: وَحدثنا أَبُو عَلِيٍّ الْحَافِظُ أَنْبَأَ عَبْدَانُ الْأَهْوَازِيُّ ثنا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ الْحَارِثِ ثنا مُؤَمَّلُ بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ ثنا سُفْيَانُ وَأَخْبَرَنَا بَكْرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الصَّيْرَفِيُّ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ غَالِبٍ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عُمَرَ ثنا عَمْرُو بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْعَنْقَزِيُّ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ عَنْ عَلْقَمَةَ بْنِ مَرْثَدٍ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ بُرَيْدَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ «أَهْلُ الْجَنَّةِ عِشْرُونَ وَمِائَةُ صَفٍّ ثَمَانُونَ مِنْهَا مِنْ هَذِهِ الْأُمَّةِ» «أَرْسَلَهُ يَحْيَى بْنُ سَعِيدٍ وَعَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ مَهْدِيٍّ عَنِ الثَّوْرِيِّ»
chain: Abū ʿAbdullāh al-Ṣaffār \u003e Labīd b. ʿĀṣim \u003e al-Ḥusayn b. Ḥafṣ \u003e Sufyān And Ḥdthnā Abū ʿAlī al-Ḥāfiẓ \u003e ʿAbdān al-Ahwāzī \u003e al-Ḥasan b. al-Ḥārith \u003e Muʾammal b. Ismāʿīl \u003e Sufyān
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الصَّفَّارُ ثنا لَبِيدُ بْنُ عَاصِمٍ ثنا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ حَفْصٍ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 275

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: "We have the Messenger of Allah ﷺ among us, and he asked, 'How many of you are from the people of Paradise?' We replied, 'Many.' He then asked, 'How about you and the third?' We said, 'That is even more.' He asked, 'How about you and half?' We said, 'That is the majority.' He said, 'The people of Paradise are 120 ranks, and you are 80 ranks among them.' We asked, 'Then, what about the remaining two-thirds, O Messenger of Allah?' He said, 'Indeed.' 'Abdul Rahman ibn 'Abdullah ibn Mas'ud did not hear from his father about most of the conversations.'"
body: "We have the Messenger of Allah ﷺ among us, and he asked, 'How many of you are from the people of Paradise?' We replied, 'Many.' He then asked, 'How about you and the third?' We said, 'That is even more.' He asked, 'How about you and half?' We said, 'That is the majority.' He said, 'The people of Paradise are 120 ranks, and you are 80 ranks among them.' We asked, 'Then, what about the remaining two-thirds, O Messenger of Allah?' He said, 'Indeed.' 'Abdul Rahman ibn 'Abdullah ibn Mas'ud did not hear from his father about most of the conversations.'"
arabic: لَنَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ وَنَحْنُ حَوْلَهُ «كَيْفَ أَنْتُمْ رُبْعُ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ؟» قُلْنَا كَثِيرٌ قَالَ «كَيْفَ أَنْتُمْ وَالثُّلُثُ؟» قَالَ قُلْنَا ذَلِكَ أَكْثَرُ قَالَ كَيْفَ أَنْتُمْ وَالشَّطْرُ؟ قُلْنَا ذَاكَ أَكْثَرُ قَالَ «أَهْلُ الْجَنَّةِ عِشْرُونَ وَمِائَةُ صَفٍّ أَنْتُمْ مِنْهَا ثَمَانُونَ صَفًّا» قَالَ قُلْنَا فَذَاكَ الثُّلُثَانِ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ قَالَ «أَجَلْ» «عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ لَمْ يَسْمَعْ مِنْ أَبِيهِ فِي أَكْثَرِ الْأَقَاوِيلِ» لم يسمع عبد الرحمن من أبيه
chain: al-Qāsim b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman from his father \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Masʿūd
chainArabic: وَقَدْ رَوَاهُ الْحَارِثُ بْنُ حَصِيرَةَ عَنِ الْقَاسِمِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍ قَالَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 276

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "When the people of Paradise enter Paradise, Allah, the Almighty, will ask them, 'Do you desire anything more so that I may increase it for you?' They will reply, 'Our Lord, what more can we desire when You have given us everything?' He will say, 'My pleasure is greater than all that.'" – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "When the people of Paradise enter Paradise, Allah, the Almighty, will ask them, 'Do you desire anything more so that I may increase it for you?' They will reply, 'Our Lord, what more can we desire when You have given us everything?' He will say, 'My pleasure is greater than all that.'" – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ إِذَا دَخَلَ أَهْلُ الْجَنَّةِ الْجَنَّةَ قَالَ يَقُولُ اللَّهُ ﷻ هَلْ تَشْتَهُونَ شَيْئًا فَأَزِيدُكُمْ؟ فَيَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا وَمَا فَوْقَ مَا أَعْطَيْتَنَا؟ قَالَ يَقُولُ رِضْوَانِي أَكْبَرُ «» هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ وَقَدْ تَابَعَ الْأَشْجَعِيُّ مُحَمَّدَ بْنَ يُوسُفَ الْفِرْيَابِيَّ عَلَى إِسْنَادِهِ وَمَتْنِهِ على شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: Abū Qutaybah Salm b. al-Faḍl al-Ādamī Bimakkah \u003e Mūsá b. Hārūn \u003e Salamah b. Shabīb \u003e al-Firyābī \u003e Sufyān al-Thawrī \u003e Muḥammad b. al-Munkadir \u003e Jābir b. ʿAbdullāh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو قُتَيْبَةَ سَلْمُ بْنُ الْفَضْلِ الْآدَمِيُّ بِمَكَّةَ ثنا مُوسَى بْنُ هَارُونَ ثنا سَلَمَةُ بْنُ شَبِيبٍ ثنا الْفِرْيَابِيُّ ثنا سُفْيَانُ الثَّوْرِيُّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْمُنْكَدِرِ عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 277

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "When the people of Paradise enter Paradise, Allah, the Mighty and Exalted, will say, 'Shall I not inform you of something greater than this?' They will say, 'Yes, O Allah! What is greater than this?' He will say, 'My pleasure.'"
body: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "When the people of Paradise enter Paradise, Allah, the Mighty and Exalted, will say, 'Shall I not inform you of something greater than this?' They will say, 'Yes, O Allah! What is greater than this?' He will say, 'My pleasure.'"
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ إِذَا دَخَلَ أَهْلُ الْجَنَّةِ الْجَنَّةَ قَالَ اللَّهُ ﷻ أَلَا أُنَبِّئُكُمْ بِأَكْبَرَ مِنْ هَذَا؟ قَالُوا بَلَى وَمَا أَكْبَرُ مِنْ هَذَا؟ قَالَ الرِّضْوَانُ
chain: Abū ʿAlī al-Ḥāfiẓ \u003e ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Muḥammad b. al-Mughīrah al-Baghdādī \u003e Abū Kurayb \u003e ʿUbaydullāh b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman al-Ashjaʿī \u003e Sufyān \u003e Muḥammad b. al-Munkadir \u003e Jābir
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَلِيٍّ الْحَافِظُ ثنا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ الْبَغْدَادِيُّ ثنا أَبُو كُرَيْبٍ ثنا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الْأَشْجَعِيُّ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْمُنْكَدِرِ عَنْ جَابِرٍ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 278

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: ‘Death will be brought on the Day of Resurrection and made to stand on the Sirat (the Bridge over Hell). It will be said: “O people of Paradise!” And they will look. Anxious and afraid lest they be brought out of the place they are in. Then it will be said: “O people of Hell!” and they will look, hoping that they will be brought out of the place they are in. Then it will be said: “Do you know what this is?” They will say: “Yes, this is Death.” Then the command will be given for it to be slaughtered on the Sirat, and it will be said to both groups: “It is eternal wherever you are, and there will never be any death therein.”
body: ‘Death will be brought on the Day of Resurrection and made to stand on the Sirat (the Bridge over Hell). It will be said: “O people of Paradise!” And they will look. Anxious and afraid lest they be brought out of the place they are in. Then it will be said: “O people of Hell!” and they will look, hoping that they will be brought out of the place they are in. Then it will be said: “Do you know what this is?” They will say: “Yes, this is Death.” Then the command will be given for it to be slaughtered on the Sirat, and it will be said to both groups: “It is eternal wherever you are, and there will never be any death therein.”
arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ يُؤْتَى بِالْمَوْتِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ فِي هَيْئَةِ كَبْشٍ أَمْلَحَ فَيُقَالُ يَا أَهْلَ الْجَنَّةِ فَيَطَّلِعُونَ خَائِفِينَ وَجِلِينَ مَخَافَةَ أَنْ يَخْرُجُوا مِمَّا هُمْ فِيهِ فَيُقَالُ تَعْرِفُونَ هَذَا؟ فَيَقُولُونَ نَعَمْ هَذَا الْمَوْتُ ثُمَّ يُقَالُ يَا أَهْلَ النَّارِ فَيَطَّلِعُونَ مُسْتَبْشِرِينَ فَرِحِينَ أَنْ يَخْرُجُوا مِمَّا هُمْ فِيهِ فَيُقَالُ أَتَعْرِفُونَ هَذَا؟ فَيَقُولُونَ نَعَمْ هَذَا الْمَوْتُ فَيَأْمُرُ بِهِ فَيُذْبَحُ عَلَى الصِّرَاطِ فَيُقَالُ لِلْفَرِيقَيْنِ خُلُودٌ فِيمَا تَجِدُونَ لَا مَوْتَ فِيهَا أَبَدًا «» هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ فَإِنَّ يَزِيدَ بْنَ هَارُونَ ثَبَتَ وَقَدْ أَسْنَدَهُ فِي جَمِيعِ الرِّوَايَاتِ عَنْهُ وَوَافَقَهُ الْفَضْلُ بْنُ مُوسَى السِّينَانِيُّ وَعَبْدُ الْوَهَّابِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْمَجِيدِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو «» أَمَّا حَدِيثُ الْفَضْلِ بْنِ مُوسَى
chain: Abū Bakr Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Ḥātim al-ʿAdl Bimarw \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Rawḥ al-Madāʾinī \u003e Yazīd b. Hārūn \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAmr \u003e Abū Salamah \u003e Abū Hurayrah \u003e Qāl Rasūl Allāh
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ حَاتِمٍ الْعَدْلُ بِمَرْوَ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ رَوْحٍ الْمَدَائِنِيُّ ثنا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ أَنْبَأَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَمْرٍو عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 279

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: "The arrival of death on the Day of Resurrection is mentioned as 'And as for the hadith of Abdul Wahhab bin Abdul Majid, it is quoted."
body: "The arrival of death on the Day of Resurrection is mentioned as 'And as for the hadith of Abdul Wahhab bin Abdul Majid, it is quoted."
arabic: «يُؤْتَى بِالْمَوْتِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ» فَذَكَرَ الْحَدِيثَ مَوْقُوفًا «وَأَمَّا حَدِيثُ عَبْدِ الْوَهَّابِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْمَجِيدِ»
chain: al-Ḥasan b. Muḥammad b. Ḥalīm al-Marwazī \u003e Abū al-Muwajjah \u003e Yūsuf b. ʿĪsá \u003e al-Faḍl b. Mūsá \u003e Muḥammad b. ʿAmr \u003e Abū Salamah \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَلِيمٍ الْمَرْوَزِيُّ ثنا أَبُو الْمُوَجَّهِ ثنا يُوْسُفُ بْنُ عِيسَى ثنا الْفَضْلُ بْنُ مُوسَى ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَمْرٍو عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 280

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: From Abu Hurairah: "The two sheikhs agreed to narrate this hadith with a different wording from the narration of Al-A'mash from Abu Salih from Abu Sa'eed." This is according to the condition set by Muslim. – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: From Abu Hurairah: "The two sheikhs agreed to narrate this hadith with a different wording from the narration of Al-A'mash from Abu Salih from Abu Sa'eed." This is according to the condition set by Muslim. – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ «وَقَدِ اتَّفَقَ الشَّيْخَانِ عَلَى إِخْرَاجِ هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ بِغَيْرِ هَذَا اللَّفْظِ مِنْ حَدِيثِ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ أَبِي صَالِحٍ عَنْ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ» على شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Muḥammad b. Isḥāq \u003e Bundār \u003e ʿAbd al-Wahhāb Fadhakarah Biʾisnādih Mawqūf
chainArabic: فَأَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو مُحَمَّدِ بْنُ زِيَادٍ الْعَدْلُ ثنا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ ثنا بُنْدَارٌ ثنا عَبْدُ الْوَهَّابِ فَذَكَرَهُ بِإِسْنَادِهِ مَوْقُوفًا

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 281

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: "O my sons, indeed I am the messenger of Allah ﷺ. You know the destination, to Allah and then to Paradise or to Hellfire. It is an eternal stay wherein there is no weakening, and an everlasting existence in bodies that do not die." – Sound Chain
body: "O my sons, indeed I am the messenger of Allah ﷺ. You know the destination, to Allah and then to Paradise or to Hellfire. It is an eternal stay wherein there is no weakening, and an everlasting existence in bodies that do not die." – Sound Chain
arabic: «يَا بَنِي أَوْدٍ إِنِّي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ تَعْلَمُونَ الْمَعَادَ إِلَى اللَّهِ ثُمَّ إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ أَوْ إِلَى النَّارِ وَإِقَامَةٌ لَا ظَعْنَ فِيهِ وَخُلُودٌ لَا مَوْتٌ فِي أَجْسَادٍ لَا تَمُوتُ» هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحُ الْإِسْنَادِ رُوَاتُهُ مَكِّيُّونَ وَمُسْلِمُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ الزِّنْجِيُّ إِمَامُ أَهْلِ مَكَّةَ وَمُفْتِيهِمْ إِلَّا أَنَّ الشَّيْخَيْنِ قَدْ نَسَبَاهُ إِلَى أَنَّ الْحَدِيثَ لَيْسَ مِنْ صَنَعْتِهِ وَاللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ صحيح الإسناد – إسناده صحيح
chain: Abū Muḥammad ʿAbdullāh b. Muḥammad b. Isḥāq al-Fākihī Bimakkah \u003e Abū Yaḥyá ʿAbdullāh b. Aḥmad b. Abū Masarrah \u003e Aḥmad b. Muḥammad b. al-Walīd al-Azraqī \u003e Muslim b. Khālid \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. ʿAbd al-Raḥman b. Abū Ḥusayn \u003e Ibn Sābiṭ \u003e ʿAmr b. Maymūn al-Awdī \u003e Qām Fīnā Muʿādh b. Jabal
chainArabic: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ الْفَاكِهِيُّ بِمَكَّةَ ثنا أَبُو يَحْيَى عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِي مَسَرَّةَ ثنا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْوَلِيدِ الْأَزْرَقِيُّ ثنا مُسْلِمُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي حُسَيْنٍ عَنِ ابْنِ سَابِطٍ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ مَيْمُونٍ الْأَوْدِيِّ قَالَ قَامَ فِينَا مُعَاذُ بْنُ جَبَلٍ فَقَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 282

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: Abu Musa said about the saying of Allah Almighty: "And for those who fear the position of their Lord, there will be two gardens" [Ar-Rahman verse 46]. He said: "Two gardens of gold for those who race ahead and two gardens of silver for those who follow." This is an authentic chain of narration according to the conditions of Imam Muslim. However, they did not mention it like this. Rather, they cited it from the narration of Al-Harith ibn 'Ubayd and 'Abdul 'Aziz ibn 'Abdus Samad from Abu Imran Al-Jawni from Abu Bakr ibn Abu Musa from his father who narrated it from the Prophet ﷺ. The hadith mentions "two gardens of silver" but does not mention the "racing ahead" and "following" parts. I heard Abu Hasan 'Ali ibn 'Umar Al-Hafiz saying that he heard Abu Fadl Al-Wazir saying that he heard Ma'mun Al-Misri saying: I asked Abu 'Abdul Rahman An-Nasai, "Why did Muhammad ibn Ismail leave the hadith of Hammad ibn Salamah?" He said, "By Allah, Hammad ibn Salamah is more reliable and truthful than Ismail ibn Abi Uways." And he mentioned a long story similar to the replacement of Al-Harith ibn 'Ubayd with Hammad. – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: Abu Musa said about the saying of Allah Almighty: "And for those who fear the position of their Lord, there will be two gardens" [Ar-Rahman verse 46]. He said: "Two gardens of gold for those who race ahead and two gardens of silver for those who follow." This is an authentic chain of narration according to the conditions of Imam Muslim. However, they did not mention it like this. Rather, they cited it from the narration of Al-Harith ibn 'Ubayd and 'Abdul 'Aziz ibn 'Abdus Samad from Abu Imran Al-Jawni from Abu Bakr ibn Abu Musa from his father who narrated it from the Prophet ﷺ. The hadith mentions "two gardens of silver" but does not mention the "racing ahead" and "following" parts. I heard Abu Hasan 'Ali ibn 'Umar Al-Hafiz saying that he heard Abu Fadl Al-Wazir saying that he heard Ma'mun Al-Misri saying: I asked Abu 'Abdul Rahman An-Nasai, "Why did Muhammad ibn Ismail leave the hadith of Hammad ibn Salamah?" He said, "By Allah, Hammad ibn Salamah is more reliable and truthful than Ismail ibn Abi Uways." And he mentioned a long story similar to the replacement of Al-Harith ibn 'Ubayd with Hammad. – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: عَنْ أَبِي مُوسَى فِي قَوْلِهِ ﷻ {وَلِمَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِ جَنَّتَانِ} [الرحمن 46] قَالَ «جَنَّتَانِ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ لِلسَّابِقِينَ وَجَنَّتَانِ مِنْ فِضَّةٍ لِلتَّابِعِينَ» هَذَا إِسْنَادٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ هَكَذَا « إِنَّمَا خَرَّجَاهُ مِنْ حَدِيثِ الْحَارِثِ بْنِ عُبَيْدٍ وَعَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الصَّمَدِ عَنْ أَبِي عِمْرَانَ الْجَوْنِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي بَكْرِ بْنِ أَبِي مُوسَى عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ» جَنَّتَانِ مِنْ فِضَّةٍ الْحَدِيثَ وَلَيْسَ فِيهِ ذِكْرُ السَّابِقِينَ وَالتَّابِعِينَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ عَلِيَّ بْنَ عُمَرَ الْحَافِظَ يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا الْفَضْلِ الْوَزِيرَ يَقُولُ سَمِعْتُ مَأْمُونَ الْمِصْرِيَّ يَقُولُ قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ النَّسَائِيِّ لِمَ تَرَكَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ حَدِيثَ حَمَّادِ بْنِ سَلَمَةَ؟ فَقَالَ «وَاللَّهِ إِنَّ حَمَّادَ بْنَ سَلَمَةَ أَخْيَرُ وَأَصْدَقُ مِنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ أَبِي أُوَيْسٍ» وَذَكَرَ حِكَايَةً طَوِيلَةً شَبِيهَةً بِالِاسْتِبْدَالِ بِالْحَارِثِ بْنِ عُبَيْدٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍعلى شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: ʿAbdān b. Yazīd al-Daqqāq Bihamdān \u003e Ibrāhīm b. al-Ḥusayn \u003e Ādam b. Abū Iyās \u003e Ḥammād b. Salamah \u003e Thābit al-Bunānī And ʾAbī ʿImrān al-Jawnī \u003e Abū Bakr b. Abū Mūsá al-Ashʿarī
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدَانُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ الدَّقَّاقُ بِهَمْدَانَ ثنا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ثنا آدَمُ بْنُ أَبِي إِيَاسٍ ثنا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ ثَابِتٍ الْبُنَانِيِّ وَأَبِي عِمْرَانَ الْجَوْنِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي بَكْرِ بْنِ أَبِي مُوسَى الْأَشْعَرِيِّ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 283

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: On the authority of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , he said, "On the Day of Judgment, it will be like the duration between Dhuhr (noon) and Asr (afternoon prayer)." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
body: On the authority of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ , he said, "On the Day of Judgment, it will be like the duration between Dhuhr (noon) and Asr (afternoon prayer)." – Sound Chain per Bukhārī and Muslim
arabic: عَنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ «يَوْمُ الْقِيَامَةِ كَقَدْرِ مَا بَيْنَ الظُّهْرِ وَالْعَصْرِ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحُ الْإِسْنَادِ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ إِنْ كَانَ سُوَيْدُ بْنُ نَصْرٍ حَفِظَهُ عَلَى أَنَّهُ ثِقَةٌ مَأْمُونٌ» على شرطهما – على شرط البخاري ومسلم
chain: ʿAbdullāh b. ʿUmar b. ʿAlī al-Jawharī Bimarw from Aṣl Kitābih \u003e Yaḥyá b. Sāsawayh b. ʿAbd al-Karīm \u003e Sūwayd b. Naṣr \u003e Ibn al-Mubārak \u003e Maʿmar \u003e Qatādah \u003e Zurārah b. Awfá \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنِي عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عُمَرَ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْجَوْهَرِيُّ بِمَرْوَ مِنْ أَصْلِ كِتَابِهِ ثنا يَحْيَى بْنُ سَاسَوَيْهِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْكَرِيمِ ثنا سُوَيْدُ بْنُ نَصْرٍ ثنا ابْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ عَنْ مَعْمَرٍ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ بْنِ أَوْفَى عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 284

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: "On the Day of Resurrection, the believers will be held accountable as much as the time between noon and afternoon."
body: "On the Day of Resurrection, the believers will be held accountable as much as the time between noon and afternoon."
arabic: «يَوْمُ الْقِيَامَةِ عَلَى الْمُؤْمِنِينَ كَقَدْرِ مَا بَيْنَ الظُّهْرِ وَالْعَصْرِ»
chain: al-Ḥasan b. Muḥammad b. Ḥalīm \u003e Abū al-Muwajjah \u003e ʿAbdān \u003e ʿAbdullāh \u003e Maʿmar \u003e Qatādah \u003e Zurārah b. Awfá \u003e Abū Hurayrah
chainArabic: فَقَدْ أَخْبَرَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَلِيمٍ أَنْبَأَ أَبُو الْمُوَجَّهِ أَنْبَأَ عَبْدَانُ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ عَنْ مَعْمَرٍ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ بْنِ أَوْفَى عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 285

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: "He informed me that you spoke about a matter related to destiny, so beware of writing to me about it. I have heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying, 'Indeed, there will be people in my Ummah who will deny destiny.'" – Sound Chain per Muslim
body: "He informed me that you spoke about a matter related to destiny, so beware of writing to me about it. I have heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saying, 'Indeed, there will be people in my Ummah who will deny destiny.'" – Sound Chain per Muslim
arabic: أَنَّهُ بَلَغَنِي أَنَّكَ تَكَلَّمْتَ فِي شَيْءٍ مِنَ الْقَدْرِ فَإِيَّاكَ أَنْ تُكْتَبَ إِلَيَّ فَإِنِّي سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ «إِنَّهُ سَيَكُونُ فِي أُمَّتِي أَقْوَامٌ يُكَذِّبُونَ بِالْقَدَرِ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ مُسْلِمٍ فَقَدِ احْتَجَّ بِأَبِي صَخْرٍ حُمَيْدِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ» على شرط مسلم – على شرط مسلم
chain: Abū Jaʿfar Muḥammad b. Ṣāliḥ b. Hāniʾ \u003e al-Sarī b. Khuzaymah \u003e Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥman ʿAbdullāh b. Yazīd al-Muqriʾ \u003e Aḥmad b. Jaʿfar al-Qaṭīʿī \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Aḥmad b. Ḥanbal from my father \u003e ʿAbdullāh b. Yazīd \u003e Saʿīd b. Ayyūb \u003e Abū Ṣakhr \u003e Nāfiʿ
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ صَالِحِ بْنِ هَانِئٍ ثنا السَّرِيُّ بْنُ خُزَيْمَةَ ثنا أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ الْمُقْرِئُ وَأَخْبَرَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْقَطِيعِيُّ ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي ثنا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ يَزِيدَ ثنا سَعِيدُ بْنُ أَيُّوبَ أَخْبَرَنِي أَبُو صَخْرٍ عَنْ نَافِعٍ قَالَ كَانَ لِابْنِ عُمَرَ صَدِيقٌ مِنْ أَهْلِ الشَّامِ يُكَاتِبُهُ فَكَتَبَ إِلَيْهِ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عُمَرَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 286

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: The Prophet ﷺ said: The Qadariyyah are the Magians of this community. If they are ill, do not pay a sick visit to them, and if they die, do not attend their funerals.
body: The Prophet ﷺ said: The Qadariyyah are the Magians of this community. If they are ill, do not pay a sick visit to them, and if they die, do not attend their funerals.
arabic: عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ قَالَ «الْقَدَرِيَّةُ مَجُوسُ هَذِهِ الْأُمَّةِ إِنْ مَرِضُوا فَلَا تَعُودُوهُمْ وَإِنْ مَاتُوا فَلَا تَشْهَدُوهُمْ» «هَذَا حَدِيثٌ صَحِيحٌ عَلَى شَرْطِ الشَّيْخَيْنِ إِنْ صَحَّ سَمَاعُ أَبِي حَازِمٍ مِنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ وَلَمْ يُخَرِّجَاهُ وَشَاهِدُهُ
chain: Abū Bakr Aḥmad b. Salmān b. al-Ḥasan al-Faqīh Imlāʾ \u003e Abū Dāwud Sulaymān b. al-Ashʿath \u003e Mūsá b. Ismāʿīl \u003e ʿAbd al-ʿAzīz b. Abū Ḥāzim from his father \u003e Ibn ʿUmar
chainArabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ أَحْمَدُ بْنُ سَلْمَانَ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ الْفَقِيهُ إِمْلَاءً ثنا أَبُو دَاوُدَ سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ الْأَشْعَثِ ثنا مُوسَى بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ ثنا عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ بْنُ أَبِي حَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ

title: Mustadrak al-Hakim 287

chapter.englishTitle: Regarding the statement of Misʿar...

englishRaw: Ibn ʿUmar used to send his Hadi from Jam' (to Mina) in the last third of the night with the pilgrims amongst whom there were free men and slaves, till it was taken into the Manhar (slaughtering place) of the Prophet ﷺ .
body: Ibn ʿUmar used to send his Hadi from Jam' (to Mina) in the last third of the night with the pilgrims amongst whom there were free men and slaves, till it was taken into the Manhar (slaughtering place) of the Prophet ﷺ .
arabic: عن ابن عمر ؓ
chainArabic: مَا» على شرطهما إن صح لأبي حازم سماع
